name: A1
description: Beginner — Basic everyday words and phrases

words.definition: The first person singular pronoun used by a speaker to refer to themselves.
words.definitionUz: Men — gapiruvchi o'zini bildirish uchun ishlatiladigan birinchi shaxs birlik olmoshi.
words.example1: I am learning English.
words.example2: I like to read books.
words.example3: I will call you later.
extraExamples: I am happy today.
I don't know the answer.
I went to the market yesterday.
I love my family.
I need some help.
I am a student.
I enjoy playing football.

words.definition: The second person pronoun used to address the person or people being spoken to.
words.definitionUz: Siz / Sen — suhbatdoshni yoki suhbatdoshlarni bildirish uchun ishlatiladigan ikkinchi shaxs olmoshi.
words.example1: You are my best friend.
words.example2: Did you finish your homework?
words.example3: You can do it!
extraExamples: You look beautiful today.
I will help you.
You are very kind.
Where are you going?
You need to study harder.
Thank you for your help.
You should come to the party.

words.definition: The third person singular pronoun used to refer to a male person.
words.definitionUz: U (erkak) — erkak shaxsni bildirish uchun ishlatiladigan uchinchi shaxs birlik olmoshi.
words.example1: He is my brother.
words.example2: He works very hard.
words.example3: He likes playing basketball.
extraExamples: He is a doctor.
He went to school.
He is very tall.
He helped me yesterday.
He speaks English well.
He is happy now.
He will come tomorrow.

words.definition: The third person singular pronoun used to refer to a female person.
words.definitionUz: U (ayol) — ayol shaxsni bildirish uchun ishlatiladigan uchinchi shaxs birlik olmoshi.
words.example1: She is my sister.
words.example2: She is a teacher.
words.example3: She sings very well.
extraExamples: She is beautiful.
She studies at university.
She helped her friend.
She loves reading.
She is kind to everyone.
She will visit us soon.
She cooks delicious food.

words.definition: The third person singular pronoun used to refer to a thing, animal, or idea.
words.definitionUz: U (narsa, hayvon) — narsa, hayvon yoki fikrni bildirish uchun ishlatiladigan uchinchi shaxs birlik olmoshi.
words.example1: It is a beautiful day.
words.example2: The dog is sleeping. It is tired.
words.example3: It is my favorite book.
extraExamples: It is raining outside.
I like it very much.
It was a good movie.
The phone is new. It works well.
It is important to study.
Where is it?
It makes me happy.

words.definition: The first person plural pronoun used to refer to the speaker and one or more other people.
words.definitionUz: Biz — gapiruvchi va boshqa bir yoki bir necha odamni bildirish uchun ishlatiladigan birinchi shaxs ko'plik olmoshi.
words.example1: We are friends.
words.example2: We live in Tashkent.
words.example3: We will go to the park tomorrow.
extraExamples: We love our country.
We study together.
We are a happy family.
We need to work hard.
We enjoyed the trip.
We are ready.
We can do it.

words.definition: The third person plural pronoun used to refer to two or more people or things.
words.definitionUz: Ular — ikki yoki undan ortiq odam yoki narsalarni bildirish uchun ishlatiladigan uchinchi shaxs ko'plik olmoshi.
words.example1: They are my classmates.
words.example2: They play football every evening.
words.example3: They are coming to the party.
extraExamples: They live near the school.
They are very friendly.
They helped us a lot.
They like Uzbek food.
They are students.
They will visit us next week.
They work hard.
extraExampleTranslations: Ular bizga juda ko'p yordam berishdi.

words.definition: The object form of the first person singular pronoun.
words.definitionUz: Meni / Menga — birinchi shaxs birlik olmoshining to'liqsiz shakli.
words.example1: Help me please.
words.example2: She gave the book to me.
words.example3: Call me tomorrow.
extraExamples: This is for me.
Tell me the truth.
He knows me well.
Give it to me.
They invited me.
She loves me.
Come with me.

words.definition: The object form of the third person singular masculine pronoun.
words.definitionUz: Uni / Unga — uchinchi shaxs birlik erkak olmoshining to'liqsiz shakli.
words.example1: I saw him yesterday.
words.example2: Give the gift to him.
words.example3: She helped him with homework.
words.example3Translation: U unga uy vazifasida yordam berdi.
extraExamples: I know him.
Tell him the news.
They visited him.
This book is for him.
I called him.
She likes him.
We met him at the park.

words.definition: The object form of the third person singular feminine pronoun.
words.definitionUz: Uni / Unga (ayol) — uchinchi shaxs birlik ayol olmoshining to'liqsiz shakli.
words.example1: I met her at school.
words.example2: This present is for her.
words.example3: She told her the secret.
extraExamples: I like her very much.
Give it to her.
They know her well.
Call her later.
He helped her.
This is her book.
We invited her.

words.definition: The object form of the first person plural pronoun.
words.definitionUz: Bizni / Bizga — birinchi shaxs ko'plik olmoshining to'liqsiz shakli.
words.example1: Help us please.
words.example2: They invited us to the party.
words.example3: The teacher taught us English.
extraExamples: This is for us.
She gave it to us.
Come with us.
They know us.
Join us.
He told us the story.
The gift is from us.

words.definition: The object form of the third person plural pronoun.
words.definitionUz: Ular (to'liqsiz) — uchinchi shaxs ko'plik olmoshining to'liqsiz shakli.
words.example1: I saw them at the market.
words.example2: Give the books to them.
words.example3: She invited them to dinner.
words.example3Translation: U ularni kechki ovqatga taklif qildi.
extraExamples: I know them well.
Tell them the truth.
We helped them.
This is for them.
Call them later.
They thanked them.
We met them yesterday.

words.definition: Belonging to or associated with the speaker.
words.definitionUz: Mening — gapiruvchiga tegishli yoki bog'liq narsani bildiradi.
words.example1: This is my book.
words.example2: My family is very big.
words.example3: I love my country.
extraExamples: My name is Aziza.
This is my house.
My teacher is kind.
I forgot my phone.
My friends are coming.
This is my favorite color.
My dream is to travel.

words.definition: Belonging to or associated with the person or people being spoken to.
words.definitionUz: Sizning / Sening — suhbatdoshga tegishli narsani bildiradi.
words.example1: What is your name?
words.example2: This is your book.
words.example3: Your idea is great.
extraExamples: Your house is beautiful.
I like your shoes.
Your teacher is nice.
Where is your bag?
Your family is kind.
This is your turn.
Your English is improving.

words.definition: Belonging to or associated with a male person.
words.definitionUz: Uning (erkak) — erkak shaxsga tegishli narsani bildiradi.
words.example1: This is his car.
words.example2: His name is Ali.
words.example3: I like his style.
extraExamples: His book is interesting.
This is his house.
His family is big.
His teacher praised him.
I met his brother.
His dream is to become a doctor.
His phone is new.

words.definition: Belonging to or associated with a thing or animal.
words.definitionUz: Uning (narsa) — narsa yoki hayvonga tegishli narsani bildiradi.
words.example1: The dog wagged its tail.
words.example2: The company has its own office.
words.example3: The bird built its nest.
extraExamples: The car lost its key.
The tree lost its leaves.
The school has its rules.
The phone has its own charger.
The cat cleaned its fur.
The city has its beauty.
The book has its own story.

words.definition: Belonging to or associated with the speaker and one or more other people.
words.definitionUz: Bizning — gapiruvchi va boshqa odamlarga tegishli narsani bildiradi.
words.example1: This is our house.
words.example2: Our teacher is very kind.
words.example3: We love our country.
extraExamples: Our family is big.
This is our school.
Our team won the match.
We enjoyed our trip.
Our friends are coming.
This is our favorite restaurant.
Our city is beautiful.

words.definition: Belonging to or associated with two or more people or things.
words.definitionUz: Ularning — ikki yoki undan ortiq odam yoki narsalarga tegishli narsani bildiradi.
words.example1: This is their car.
words.example2: Their house is big.
words.example3: I like their idea.
extraExamples: Their teacher is strict.
Their children are smart.
This is their book.
Their team played well.
I met their parents.
Their city is famous.
Their food is delicious.

words.definition: The thing or things belonging to the speaker.
words.definitionUz: Meningniki — gapiruvchiga tegishli narsa yoki narsalar.
words.example1: This book is mine.
words.example2: The red bag is mine.
words.example3: These shoes are mine.
extraExamples: That house is mine.
The idea was mine.
This pen is mine.
The victory is mine.
These are mine.
The decision is mine.
The gift is mine.

words.definition: The thing or things belonging to the person or people being spoken to.
words.definitionUz: Sizniki / Seniki — suhbatdoshga tegishli narsa yoki narsalar.
words.example1: This pen is yours.
words.example2: The blue book is yours.
words.example3: Is this yours?
extraExamples: That seat is yours.
The idea was yours.
These keys are yours.
The house is yours.
This is yours.
The decision is yours.
The gift is yours.

words.definition: The thing or things belonging to a female person.
words.definitionUz: Uniki (ayol) — ayol shaxsga tegishli narsa yoki narsalar.
words.example1: This bag is hers.
words.example2: The red dress is hers.
words.example3: The book is hers.
extraExamples: That car is hers.
The idea was hers.
These shoes are hers.
The house is hers.
This pen is hers.
The decision is hers.
The gift is hers.

words.definition: The thing or things belonging to the speaker and one or more others.
words.definitionUz: Bizniki — gapiruvchi va boshqa odamlarga tegishli narsa yoki narsalar.
words.example1: This house is ours.
words.example2: The victory is ours.
words.example3: The garden is ours.
extraExamples: This school is ours.
The idea was ours.
These books are ours.
The car is ours.
This is ours.
The decision is ours.
The success is ours.

words.definition: The thing or things belonging to two or more people or things.
words.definitionUz: Ularningki — ikki yoki undan ortiq odam yoki narsalarga tegishli narsa yoki narsalar.
words.example1: This car is theirs.
words.example2: The house is theirs.
words.example3: The books are theirs.
extraExamples: The idea was theirs.
These bags are theirs.
The garden is theirs.
This is theirs.
The decision is theirs.
The gift is theirs.
The success is theirs.

words.definition: Used to refer to a person, thing, or idea that is near in space or time.
words.definitionUz: Bu — yaqin joyda yoki vaqtda bo'lgan shaxs, narsa yoki fikrni bildiradi.
words.example1: This is my friend.
words.example2: I like this book.
words.example3: This is delicious.
extraExamples: This pen is new.
This house is big.
This is important.
I want this one.
This day is special.
This idea is good.
This is my favorite.

words.definition: Used to refer to a person, thing, or idea that is farther away in space or time.
words.definitionUz: U (uzoqroq) — uzoqroq joyda yoki vaqtda bo'lgan shaxs, narsa yoki fikrni bildiradi.
words.example1: That is my school.
words.example2: I like that color.
words.example3: That was a good movie.
extraExamples: That house is old.
That idea is interesting.
I saw that man.
That book is mine.
That day was special.
That is true.
That car is fast.

words.definition: The plural form of "this", referring to things near the speaker.
words.definitionUz: Bular — "bu" ning ko'plik shakli, gapiruvchiga yaqin narsalarni bildiradi.
words.example1: These are my books.
words.example2: I like these shoes.
words.example3: These apples are sweet.
extraExamples: These children are smart.
These are my friends.
These flowers are beautiful.
I want these ones.
These days are busy.
These ideas are good.
These pens are new.

words.definition: The plural form of "that", referring to things farther away.
words.definitionUz: Ular (uzoqroq) — "u" ning ko'plik shakli, uzoqroq narsalarni bildiradi.
words.example1: Those are my friends.
words.example2: I like those mountains.
words.example3: Those books are interesting.
extraExamples: Those houses are old.
Those ideas are creative.
Those people are kind.
I saw those cars.
Those days were happy.
Those apples are fresh.
Those are mine.

words.definition: An unknown or unspecified person.
words.definitionUz: Kimdir — noma'lum yoki aniq bo'lmagan shaxs.
words.example1: Someone is at the door.
words.example2: I need someone to help me.
words.example3: Someone called you.
extraExamples: Someone is singing.
I saw someone in the garden.
Someone left this message.
Can someone help me?
Someone is waiting for you.
I want to be someone important.
Someone knows the answer.

words.definition: An unknown or unspecified thing.
words.definitionUz: Nimadir — noma'lum yoki aniq bo'lmagan narsa.
words.example1: I want to eat something.
words.example2: There is something in the box.
words.example3: She told me something interesting.
words.example3Translation: U menga qiziqarli nimadir aytib berdi.
extraExamples: Something is wrong.
I need something to drink.
He bought something for you.
Something happened yesterday.
Do you want something?
I have something to tell you.
She found something special.
extraExampleTranslations: U siz uchun nimadir sotib oldi.

words.definition: Every person; all people.
words.definitionUz: Hamma — har bir shaxs; barcha odamlar.
words.example1: Everyone is welcome.
words.example2: Everyone likes ice cream.
words.example3: Tell everyone the news.
extraExamples: Everyone was happy.
Everyone knows him.
Everyone should try.
I invited everyone.
Everyone helped.
Everyone has a dream.
Everyone laughed.

words.definition: Not anything; no single thing.
words.definitionUz: Hech narsa — biror narsa emas; hech qanday narsa yo'q.
words.example1: I have nothing to do.
words.example2: There is nothing in the box.
words.example3: She said nothing.
extraExamples: Nothing is impossible.
I know nothing about it.
There is nothing to worry about.
He did nothing wrong.
Nothing can stop us.
I saw nothing.
Nothing is better than this.
extraExampleTranslations: Men bu haqida hech narsa bilmayman.

words.definition: Every one of two or more people or things, considered separately.
words.definitionUz: Har biri — ikki yoki undan ortiq narsalarning har birini alohida ko'rib chiqish.
words.example1: Each student has a book.
words.example2: Each of us has a dream.
words.example3: Give each child one apple.
words.example3Translation: Har bir bolaga bitta olma bering.
extraExamples: Each day is different.
Each team played well.
I know each person here.
Each answer is correct.
Each house has a garden.
Each one is special.
We visited each city.
extraExampleTranslations: Men bu yerdagi har bir odamni taniyman.

words.definition: The two people or things together.
words.definitionUz: Ikkalasi ham — ikkala shaxs yoki narsani birgalikda bildiradi.
words.example1: Both books are interesting.
words.example2: Both of them are my friends.
words.example3: I like both colors.
extraExamples: Both teams won.
Both parents are teachers.
I invited both of them.
Both options are good.
Both brothers are tall.
Both days were sunny.
She knows both languages.

words.definition: The whole quantity or every one of something.
words.definitionUz: Hamma / Barcha — biror narsaning butun miqdori yoki har biri.
words.example1: All students passed the exam.
words.example2: I ate all the food.
words.example3: All my friends came.
extraExamples: All people need love.
She knows all the answers.
We visited all the cities.
All the books are new.
I love all kinds of music.
All is well.
All children like games.
extraExampleTranslations: Men barcha turdagi musiqani yaxshi ko'raman.

words.definition: An unspecified quantity or number of something.
words.definitionUz: Ba'zi / Bir oz — aniq bo'lmagan miqdor yoki sonni bildiradi.
words.example1: I have some friends.
words.example2: She bought some apples.
words.example2Translation: U bir oz olma sotib oldi.
words.example3: Some students are late.
extraExamples: Some people like tea.
Give me some water.
I read some books.
Some days are better.
She has some money.
Some of them are here.
I want some help.

words.definition: Used to refer to one or more of something without specifying which.
words.definitionUz: Har qanday / Biror — biror narsaning bir yoki bir nechasini aniqlamasdan bildiradi.
words.example1: Do you have any questions?
words.example2: I don't have any money.
words.example3: You can take any book.
words.example3Translation: Siz har qanday kitobni olishingiz mumkin.
extraExamples: Any help is welcome.
Is there any food?
She doesn't like any of them.
Any student can join.
Do you need any help?
I can't see any stars.
Any time is fine.
extraExampleTranslations: Har qanday yordam mamnuniyat bilan qabul qilinadi.

words.definition: A small number of something.
words.definitionUz: Bir necha / Ozgina — kichik sonni bildiradi.
words.example1: I have few friends.
words.example2: Few people know the secret.
words.example3: She made few mistakes.
extraExamples: Few students passed.
There are few apples left.
He has few opportunities.
Few books are interesting.
We have few problems.
Few people came.
She eats few sweets.

words.definition: A large number of something.
words.definitionUz: Ko'p — katta sonni bildiradi.
words.example1: Many students like sports.
words.example2: I have many books.
words.example3: Many people visit this place.
words.example3Translation: Ko'p odam bu joyga tashrif buyuradi.
extraExamples: Many friends came.
There are many stars.
She has many ideas.
Many countries celebrate it.
I saw many birds.
Many problems were solved.
He knows many languages.

words.definition: A large amount or degree of something (used with uncountable nouns).
words.definitionUz: Ko'p (miqdor) — katta miqdorni bildiradi (sanoqsiz otlar bilan ishlatiladi).
words.example1: I don't have much time.
words.example2: She doesn't eat much sugar.
words.example3: How much money do you need?
extraExamples: There is not much water.
He doesn't talk much.
She knows much about history.
We don't have much food.
How much is it?
I learned much today.
There isn't much left.

words.definition: A greater amount or number of something.
words.definitionUz: Ko'proq — biror narsaning kattaroq miqdori yoki soni.
words.example1: I want more water.
words.example2: She needs more time.
words.example3: There are more students today.
extraExamples: More people came.
I need more help.
She wants more books.
We need more practice.
There is more food.
He knows more than me.
Give me more please.

words.definition: The greatest in amount, quantity, or degree; nearly all.
words.definitionUz: Most — bu miqdor, son yoki daraja jihatidan eng katta qismini bildiradi, ya’ni ko‘pchilik yoki deyarli hammasi.
words.example1: Most people prefer spending time with family on weekends.
words.example1Translation: Ko‘pchilik odamlar dam olish kunlarini oilasi bilan o‘tkazishni afzal ko‘radi.
words.example2: She spends most of her free time reading books.
words.example2Translation: U bo‘sh vaqtining ko‘p qismini kitob o‘qish bilan o‘tkazadi.
words.example3: Most of the tickets were sold out within an hour.
words.example3Translation: Chiptalarning ko‘p qismi bir soat ichida tugab qoldi.
extraExamples: Most students passed the exam with good scores.
In most cases, it’s better to arrive early.
Most of the work is already finished.
Most cars on the road today use fuel efficiently.
She knows most of the people at the party.
Most fruits are rich in vitamins.
We visit our grandparents most weekends.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘pchilik o‘quvchilar imtihondan yaxshi baho oldi.
Yo‘ldagi mashinalarning ko‘pi yoqilg‘ini tejab ishlatadi.
Biz bobomiz va buvimiznikiga ko‘pincha dam olish kunlarida boramiz.

words.definition: Different or distinct from the one or ones already mentioned or known.
words.definitionUz: Other — avval aytib o‘tilgan yoki ma’lum bo‘lganlardan farqli yoki boshqa narsalarni bildiradi.
words.example1: I like this shirt, but I prefer the other one.
words.example1Translation: Bu ko‘ylak menga yoqadi, lekin boshqasini afzal ko‘raman.
words.example2: Some people love coffee while others prefer tea.
words.example2Translation: Ba’zilar qahvani yaxshi ko‘radi, boshqalari esa choyni afzal ko‘radi.
words.example3: We can discuss this at another time.
words.example3Translation: Buni boshqa vaqtda muhokama qilishimiz mumkin.
extraExamples: The other students are waiting outside.
There are many other options to consider.
One team won, the other lost.
She lives on the other side of the city.
Other countries have different traditions.
I’ll take the other road today.
Many other people feel the same way.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘rib chiqish uchun yana ko‘p boshqa variantlar bor.
Bitta jamoa g‘alaba qozondi, ikkinchisi yutqazdi.
Ko‘p boshqa odamlar ham xuddi shunday his qilishadi.

words.definition: An additional or different person or thing of the same type.
words.definitionUz: Another — bir xil turdagi qo‘shimcha yoki boshqa bir odam yoki narsani bildiradi.
words.example1: Would you like another cup of coffee?
words.example2: We need another solution to this problem.
words.example2Translation: Bu muammoni hal qilish uchun yana bir yechim kerak.
words.example3: She bought another dress for the party.
words.example3Translation: U ziyofat uchun yana bir ko‘ylak sotib oldi.
extraExamples: Let’s try another restaurant next time.
I have another idea that might work.
He asked for another chance.
There is another way to get there.
She wants to visit another country this year.
Can I have another piece of cake?
We’ll need another meeting to finish the plan.
extraExampleTranslations: Keyingi safar boshqa restoranda sinab ko‘ramiz.
Menda ishlaydigan yana bir fikr bor.
U yerga borishning yana bir yo‘li bor.
U bu yil boshqa mamlakatga borishni xohlaydi.
Yana bir bo‘lak tort olsam bo‘ladimi?
Rejani tugatish uchun yana bir uchrashuv o‘tkazishimiz kerak.

words.definition: The number 0; nothing or none.
words.definitionUz: Zero — 0 raqamini bildiradi, ya’ni hech narsa yoki yo‘qlikni anglatadi.
words.example1: The temperature dropped to zero degrees last night.
words.example1Translation: Kecha tunda harorat nol darajagacha tushdi.
words.example2: There is zero chance of rain tomorrow.
words.example2Translation: Ertaga yomg‘ir yog‘ishi ehtimoli nolga teng.
words.example3: His bank account balance is almost zero.
words.example3Translation: Uning bank hisobidagi qoldiq deyarli nol.
extraExamples: The team scored zero goals in the first half.
Please set the counter back to zero.
Zero tolerance for cheating in exams.
She showed zero interest in the topic.
The risk is close to zero with proper safety measures.
We start counting from zero again.
His knowledge of the subject is basically zero.
extraExampleTranslations: Jamoa birinchi bo‘limda nol gol urdi.
To‘g‘ri xavfsizlik choralar bilan xavf deyarli nol.
Uning bu mavzudagi bilimi deyarli nol.

words.definition: The number 1; a single unit or person.
words.definitionUz: One — 1 raqamini bildiradi, ya’ni bitta birlik yoki odamni anglatadi.
words.example1: One person can make a big difference.
words.example1Translation: Bitta odam katta farq yaratishi mumkin.
words.example2: She bought one ticket for the concert.
words.example2Translation: U kontsertga bitta chipta sotib oldi.
words.example3: One of my friends lives in New York.
extraExamples: I need one more minute to finish.
One apple a day keeps the doctor away.
She is one of the best students in class.
We’ll meet at one o’clock.
One reason for his success is hard work.
Only one person answered the question.
He gave her one red rose.
extraExampleTranslations: Tugatish uchun yana bir daqiqa kerak.
U sinfdagi eng yaxshi o‘quvchilardan biri.
Uning muvaffaqiyatining bir sababi — qattiq mehnat.
Faqat bitta odam savolga javob berdi.
U unga bitta qizil atirgul berdi.

words.definition: The number 2; one more than one.
words.definitionUz: Two — 2 raqamini bildiradi, ya’ni bittadan bittaga ko‘p.
words.example1: There are two chairs in the room.
words.example2: I have two brothers and one sister.
words.example2Translation: Mening ikkita ukam va bitta singlim bor.
words.example3: They arrived two hours late.
extraExamples: Two heads are better than one.
She bought two new dresses.
We need two more volunteers.
The meeting starts in two minutes.
Two of the students were absent.
I’ll take the two biggest ones.
They live two blocks away.
extraExampleTranslations: U ikkita yangi ko‘ylak sotib oldi.

The teenager studies hard.

My son is a teenager now.
Teenagers face many challenges.
The teenagers are friends.
Teenagers dream about the future.

words.definition: A person who is fully grown and mature.
words.definitionUz: Katta yoshli – to'liq o'sgan va yetuk shaxs.
words.example1: Adults must work to earn money.
words.example1Translation: Katta yoshlilar pul topish uchun ishlashi kerak.
words.example2: The adult helped the child.
words.example3: She became an adult at 18.
extraExamples: Adults make important decisions.
The course is for adults.
Many adults go to university.
The adult is responsible.
Children become adults.
Adults need rest too.
The meeting is for adults only.
extraExampleTranslations: Katta yoshlilar muhim qarorlar qabul qilishadi.
Katta yoshlilar ham dam olishga muhtoj.

words.definition: A male child.
words.definitionUz: O'g'il bola – erkak jinsdagi bola.
words.example1: The boy is playing football.
words.example2: She has a little boy.
words.example3: The boy is smart.
extraExamples: The boy runs fast.
A boy and a girl are friends.
The boy reads books.
My son is a good boy.
The boy laughed loudly.
Boys like cars.
The boy helps his father.

words.definition: A female child.
words.definitionUz: Qiz bola – ayol jinsdagi bola.
words.example1: The girl is singing.
words.example2: She is a clever girl.
words.example3: The girl has long hair.
extraExamples: The girl plays with dolls.
A girl smiled at me.
The girl studies well.
My daughter is a beautiful girl.
The girl draws pictures.
Girls like flowers.
The girl helps her mother.

words.definition: An adult male person.
words.definitionUz: Erkak – katta yoshli erkak shaxs.
words.example1: The man is driving a car.
words.example2: He is a good man.
words.example3: The man works in an office.
extraExamples: A man helped the old woman.
The man is tall and strong.
Many men like sports.
The man is my neighbor.
He became a successful man.
The man is reading a newspaper.
Good men are honest.

words.definition: An adult female person.
words.definitionUz: Ayol – katta yoshli ayol shaxs.
words.example1: The woman is a teacher.
words.example2: She is a strong woman.
words.example3: The woman is cooking.
extraExamples: A woman smiled at the baby.
The woman works hard.
Many women are leaders.
The woman is my doctor.
She is a beautiful woman.
The woman reads a book.
Women have many talents.

words.definition: A human being.
words.definitionUz: Shaxs – inson.
words.example1: Every person is different.
words.example2: She is a nice person.
words.example3: The person at the door is my friend.
extraExamples: A person called me.
That person is famous.
Every person has rights.
The person smiled.
I met a kind person.
The person works in a bank.
Help the person in need.

words.definition: More than one person; humans in general.
words.definitionUz: Odamlar – bir necha shaxs; umuman insonlar.
words.example1: Many people like tea.
words.example2: The people in the city are friendly.
words.example3: People need water to live.
extraExamples: People are different.
Young people like music.
The people voted.
Many people work here.
People help each other.
The people are happy.
Old people need care.

words.definition: A group of people who are related to each other.
words.definitionUz: Oilasi – bir-biri bilan qarindosh bo'lgan odamlar guruhi.
words.example1: My family is big.
words.example2: We had a family dinner.
words.example3: Family is important.
extraExamples: The family went on vacation.
She loves her family.
Family photos are on the wall.
A big family reunion.
Family helps in difficult times.
His family lives in Samarkand.
Happy family life.

words.definition: A person you know well and like.
words.definitionUz: Do'st – siz yaxshi biladigan va yoqtiradigan shaxs.
words.example1: He is my best friend.
words.example2: My friend called me.
words.example3: Friends help each other.
extraExamples: I met a new friend.
She has many friends.
True friends are rare.
The friends played together.
My friend lives nearby.
Friends share secrets.
Old friends are the best.

words.definition: A person who lives near you.
words.definitionUz: Qo'shni – sizga yaqin yashaydigan shaxs.
words.example1: My neighbor is friendly.
words.example2: The neighbors helped us.
words.example3: She visits her neighbor often.
extraExamples: Good neighbors are important.
The neighbor has a big dog.
We borrow sugar from our neighbor.
The new neighbor moved in.
Neighbors talk in the yard.
My neighbor is a teacher.
Help your neighbor.

words.definition: A person you do an activity with, or your husband/wife.
words.definitionUz: Hamkor – biror ishni birga qiladigan shaxs yoki er/xotingiz.
words.example1: My business partner is honest.
words.example2: She danced with her partner.
words.example3: He is my life partner.
extraExamples: The partners worked together.
Find a good partner.
My tennis partner is strong.
Partners share responsibilities.
She introduced her partner.
Business partners meet often.
A good partner supports you.

words.definition: A person who visits your home or attends an event.
words.definitionUz: Mehmon – uyga tashrif buyuradigan yoki tadbirga keladigan shaxs.
words.example1: We have a guest today.
words.example2: The guests enjoyed the party.
words.example3: She welcomed the guests.
extraExamples: The guest arrived early.
Special guest on the show.
Offer the guest some tea.
Many guests came to the wedding.
The hotel has many guests.
Guest speaker gave a talk.
Treat guests with respect.

words.definition: The top part of the body that contains the brain and face.
words.definitionUz: Bosh – tananing yuqori qismi, unda miya va yuz joylashgan.
words.example1: She has a headache.
words.example2: He nodded his head.
words.example3: Wash your head with shampoo.
extraExamples: The head is important.
She turned her head.
He hit his head.
The leader is the head of the team.
Use your head to think.
The baby has a big head.
Cover your head in the sun.

words.definition: The front part of the head with eyes, nose, and mouth.
words.definitionUz: Yuz – ko'z, burun va og'iz joylashgan boshning old qismi.
words.example1: She has a beautiful face.
words.example2: Wash your face every morning.
words.example3: He smiled with his face.
extraExamples: Her face turned red.
Look at my face.
The face in the mirror.
He covered his face.
A happy face.
The child has a round face.
Recognize the face.

words.definition: The part of the face used for seeing.
words.definitionUz: Ko'z – ko'rish uchun ishlatiladigan yuz qismi.
words.example1: She has blue eyes.
words.example2: Close your eyes.
words.example3: His eyes are brown.
extraExamples: Open your eyes.
The baby has big eyes.
She cried with tears in her eyes.
Eye contact is important.
Protect your eyes from the sun.
He has sharp eyes.
Beautiful eyes.

words.definition: The part of the face used for breathing and smelling.
words.definitionUz: Burun – nafas olish va hid bilish uchun ishlatiladigan yuz qismi.
words.example1: He has a big nose.
words.example2: Blow your nose.
words.example3: The dog has a good nose.
extraExamples: Touch your nose.
She has a small nose.
My nose is cold.
The smell goes through the nose.
He broke his nose.
A long nose.
The baby's nose is cute.

words.definition: The opening in the face used for eating and speaking.
words.definitionUz: Og'iz – ovqat yeyish va gapirish uchun yuzdagi ochiq joy.
words.example1: Open your mouth.
words.example2: She has a beautiful smile on her mouth.
words.example3: Food goes into the mouth.
extraExamples: Wash your mouth after eating.
The child put food in his mouth.
Speak clearly with your mouth.
Her mouth is small.
Close your mouth please.
The mouth is used for talking.
A big mouth.

words.definition: The organ of the body used for hearing.
words.definitionUz: Quloq — bu insonning eshitish organi.
words.example1: She whispered something in his ear during the meeting.
words.example1Translation: U yig'ilish vaqtida uning qulog'iga nimadir pichirladi.
words.example2: Loud music can damage your ears over time.
words.example2Translation: Baland musiqa vaqt o'tib quloqlaringizga zarar yetkazishi mumkin.
words.example3: He has an ear for music and plays several instruments.
words.example3Translation: U musiqani yaxshi his qiladi va bir necha cholg'u asboblarida chaladi.
extraExamples: The doctor examined her ear because she had an earache.
Children often put small objects in their ears.
He turned a deaf ear to all the criticism.
She wears earrings in both ears.
Protect your ears from cold weather in winter.
The rabbit has very long ears to hear danger.
Listening carefully requires full use of your ears.
extraExampleTranslations: Shifokor uning qulog'ini tekshirdi, chunki qulog'i og'riyapti.
Bolalar ko'pincha quloqlariga kichik narsalarni solib qo'yishadi.
Quyonning xavfni eshitish uchun juda uzun quloqlari bor.
Diqqat bilan tinglash uchun quloqlardan to'liq foydalanish kerak.

words.definition: One of the hard white structures in the mouth used for biting and chewing food.
words.definitionUz: Tish — og'izdagi ovqatni tishlash va chaynash uchun xizmat qiladigan qattiq oq struktura.
words.example1: Brush your teeth twice a day to keep them healthy.
words.example1Translation: Tishlaringizni sog'lom saqlash uchun kuniga ikki marta yuvib turing.
words.example2: He lost a tooth after falling off his bicycle.
words.example2Translation: Velosipeddan yiqilgandan keyin uning bir tishi tushib qoldi.
words.example3: The dentist filled the cavity in her tooth.
words.example3Translation: Tish shifokori uning tishidagi teshikni plomba qildi.
extraExamples: Baby teeth usually start falling out around age six.
He has a sweet tooth and loves chocolate.
Wisdom teeth often cause pain when they grow.
She smiled, showing her white teeth.
Taking care of your teeth prevents bad breath.
The lion has sharp teeth for hunting.
He had braces on his teeth for two years.
extraExampleTranslations: Sut tishlari odatda olti yosh atrofida tusha boshlaydi.
U shirinlikni yaxshi ko'radi va shokoladni yaxshi ko'radi.
Donolik tishlari o'sganda ko'pincha og'riq beradi.
U tabassum qilib, oppoq tishlarini ko'rsatdi.
Tishlarga g'amxo'rlik qilish yomon hidning oldini oladi.
Sherda ov qilish uchun o'tkir tishlar bor.
U ikki yil davomida tishlariga breket taqqan.

words.definition: The soft movable part in the mouth used for tasting, speaking, and swallowing.
words.definitionUz: Til — og'iz ichidagi ta'm bilish, gapirish va yutishda yordam beradigan yumshoq harakatlanuvchi a'zo.
words.example1: Stick out your tongue and say "ah" for the doctor.
words.example1Translation: Shifokor uchun tilingizni chiqaring va "aah" deb ayting.
words.example2: Bitter food made her tongue tingle.
words.example3: She has a sharp tongue and often says things directly.
words.example3Translation: U o'tkir tilga ega va ko'pincha gaplarini to'g'ridan-to'g'ri aytadi.
extraExamples: The dog panted with its tongue hanging out.
Learning new languages improves control of your tongue.
He bit his tongue to avoid saying something rude.
The doctor checked her tongue for signs of illness.
Mother tongue is the first language a child learns.
Her tongue got burned by hot soup.
Speaking multiple languages requires a flexible tongue.
extraExampleTranslations: It qulog'ini osilib, tilini chiqarib nafas oldi.
Yangi tillarni o'rganish tilingizni boshqarishni yaxshilaydi.
U qo'pollik qilmaslik uchun tilini tishlab oldi.
Shifokor kasallik belgilari bor-yo'qligini bilish uchun uning tilini ko'rdi.
Ona tili — bola birinchi o'rganadigan til.
Uning tili issiq sho'rvadan kuyib qoldi.
Bir necha tilda gapirish uchun moslashuvchan til kerak.

words.definition: The thin strands that grow on the head and body of humans and animals.
words.definitionUz: Soch — inson va hayvonlarning boshida va tanasida o'sadigan ingichka tolalar.
words.example1: She has long black hair that reaches her waist.
words.example1Translation: Uning beligacha yetadigan uzun qora sochlari bor.
words.example2: He decided to dye his hair blond for a new look.
words.example2Translation: U yangi ko'rinish uchun sochlarini sarg'ish rangga bo'yadi.
words.example3: Regular exercise and good nutrition help keep your hair healthy.
words.example3Translation: Muntazam sport va to'g'ri ovqatlanish sochlaringizni sog'lom saqlashga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: She brushes her hair every morning.
Many men start losing hair after age thirty.
The wind blew her hair across her face.
She tied her hair in a ponytail.
Gray hair is a natural part of getting older.
He got a haircut at the barber shop.
Curly hair requires special care and products.
extraExampleTranslations: U har kuni ertalab sochlarini taraydi.
Ko'p erkaklar o'ttiz yoshdan keyin soch to'kilishini boshlaydi.
Shamol uning sochlarini yuziga uchirib yubordi.
Jingalak soch maxsus parvarish va vositalarni talab qiladi.

words.definition: The part of the body that connects the head to the shoulders.
words.definitionUz: Bo'yin — boshni yelkalarga bog'lab turadigan tananing qismi.
words.example1: She wore a beautiful necklace around her neck.
words.example2: He injured his neck in a car accident.
words.example3: Stretching your neck regularly can reduce stiffness.
extraExamples: The giraffe has a very long neck.
She hugged him tightly around the neck.
He has a stiff neck after sleeping in a bad position.
The scarf protected her neck from the cold.
The lion has a thick, powerful neck.
She felt pain in her neck after working at the computer all day.
He broke his neck while playing football.
extraExampleTranslations: Yomon holatda uxlaganidan keyin uning bo'yni qotib qoldi.
Kompyuter oldida kun bo'yi ishlagandan keyin bo'ynida og'riq sezdi.

words.definition: The part of the body where the arm connects to the body.
words.definitionUz: Yelka — qo'l tananing yuqori qismiga birikadigan joy.
words.example1: He carried the heavy bag on his shoulder.
words.example2: She tapped him on the shoulder to get his attention.
words.example2Translation: U uning e'tiborini tortish uchun yelkasiga qoqdi.
words.example3: Swimming is good exercise for your shoulders.
extraExamples: She has broad shoulders from years of swimming.
He shrugged his shoulders when he didn’t know the answer.
The football player injured his shoulder during the match.
She rested her head on his shoulder.
Cold weather makes my shoulders feel stiff.
The responsibility fell on her shoulders.
He put his arm around her shoulder.
extraExampleTranslations: Yillar davomida suzganligi uchun uning yelkalari keng.

words.definition: The part of the body from the shoulder to the hand.
words.definitionUz: Qo'l — yelkadан boshlab qo'l kaftigacha bo'lgan tananing qismi.
words.example1: She broke her arm while skiing.
words.example2: He raised his arm to ask a question.
words.example2Translation: U savol berish uchun qo'lini ko'tardi.
words.example3: Regular exercise strengthens your arms.
extraExamples: She carried the baby in her arms.
The doctor put a cast on his broken arm.
He crossed his arms and looked serious.
The monkey swung from branch to branch using its arms.
She has strong arms from lifting weights.
He offered her his arm to help her walk.
The sleeves of the shirt were too long for his arms.
extraExampleTranslations: Shifokor uning singan qo'liga gips qo'ydi.
U qo'llarini ko'kragiga bog'lab jiddiy ko'rinish oldi.
Maymun qo'llari bilan shoxdan shoxga o'tib yurdi.
Og'irlik ko'tarish tufayli uning qo'llari kuchli.
U unga yordam berish uchun qo'lini uzatdi.
Ko'ylakning yenglari uning qo'llari uchun juda uzun edi.

words.definition: The part of the body at the end of the arm, used for holding and touching things.
words.definitionUz: Qo'l — qo'lning oxirgi qismi bo'lib, narsalarni ushlash va tegizish uchun ishlatiladi.
words.example1: She shook hands with everyone at the party.
words.example1Translation: U ziyofatdagi hamma bilan qo'l berib ko'rishdi.
words.example2: Wash your hands before eating.
words.example3: He held her hand as they walked along the beach.
words.example3Translation: Ular plyaj bo'ylab yurishayotganda u uning qo'lidan ushlab oldi.
extraExamples: The artist painted with great skill in his hands.
She raised her hand to answer the question.
He clapped his hands in excitement.
The baby grabbed my finger with his tiny hand.
She has very steady hands when doing delicate work.
Give me a hand with this heavy box.
His hands were dirty from working in the garden.
extraExampleTranslations: Rassom qo'llari bilan katta mahorat bilan rasm chizdi.
U savolga javob berish uchun qo'lini ko'tardi.
Chaqaloq mening barmog'imni kichkina qo'li bilan ushlab oldi.
Nozik ish qilganda uning qo'llari juda barqaror.
Bu og'ir qutini ko'tarishda menga yordam bering.
Bog'da ishlagani uchun uning qo'llari iflos edi.

words.definition: One of the five long parts at the end of the hand.
words.definitionUz: Barmoq — qo'lning oxiridagi beshta uzun qismlardan biri.
words.example1: She wears a diamond ring on her finger.
words.example2: He pointed his finger at the map to show the location.
words.example2Translation: U xaritada joyni ko'rsatish uchun barmog'ini cho'zdi.
words.example3: The child counted on his fingers.
extraExamples: She burned her finger while cooking.
He has long, slender fingers perfect for playing piano.
Keep your fingers away from the door.
The thief left fingerprints at the crime scene.
She snapped her fingers to get attention.
He accidentally cut his finger with a knife.
Rings are usually worn on the ring finger.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning uzun va ingichka barmoqlari pianino chalish uchun juda mos.
O'g'ri jinoyat joyida barmoq izlarini qoldirdi.
U diqqatni jalb qilish uchun barmoqlarini qarsak chaldi.
U tasodifan pichoq bilan barmog'ini kesib oldi.

words.definition: One of the two limbs on which a person or animal walks and stands.
words.definitionUz: Oyoq — odam yoki hayvon yuradigan va turgan ikki a'zolardan biri.
words.example1: He broke his leg playing football.
words.example2: She runs every morning to strengthen her legs.
words.example2Translation: U har kuni ertalab oyoqlarini kuchaytirish uchun yuguradi.
words.example3: The table has four strong legs.
extraExamples: He crossed his legs while sitting.
She has long, beautiful legs.
The horse injured its front leg.
After the long flight, my legs felt stiff.
He stood on one leg to test his balance.
Cycling is excellent exercise for the legs.
The pants were too short for his long legs.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning uzun va chiroyli oyoqlari bor.
Uzoq parvozdan keyin oyoqlarim qotib qoldi.
U muvozanatini tekshirish uchun bir oyoqda turdi.
Velosiped haydash oyoqlar uchun ajoyib mashq.
Shim uning uzun oyoqlari uchun juda kalta edi.

words.definition: The joint in the middle of the leg where it bends.
words.definitionUz: Tizza — oyoqning o'rtasidagi bukiladigan bo'g'im.
words.example1: She fell and hurt her knee.
words.example2: He knelt on one knee to propose marriage.
words.example2Translation: U turmushga chiqishni taklif qilish uchun bir tizzasiga tiz cho'kdi.
words.example3: Knee pain is common among older people.
words.example3Translation: Tizza og'rig'i keksa odamlar orasida keng tarqalgan.
extraExamples: The football player had surgery on his knee.
She wore knee pads for protection while skating.
He has a scar on his knee from childhood.
Bending your knees properly helps prevent injury.
The child sat on his mother’s knee.
Arthritis often affects the knees.
She felt weak in the knees from nervousness.
extraExampleTranslations: U konkida uchayotganda himoya uchun tizza qopqog'ini taqdi.
Tizzalarni to'g'ri bukish jarohatning oldini oladi.

words.definition: The part of the body at the end of the leg on which a person stands.
words.definitionUz: Oyoq — odam turgan oyoqning pastki qismi.
words.example1: My feet hurt after walking all day.
words.example2: She put on her shoes and socks on her feet.
words.example2Translation: U oyoqlariga paypoq va tuflini kiyib oldi.
words.example3: He stepped on my foot by accident.
words.example3Translation: U tasodifan mening oyog'imga bosib qoldi.
extraExamples: She has small, delicate feet.
The baby took her first steps on her tiny feet.
He kicked the ball with the side of his foot.
Cold feet can be a sign of poor circulation.
She dances gracefully on her feet.
The hiker got blisters on his feet.
Put your best foot forward in the job interview.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning kichkina va nozik oyoqlari bor.
Chaqaloq kichkina oyoqlari bilan birinchi qadamlarini tashladi.
U to'pni oyog'ining yon tomoni bilan tepdi.
Sovuq oyoqlar qon aylanishining yomonligidan dalolat berishi mumkin.
U oyoqlari bilan nafis raqs tushadi.
Ish suhbatida o'zingizning eng yaxshi tomonlaringizni ko'rsating.

words.definition: The rear part of the body from the shoulders to the hips.
words.definitionUz: Orqa — yelkalardan dumbagacha bo'lgan tananing orqa qismi.
words.example1: He carried the heavy backpack on his back.
words.example2: She has back pain from sitting too long.
words.example2Translation: Uzoq vaqt o'tirgani uchun uning orqasi og'riydi.
words.example3: The cat arched its back when it saw the dog.
extraExamples: He turned his back on his old friends.
She lay on her back looking at the stars.
Good posture helps prevent back problems.
The book fell behind the back of the sofa.
He has a strong back from working out.
She patted him on the back for his success.
The house is at the back of the garden.
extraExampleTranslations: To'g'ri holat orqa muammolarining oldini oladi.
Kitob divanning orqa tomoniga tushib qoldi.
Mashq qilgani uchun uning orqasi kuchli.
U muvaffaqiyati uchun uning orqasiga qoqib qo'ydi.

words.definition: The front part of the body between the neck and the stomach.
words.definitionUz: Ko'krak — bo'yin va qorin o'rtasidagi tananing oldingi qismi.
words.example1: He felt pain in his chest after running.
words.example1Translation: Yugurgandan keyin uning ko'kragida og'riq sezdi.
words.example2: She crossed her arms over her chest.
words.example3: Deep breathing expands your chest.
extraExamples: The medal was pinned on his chest.
He has a broad, muscular chest.
Chest pain can be a serious symptom.
The bird has a bright red chest.
She hugged the pillow to her chest.
Weight training builds chest muscles.
The treasure chest was full of gold.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning keng va mushakli ko'kragi bor.
Ko'krak og'rig'i jiddiy alomat bo'lishi mumkin.
Og'irlik bilan mashq qilish ko'krak mushaklarini oshiradi.
Xazina sandig'i oltin bilan to'la edi.

words.definition: The organ in the body where food is digested.
words.definitionUz: Oshqozon — ovqat hazm bo'ladigan ichki organ.
words.example1: I have a stomach ache after eating too much.
words.example2: She rubbed her stomach because she was hungry.
words.example2Translation: U och qolgani uchun oshqozonini ishqaladi.
words.example3: Exercise helps strengthen your stomach muscles.
extraExamples: Butterflies in my stomach before the exam.
He has a flat stomach from regular exercise.
The medicine is for an upset stomach.
She lay on her stomach to get a tan.
Stress can cause stomach problems.
The baby has a round stomach after feeding.
He punched him in the stomach during the fight.
extraExampleTranslations: Muntazam mashq tufayli uning oshqozoni tekis.
Quyoshda qorayish uchun u qorniga yotdi.
Stress oshqozon muammolariga sabab bo'lishi mumkin.
U jangda uning qorniga musht tushirdi.

words.definition: The outer layer of the body that covers and protects it.
words.definitionUz: Teri — tanani qoplaydigan va himoya qiladigan tashqi qatlam.
words.example1: She has smooth, fair skin.
words.example1Translation: Uning silliq va oq terisi bor.
words.example2: Apply sunscreen to protect your skin from the sun.
words.example2Translation: Quyoshdan terini himoya qilish uchun quyosh kremi surting.
words.example3: Dry skin needs moisturizer every day.
words.example3Translation: Quruq teri har kuni namlovchi kremni talab qiladi.
extraExamples: He has dark skin.
The snake sheds its skin once a year.
Skin cancer can be prevented by avoiding too much sun.
She has sensitive skin and uses special products.
The cold wind made her skin feel tight.
Bananas are good for your skin.
He got a tattoo on his skin.
extraExampleTranslations: Ilon yiliga bir marta terisini tashlaydi.
Ko'p quyoshga chiqmaslik teri saratonining oldini oladi.
Uning sezgir terisi bor va maxsus vositalardan foydalanadi.
Sovuq shamol uning terisini tortib qo'ydi.

words.definition: The red liquid that flows through the body carrying oxygen and nutrients.
words.definitionUz: Qon — tanada kislorod va ozuqa moddalarini olib yuradigan qizil suyuqlik.
words.example1: He donated blood at the hospital.
words.example2: She cut her finger and blood came out.
words.example2Translation: U barmog'ini kesib qo'ydi va qon chiqdi.
words.example3: High blood pressure can lead to serious health problems.
words.example3Translation: Yuqori qon bosimi jiddiy sog'liq muammolariga olib keladi.
extraExamples: Blood tests are important for checking health.
The heart pumps blood around the body.
She has type O blood.
Seeing blood makes him feel faint.
Blood circulates oxygen to all organs.
The accident victim lost a lot of blood.
They are blood brothers.
extraExampleTranslations: Qon tahlillari sog'liqni tekshirish uchun muhim.
Qon barcha a'zolarga kislorod yetkazib beradi.
Baxtsiz hodisa qurboni ko'p qon yo'qotdi.

words.definition: The hard material that makes up the skeleton of the body.
words.definitionUz: Suyak — tananing skeletini tashkil etuvchi qattiq material.
words.example1: He broke a bone in his leg.
words.example2: Dogs love to chew on bones.
words.example3: Calcium is important for strong bones.
extraExamples: The doctor took an X-ray of the broken bone.
She has thin bones and needs to be careful.
Fish bones can be dangerous if swallowed.
The skeleton consists of many bones.
He has a bone to pick with his colleague.
Old people are at higher risk of bone fractures.
The archaeologists found ancient animal bones.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning suyaklari nozik va ehtiyot bo'lishi kerak.
Baliq suyaklari yutib yuborilsa xavfli bo'lishi mumkin.
Keksa odamlar suyak sinishi xavfi yuqori.

words.definition: The organ that pumps blood around the body.
words.definitionUz: Yurak — tanada qonni aylantirib turadigan organ.
words.example1: Exercise is good for your heart.
words.example2: She has a kind heart and helps everyone.
words.example2Translation: U mehribon yurakka ega va hammaga yordam beradi.
words.example3: His heart beats faster when he sees her.
words.example3Translation: Uni ko'rganda uning yuragi tezroq uradi.
extraExamples: The doctor listened to her heart.
He broke her heart when he left.
She wears a heart-shaped pendant.
Regular check-ups are important for heart health.
The news made my heart sink.
He has a weak heart.
They sang from the bottom of their hearts.
extraExampleTranslations: Yurak salomatligi uchun muntazam tekshiruv muhim.

words.definition: The condition of a person’s body and mind being free from illness.
words.definitionUz: Sog'liq — odamning tanasi va ruhining kasalliksiz holati.
words.example1: Good health is more important than wealth.
words.example2: She takes care of her health by eating vegetables.
words.example2Translation: U sabzavot yeyish orqali sog'lig'iga g'amxo'rlik qiladi.
words.example3: Regular exercise improves both physical and mental health.
words.example3Translation: Muntazam mashqlar jismoniy va ruhiy sog'liqni yaxshilaydi.
extraExamples: Public health is a major concern for governments.
He is in poor health after the illness.
Mental health is as important as physical health.
She wishes you good health and happiness.
The doctor checked his overall health.
Smoking damages your health.
Health insurance is very important.
extraExampleTranslations: Aholi sog'lig'i hukumatlar uchun muhim masala.
Ruhiy sog'liq jismoniy sog'liq kabi muhim.
U sizga sog'liq va baxt tilaydi.

words.definition: An unpleasant physical or emotional feeling.
words.definitionUz: Og'riq — jismoniy yoki ruhiy jihatdan yoqimsiz his.
words.example1: I have a sharp pain in my back.
words.example2: She cried from the pain after the injury.
words.example3: The medicine helped reduce the pain.
extraExamples: He is in pain after the operation.
Emotional pain can be harder than physical pain.
She has chronic pain in her knees.
The dentist gave him something for the pain.
He hid his pain behind a smile.
Stomach pain can be caused by stress.
Time heals all pain.
extraExampleTranslations: Ruhiy og'riq jismoniydan qiyinroq bo'lishi mumkin.
Tish shifokori unga og'riq uchun dori berdi.
Oshqozon og'rig'i stressdan kelib chiqishi mumkin.

words.definition: A continuous pain in the head.
words.definitionUz: Bosh og'rig'i — boshda davom etadigan og'riq.
words.example1: I have a terrible headache today.
words.example2: Too much screen time can cause headaches.
words.example2Translation: Ko'p vaqt ekran oldida bo'lish bosh og'rig'iga olib keladi.
words.example3: She took medicine for her headache.
words.example3Translation: U bosh og'rig'i uchun dori ichdi.
extraExamples: Stress often gives me headaches.
She gets migraines, which are severe headaches.
Fresh air helped relieve her headache.
He complained of a headache all morning.
Drinking enough water can prevent headaches.
The loud music gave everyone a headache.
She lay down in a dark room to ease the headache.
extraExampleTranslations: Stress ko'pincha bosh og'rig'ini keltirib chiqaradi.
U migren kasalligiga chalingan, bu juda kuchli bosh og'rig'i.
Toza havo uning bosh og'rig'ini yengillashtirdi.
U ertalabdan bosh og'rig'idan shikoyat qildi.
Yetarlicha suv ichish bosh og'rig'ining oldini oladi.
Baland musiqa hammaga bosh og'rig'ini berdi.
U bosh og'rig'ini yengillashtirish uchun qorong'i xonada yotdi.

words.definition: A common illness that affects the nose and throat.
words.definitionUz: Shamollash — burun va tomoqqa ta'sir qiladigan oddiy kasallik.
words.example1: I caught a cold after walking in the rain.
words.example2: She has a cold and is staying home today.
words.example2Translation: U shamollagan va bugun uyda qoldi.
words.example3: Drink hot tea with honey when you have a cold.
extraExamples: Cover your mouth when you cough because of a cold.
The common cold usually lasts about a week.
He has a runny nose from his cold.
Vitamins can help prevent colds.
She is suffering from a bad cold.
Kids catch colds easily at school.
Rest is the best medicine for a cold.
extraExampleTranslations: Oddiy shamollash odatda bir hafta davom etadi.
U shamollagani uchun burnidan suv oqmoqda.
Vitaminlar shamollashning oldini olishga yordam beradi.
Dam olish shamollash uchun eng yaxshi dori.

words.definition: A contagious viral illness that causes fever, body aches, and tiredness.
words.definitionUz: Grip — isitma, tanada og'riq va charchoqqa olib keladigan yuqumli virusli kasallik.
words.example1: He got the flu and had to stay in bed for days.
words.example1Translation: U grip bo'lib, bir necha kun yotoqda yotdi.
words.example2: Getting a flu vaccine every year is recommended.
words.example2Translation: Har yili gripga qarshi emlanish tavsiya etiladi.
words.example3: The flu spreads quickly in winter.
extraExamples: Symptoms of the flu are usually more severe than a cold.
She is recovering from the flu.
Many people get the flu each season.
The doctor prescribed medicine for the flu.
Flu can lead to serious complications in older people.
Wash your hands to avoid catching the flu.
He missed work because of the flu.
extraExampleTranslations: Grip alomatlari odatda shamollashdan kuchliroq bo'ladi.
Har mavsumda ko'p odamlar gripga chalinadi.
Shifokor grip uchun dori yozib berdi.
Grip keksa odamlarda jiddiy asoratlarga olib kelishi mumkin.

words.definition: A high body temperature, usually a sign of illness.
words.definitionUz: Isitma — tananing yuqori harorati, odatda kasallik belgisi.
words.example1: The child has a high fever and needs medicine.
words.example1Translation: Bolada yuqori isitma bor va dori ichishi kerak.
words.example2: She stayed home from school because of fever.
words.example3: Drinking plenty of water helps reduce fever.
words.example3Translation: Ko'p suv ichish isitmani pasaytirishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: A fever is the body’s way of fighting infection.
He felt hot and had a fever.
The doctor measured her fever with a thermometer.
Fever often comes with the flu.
She broke her fever after taking medicine.
High fever in babies can be dangerous.
He is running a fever.
extraExampleTranslations: Isitma — tananing infeksiyaga qarshi kurash usuli.
U issiq his qildi va isitmasi bor edi.
Shifokor uning isitmasini termometr bilan o'lchadi.
Isitma ko'pincha grip bilan birga keladi.
Dori ichgandan keyin uning isitmasi tushdi.
Chaqaloqlarda yuqori isitma xavfli bo'lishi mumkin.

words.definition: A sudden noisy expulsion of air from the lungs.
words.definitionUz: Yo'tal — o'pkadan havoning keskin va shovqinli chiqarilishi.
words.example1: She has a bad cough and can’t stop coughing.
words.example1Translation: U qattiq yo'talmoqda va yo'talni to'xtata olmayapti.
words.example2: Cover your mouth when you cough.
words.example3: The cough medicine helped him sleep better.
words.example3Translation: Yo'tal dorisi unga yaxshiroq uxlashga yordam berdi.
extraExamples: Smoking causes a persistent cough.
He has a dry cough with no phlegm.
The baby has a chesty cough.
Coughing is a way to clear the throat.
She developed a cough after catching a cold.
Chronic cough can be a symptom of asthma.
The teacher asked the student to stop coughing loudly.
extraExampleTranslations: Surunkali yo'tal astma belgisi bo'lishi mumkin.
O'qituvchi talabadan baland ovozda yo'talmaslikni so'radi.

words.definition: Not feeling well; affected by illness.
words.definitionUz: Kasal — o'zini yaxshi his qilmaydigan, kasallikka chalingan holat.
words.example1: She stayed home because she was sick.
words.example1Translation: U kasal bo'lgani uchun uyda qoldi.
words.example2: I feel sick after eating too much junk food.
words.example2Translation: Ko'p zararli ovqat yeganimdan keyin o'zimni yomon his qilyapman.
words.example3: The doctor visited the sick child.
extraExamples: He called in sick to work.
She gets motion sick in cars.
The whole family is sick with the flu.
Are you feeling sick?
Many students are absent because they are sick.
He looks sick and pale.
Taking care of sick people is a noble job.
extraExampleTranslations: U ishga kasalman deb qo'ng'iroq qildi.
Ko'p o'quvchilar kasal bo'lgani uchun darsga kelmagan.
U kasal va rangi oqargan ko'rinadi.

words.definition: Feeling the need for rest or sleep.
words.definitionUz: Charchagan — dam olish yoki uxlashga muhtoj bo'lgan holat.
words.example1: I am very tired after working all day.
words.example1Translation: Kun bo'yi ishlaganimdan keyin juda charchadim.
words.example2: She felt tired and went to bed early.
words.example2Translation: U charchaganini his qilib, erta yotdi.
words.example3: Getting enough sleep helps you not feel tired.
extraExamples: He was too tired to continue studying.
The long journey made everyone tired.
She looks tired these days.
Mental work can make you just as tired as physical work.
I am tired of waiting for the bus.
The children are tired after playing all afternoon.
A short nap can refresh a tired person.
extraExampleTranslations: U o'qishni davom ettirish uchun juda charchagan edi.
Aqliy ish jismoniy ish kabi charchatishi mumkin.
Bolalar butun tushdan keyin o'ynab charchadilar.
Qisqa uyqu charchagan odamni yangilashi mumkin.

words.definition: Wanting to eat food.
words.definitionUz: Och — ovqat yegisi keladigan holat.
words.example1: I am hungry. Let’s have lunch.
words.example2: The children were hungry after playing outside.
words.example3: She felt hungry even after eating a small snack.
words.example3Translation: U ozgina gazak yegandan keyin ham ochligini his qildi.
extraExamples: He gets hungry late at night.
The hungry dog waited by the table.
I’m so hungry I could eat a horse.
Many people go to bed hungry in poor countries.
She skipped breakfast and now she’s very hungry.
The smell of food made him even hungrier.
Feeling hungry is a natural signal from your body.
extraExampleTranslations: Och it stol yonida kutib turardi.
Men shunchalik ochmanki, otni ham yeyman.
Kambag'al mamlakatlarda ko'p odamlar och yotishadi.
U nonushtani o'tkazib yubordi va endi juda och.
Ovqat hidi uning ochligini yanada kuchaytirdi.

words.definition: Feeling the need to drink something.
words.definitionUz: Chanqagan — ichishga muhtoj bo'lgan holat.
words.example1: I am thirsty. Can I have some water?
words.example1Translation: Men chanqadim. Bir oz suv bersangiz bo'ladimi?
words.example2: After running, he felt very thirsty.
words.example3: The hot weather made everyone thirsty.
extraExamples: She drank a whole bottle of water because she was thirsty.
Working in the sun makes you thirsty quickly.
The thirsty plants needed water.
He felt thirsty after eating spicy food.
Always carry water when you feel thirsty easily.
The long lecture left the students thirsty.
A cold drink is perfect when you are thirsty.
extraExampleTranslations: U chanqagani uchun butun bir shisha suv ichdi.
Achchiq ovqat yegandan keyin u chanqadi.
Tez-tez chanqasangiz har doim suv olib yuring.

words.definition: A substance used to treat or prevent illness.
words.definitionUz: Dori — kasallikni davolash yoki oldini olish uchun ishlatiladigan modda.
words.example1: Take this medicine three times a day.
words.example1Translation: Bu dorini kuniga uch marta iching.
words.example2: She bought medicine from the pharmacy.
words.example3: Antibiotics are a type of medicine.
extraExamples: Traditional medicine is still popular in many countries.
He forgot to take his medicine.
This medicine may cause drowsiness.
The doctor prescribed new medicine.
Some medicines need to be taken with food.
She studies medicine at university.
Modern medicine has saved many lives.
extraExampleTranslations: An'anaviy tibbiyot ko'p mamlakatlarda hali ham mashhur.
Bu dori uyquchanlikka olib kelishi mumkin.
Ba'zi dorilarni ovqat bilan ichish kerak.
Zamonaviy tibbiyot ko'p odamlarning hayotini saqlab qoldi.

words.definition: A person who is qualified to treat people who are ill.
words.definitionUz: Shifokor — kasallarni davolashga malakali mutaxassis.
words.example1: You should see a doctor if the pain continues.
words.example1Translation: Og'riq davom etsa, shifokorga ko'rinishingiz kerak.
words.example2: The doctor examined the patient carefully.
words.example2Translation: Shifokor bemorni diqqat bilan ko'rib chiqdi.
words.example3: She wants to become a doctor when she grows up.
words.example3Translation: U katta bo'lganda shifokor bo'lishni xohlaydi.
extraExamples: The doctor gave him a prescription.
He is a heart doctor (cardiologist).
The doctor advised her to rest.
Many doctors work long hours.
The family doctor knows all their medical history.
She called the doctor for advice.
The doctor is very kind and patient.
extraExampleTranslations: Shifokor unga dam olishni maslahat berdi.
Oilaviy shifokor ularning butun tibbiy tarixini biladi.
U maslahat uchun shifokorga qo'ng'iroq qildi.

words.definition: A person trained to care for sick or injured people.
words.definitionUz: Hamshira — kasal yoki jarohatlangan odamlarga yordam berishga o'qitilgan mutaxassis.
words.example1: The nurse took my temperature.
words.example2: She works as a nurse in a big hospital.
words.example2Translation: U katta kasalxonada hamshira bo'lib ishlaydi.
words.example3: The nurse bandaged the wound carefully.
words.example3Translation: Hamshira yarani ehtiyotkorlik bilan bog'lab qo'ydi.
extraExamples: Nurses play a very important role in healthcare.
The nurse gave the patient an injection.
She is studying to become a nurse.
The nurse checked on the patients every hour.
Male nurses are becoming more common.
The nurse comforted the scared child.
Good nurses are patient and caring.
extraExampleTranslations: Hamshiralar sog'liqni saqlashda juda muhim rol o'ynaydi.
Hamshira har soat bemorlarni tekshirib turardi.
Yaxshi hamshiralar sabrli va mehribon bo'lishadi.

words.definition: Items worn to cover the body.
words.definitionUz: Kiyimlar — tanani yopish uchun kiyiladigan buyumlar.
words.example1: She bought new clothes for the summer.
words.example1Translation: U yoz uchun yangi kiyimlar sotib oldi.
words.example2: Put on warm clothes because it’s cold outside.
words.example3: He folded his clothes and put them in the wardrobe.
extraExamples: She donates old clothes to charity.
Casual clothes are comfortable for daily wear.
The children got dirty clothes after playing.
She designs beautiful clothes.
Washing clothes regularly is important.
He changed his clothes after work.
Traditional clothes are worn during festivals.
extraExampleTranslations: U eski kiyimlarini xayriya uchun beradi.

words.definition: A piece of clothing worn on the upper part of the body, usually with a collar and sleeves.
words.definitionUz: Ko'ylak — tananing yuqori qismiga kiyiladigan, odatda yoqa va yengli kiyim.
words.example1: He wore a white shirt to the meeting.
words.example2: This shirt needs to be ironed.
words.example3: She bought a silk shirt as a gift.
words.example3Translation: U sovg'a uchun ipak ko'ylak sotib oldi.
extraExamples: The shirt has short sleeves.
He spilled coffee on his shirt.
Formal shirts are required at the office.
She folded the clean shirts neatly.
This shirt is too tight for me.
He rolled up the sleeves of his shirt.
The team wore matching shirts.
extraExampleTranslations: U toza ko'ylaklarni chiroyli buklab qo'ydi.

words.definition: A casual shirt with short sleeves and no collar.
words.definitionUz: Futbolka — kalta yengli va yoqasiz oddiy kiyim.
words.example1: He wears a T-shirt and jeans on weekends.
words.example1Translation: U dam olish kunlarida futbolka va jinsi shim kiyadi.
words.example2: The T-shirt has a funny print on it.
words.example3: This T-shirt is made of cotton and very comfortable.
words.example3Translation: Bu futbolka paxtadan qilingan va juda qulay.
extraExamples: She bought several T-shirts on sale.
He changed into a clean T-shirt.
The school T-shirt has the logo on the front.
T-shirts are perfect for hot weather.
She tied her T-shirt around her waist.
Many people wear T-shirts with slogans.
The T-shirt was too big for him.
extraExampleTranslations: U chegirmada bir necha futbolka sotib oldi.
Maktab futbolkasida old tomonda logotip bor.

words.definition: A one-piece garment worn by women and girls.
words.definitionUz: Ko'ylak — ayollar va qizlar kiyadigan bir bo'lakli kiyim.
words.example1: She wore a beautiful red dress to the party.
words.example1Translation: U ziyofatga chiroyli qizil ko'ylak kiygan.
words.example2: This dress is perfect for special occasions.
words.example2Translation: Bu ko'ylak maxsus holatlar uchun juda mos.
words.example3: She bought a summer dress with flowers.
words.example3Translation: U gulli yozgi ko'ylak sotib oldi.
extraExamples: The wedding dress was white and elegant.
She tried on several dresses before choosing one.
Long dresses are in fashion this year.
She spilled juice on her new dress.
The little girl twirled in her dress.
Evening dresses are usually formal.
She prefers comfortable dresses.
extraExampleTranslations: To'y ko'ylagi oq va nafis edi.
U bir necha ko'ylakni kiyib ko'rib, bittasini tanladi.
U yangi ko'ylagiga sharbat to'kib yubordi.

words.definition: A piece of clothing worn by women and girls that hangs from the waist.
words.definitionUz: Yubka — beldan osilgan holda ayollar va qizlar kiyadigan kiyim.
words.example1: She wore a long skirt with a blouse.
words.example1Translation: U uzun yubka va bluzka kiygan.
words.example2: The school uniform includes a blue skirt.
words.example3: Short skirts are popular in summer.
extraExamples: She twirled around in her new skirt.
The skirt matches perfectly with her shoes.
She prefers wearing skirts to pants.
The wind blew her skirt up.
This skirt is made of denim.
She bought a pleated skirt.
Long skirts are elegant.
extraExampleTranslations: Yubka uning tuflisi bilan juda mos.
U shim o'rniga yubka kiyishni afzal ko'radi.

words.definition: A piece of clothing worn on the lower part of the body, covering both legs separately.
words.definitionUz: Shim — tananing pastki qismiga kiyiladigan, ikkala oyog'ini alohida qoplagan kiyim.
words.example1: He wore black pants and a white shirt.
words.example1Translation: U qora shim va oq ko'ylak kiygan.
words.example2: These pants are too tight.
words.example3: She bought a new pair of pants.
words.example3Translation: U yangi bir juft shim sotib oldi.
extraExamples: Jeans are a type of casual pants.
The pants have many pockets.
He needs to iron his pants.
These pants are perfect for work.
She prefers loose pants for comfort.
The child spilled paint on his pants.
Formal pants are required for the event.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu shimlar ish uchun juda mos.
U qulaylik uchun keng shimlarni afzal ko'radi.
Tadbir uchun rasmiy shim kiyish shart.

words.definition: Casual pants made of strong cotton fabric (denim).
words.definitionUz: Jinsi shim — mustahkam paxta matosidan (denim) tikilgan oddiy shim.
words.example1: Most young people wear jeans every day.
words.example1Translation: Ko'p yoshlar har kuni jinsi shim kiyishadi.
words.example2: These jeans are very comfortable.
words.example3: She bought a pair of blue jeans.
words.example3Translation: U ko'k jinsi shim sotib oldi.
extraExamples: Jeans never go out of fashion.
He ripped his jeans while climbing.
Skinny jeans are popular among teenagers.
These jeans have holes for a stylish look.
She rolled up the legs of her jeans.
Jeans are suitable for both casual and semi-formal occasions.
The jeans are faded after many washes.
extraExampleTranslations: U tog'ga chiqayotganda jinsisini yirtib qo'ydi.
Bu jinsilarda zamonaviy ko'rinish uchun teshiklar bor.
U jinsi shimining pastki qismini shima qildi.
Jinsilar oddiy va yarim rasmiy holatlar uchun mos.
Ko'p yuvilgani uchun jinsilar oqarib ketgan.

words.definition: Short trousers that end above or at the knee, worn in warm weather or for sports.
words.definitionUz: Shorts — tizza yoki undan yuqorisida tugaydigan qisqa shim, issiq havoda yoki sport bilan shug‘ullanishda kiyiladi.
words.example1: He wore shorts and a t-shirt because it was very hot outside.
words.example1Translation: U tashqarida juda issiq bo‘lgani uchun shorts va futbolka kiygan edi.
words.example2: Running shorts are designed to be light and comfortable.
words.example2Translation: Yugurish shortslari yengil va qulay bo‘lishi uchun maxsus ishlab chiqarilgan.
words.example3: She packed her shorts for the beach vacation.
words.example3Translation: U plyajdagi dam olish uchun shortlarini yig‘ib oldi.
extraExamples: Denim shorts are popular in summer fashion.
The team uniform includes blue shorts and white tops.
He changed into shorts after coming home from work.
Cycling shorts help reduce discomfort during long rides.
Kids love wearing colorful shorts in the playground.
She bought new shorts for her morning walks.
Wearing shorts is common in tropical countries.
extraExampleTranslations: Jamoa formasi ko‘k shorts va oq futbolkadan iborat.
Velosiped shortslari uzoq sayohatlarda noqulaylikni kamaytiradi.
Bolalar o‘yin maydonchasida rang-barang shortslarni kiyishni yaxshi ko‘rishadi.
U ertalabki sayrlar uchun yangi shortlar sotib oldi.
Tropik mamlakatlarda short kiyish odatiy hol.

words.definition: A piece of clothing worn on the upper body, usually with sleeves and open at the front.
words.definitionUz: Kurtka — tananing yuqori qismiga kiyiladigan, odatda yengli va oldidan ochiladigan kiyim.
words.example1: She put on her jacket before leaving the house.
words.example1Translation: U uyidan chiqishdan oldin kurtkasini kiyib oldi.
words.example2: A leather jacket can make any outfit look stylish.
words.example2Translation: Charm kurtka har qanday kiyimni zamonaviy ko‘rsatadi.
words.example3: He bought a warm jacket for the winter season.
words.example3Translation: U qish mavsumi uchun issiq kurtka sotib oldi.
extraExamples: The school requires students to wear a uniform jacket.
Light jackets are perfect for spring evenings.
She hung her jacket on the hook by the door.
Denim jackets never go out of fashion.
He zipped up his jacket against the cold wind.
This jacket has many useful pockets.
Jackets are essential for outdoor activities in cool weather.
extraExampleTranslations: Maktab o‘quvchilardan forma kurtkasini kiyishni talab qiladi.
Yengil kurtkalar bahor oqshomlari uchun juda mos.
U kurtkasini eshik yonidagi ilgakka osib qo‘ydi.
Jins kurtkalar hech qachon modadan chiqmaydi.
U sovuq shamoldan saqlanish uchun kurtkasining fermuarini tortdi.
Bu kurtkada ko‘plab foydali cho‘ntaklar bor.
Kurtkalar salqin ob-havoda ochiq havoda mashg‘ulotlar uchun zarur.

words.definition: A long, warm outer garment worn over other clothes, especially in cold weather.
words.definitionUz: Palto — sovuq havoda boshqa kiyimlar ustidan kiyiladigan uzun va issiq ustki kiyim.
words.example1: She wore a heavy coat to protect herself from the snow.
words.example1Translation: U qordan himoyalanish uchun qalin paltosini kiygan edi.
words.example2: Winter coats come in many different styles and colors.
words.example2Translation: Qishki paltolar turli uslub va ranglarda bo‘ladi.
words.example3: He took off his coat as soon as he entered the warm room.
words.example3Translation: U issiq xonaga kirishi bilan paltosini yechib tashladi.
extraExamples: A good coat can last for many years.
She bought a new coat for the upcoming winter.
Long coats are elegant but not very practical for daily use.
The coat has a soft lining inside.
He forgot his coat at the restaurant.
Coats with hoods are useful in rainy weather.
Classic black coats are always in fashion.
extraExampleTranslations: Yaxshi palto ko‘p yillar xizmat qilishi mumkin.
U yaqinlashib kelayotgan qish uchun yangi palto sotib oldi.
Uzun paltolar nafis, lekin kundalik foydalanish uchun unchalik qulay emas.
Klassik qora paltolar har doim modada.

words.definition: A knitted garment worn on the upper body, usually for warmth.
words.definitionUz: Sviter — tananing yuqori qismiga kiyiladigan, odatda issiq saqlash uchun to‘qilgan kiyim.
words.example1: He wore a wool sweater on the cold evening.
words.example1Translation: U sovuq oqshomda jun sviterni kiygan edi.
words.example2: This sweater is very soft and comfortable.
words.example2Translation: Bu sviter juda yumshoq va qulay.
words.example3: She knitted a sweater for her grandson.
extraExamples: Sweaters are perfect for layering in autumn.
The company allows casual sweaters on Fridays.
Her favorite sweater has a colorful pattern.
He pulled his sweater over his head quickly.
Cashmere sweaters are luxurious but expensive.
Washing sweaters requires special care.
Sweaters come in many different neck styles.
extraExampleTranslations: Sviterlar kuzda qatlamli kiyinish uchun ideal.
Kompaniya juma kunlari oddiy sviterlarni kiyishga ruxsat beradi.
Uning sevimli sviterida rang-barang naqsh bor.
U sviterni tezda boshidan o‘tkazib kiydi.
Sviterlarni yuvishda maxsus ehtiyot chorasi kerak.

words.definition: Footwear worn to protect and comfort the feet.
words.definitionUz: Oyoq kiyimi — oyoqlarni himoya qilish va qulaylik yaratish uchun kiyiladigan buyum.
words.example1: She bought new shoes for the wedding.
words.example1Translation: U to‘y uchun yangi tuflilar sotib oldi.
words.example2: Running shoes provide good support for the feet.
words.example2Translation: Yugurish tuflilari oyoqlarga yaxshi qo‘llab-quvvatlash beradi.
words.example3: Please take off your shoes before entering the house.
words.example3Translation: Iltimos, uyga kirishdan oldin oyoq kiyimingizni yeching.
extraExamples: Leather shoes are durable and elegant.
He polished his shoes before the job interview.
Comfortable shoes are important for long walks.
The shop has a wide variety of shoes for children.
High heels are stylish but not always practical.
Sports shoes have become everyday fashion.
She lost one of her shoes on the way home.
extraExampleTranslations: U ish suhbatidan oldin tuflilarini yaltiratib oldi.
Qulay oyoq kiyimi uzoq yurishlar uchun muhim.
Do‘konda bolalar uchun turli xil oyoq kiyimlari bor.
Baland poshnali tuflilar zamonaviy, lekin har doim ham qulay emas.
U uyga ketayotganda bir tuflisini yo‘qotib qo‘ydi.

words.definition: Strong footwear that covers the foot and part of the leg.
words.definitionUz: Botinkalar — oyoq va oyoqning bir qismini qoplab turadigan mustahkam oyoq kiyimi.
words.example1: She wore boots because it was raining heavily.
words.example1Translation: U kuchli yomg‘ir yog‘ayotgani uchun botinkalar kiygan edi.
words.example2: Hiking boots are essential for mountain trips.
words.example2Translation: Tog‘ sayohatlari uchun yurish botinkalari zarur.
words.example3: He polished his leather boots for the formal event.
words.example3Translation: U rasmiy tadbir uchun charm botinkalarini yaltiratib oldi.
extraExamples: Winter boots keep feet warm in snow.
Fashion boots come in many different designs.
The soldiers wore heavy combat boots.
She prefers ankle boots for everyday wear.
Boots are more protective than regular shoes.
Cowboy boots are popular in certain cultures.
Waterproof boots are useful in wet conditions.
extraExampleTranslations: Qishki botinkalar qorda oyoqlarni issiq saqlaydi.
U kundalik kiyish uchun to‘piq botinkalarini afzallik beradi.
Botinkalar oddiy tuflilarga qaraganda ko‘proq himoya beradi.
Suv o‘tkazmaydigan botinkalar nam sharoitda foydali.

words.definition: A piece of clothing worn on the feet inside shoes.
words.definitionUz: Paypoq — oyoqlarga tuflilar ichiga kiyiladigan kiyim.
words.example1: He put on clean socks every morning.
words.example1Translation: U har kuni ertalab toza paypoq kiyadi.
words.example2: Wool socks are great for cold weather.
words.example2Translation: Jun paypoqlar sovuq havoda juda yaxshi.
words.example3: She bought a pack of colorful socks.
words.example3Translation: U rang-barang paypoqlar to‘plamini sotib oldi.
extraExamples: His socks didn’t match his trousers.
Sports socks provide extra cushioning.
She folded the socks and put them in the drawer.
Cotton socks are comfortable for daily use.
He lost one sock in the washing machine.
Thick socks help prevent blisters.
Fashionable socks have become a trend.
extraExampleTranslations: U paypoqlarni buklab tortmasiga solib qo‘ydi.
Paxta paypoqlar kundalik foydalanish uchun qulay.
U kir yuvish mashinasida bitta paypoqni yo‘qotib qo‘ydi.

words.definition: A covering for the head, often worn for warmth, fashion, or protection from the sun.
words.definitionUz: Shapka — boshni qoplash uchun kiyiladigan buyum, issiq saqlash, moda yoki quyoshdan himoya uchun ishlatiladi.
words.example1: He wore a hat to protect his head from the sun.
