words.example1Translation: U boshini quyoshdan himoya qilish uchun shapka kiygan edi.
words.example2: She bought a warm wool hat for winter.
words.example2Translation: U qish uchun issiq jun shapka sotib oldi.
words.example3: The baseball player adjusted his hat before batting.
words.example3Translation: Beyzbol o‘yinchisi urishdan oldin shapasini to‘g‘rilab oldi.
extraExamples: Fashion hats can complete any outfit.
He tipped his hat as a greeting.
Kids love wearing funny hats at parties.
A hat with a wide brim protects from strong sunlight.
She hung her hat on the coat rack.
Traditional hats are part of cultural costumes.
The wind almost blew his hat away.
extraExampleTranslations: Moda shapkalar har qanday kiyimni to‘ldirishi mumkin.
U salomlashish uchun shapasini ko‘tarib qo‘ydi.
Bolalar bayramlarda kulgili shapkalar kiyishni yaxshi ko‘rishadi.
Keng qirrali shapka kuchli quyoshdan himoya qiladi.
U shapasini paltolar osiladigan joyga osib qo‘ydi.
An’anaviy shapkalar madaniy liboslarning bir qismidir.
Shamol uning shapasini uchib ketishiga sal qoldi.

words.definition: A strip of leather or fabric worn around the waist to hold up trousers or as a fashion accessory.
words.definitionUz: Kamar — shimni ushlab turish yoki moda aksessuari sifatida belga taqiladigan charm yoki matodan qayish.
words.example1: He tightened his belt after losing some weight.
words.example1Translation: U ozgandan keyin kamarini tortib bog‘ladi.
words.example2: She chose a stylish belt to match her dress.
words.example2Translation: U ko‘ylagiga mos keladigan zamonaviy kamar tanladi.
words.example3: The security guard checked his belt for equipment.
words.example3Translation: Qo‘riqchi jihozlarini tekshirish uchun kamarini ko‘zdan kechirdi.
extraExamples: Leather belts are durable and classic.
He forgot to wear a belt with his formal trousers.
Belts with big buckles are currently in fashion.
She bought a new belt for her jeans.
The karate student tied his black belt proudly.
A good belt can improve the look of any outfit.
He hung his tools on his work belt.
extraExampleTranslations: U rasmiy shim bilan kamar taqishni unutgan.
U jinsiga yangi kamar sotib oldi.
Karate o‘quvchisi qora kamarini g‘urur bilan bog‘ladi.
Yaxshi kamar har qanday kiyim ko‘rinishini yaxshilashi mumkin.
U ish kamariga asboblarini osib qo‘ydi.

words.definition: A building where people live, usually for one family.
words.definitionUz: Uy — odamlar, odatda bir oila yashaydigan bino.
words.example1: They bought a new house in the suburbs.
words.example1Translation: Ular shahar chekkasida yangi uy sotib olishdi.
words.example2: Her house has a beautiful garden in front.
words.example2Translation: Uning uyining old tomonida chiroyli bog‘ bor.
words.example3: We visited my grandparents’ house last weekend.
words.example3Translation: O‘tgan dam olish kunida bobom va buvimning uyiga bordik.
extraExamples: The old house needed a lot of repairs.
They painted their house yellow.
A big family lives in that large house.
House prices are increasing every year.
She decorated her house for the holidays.
The house has two floors and a basement.
They rented a house near the beach.
extraExampleTranslations: Eski uyga ko‘p ta’mir kerak edi.
Katta oila o‘sha katta uyda yashaydi.
Uy narxlari har yili oshib bormoqda.
Uyda ikki qavat va podval bor.
Ular dengiz bo‘yida uy ijaraga olishdi.

words.definition: The place where someone lives, especially with their family, providing a sense of belonging.
words.definitionUz: Uy — odam oilasi bilan yashaydigan, o‘zini tegishli his qiladigan joy.
words.example1: There is no place like home.
words.example2: She felt happy to be back home after the trip.
words.example2Translation: Sayohatdan keyin uyiga qaytganidan u xursand edi.
words.example3: They made their new apartment feel like home.
words.example3Translation: Ular yangi kvartirasini uydek qulay qilishdi.
extraExamples: Home is where the heart is.
Working from home has become very common.
The children are at home with their parents.
She dreams of owning a home by the sea.
Home-cooked meals are the best.
Many students feel homesick during their first year away.
This city has become my second home.
extraExampleTranslations: U dengiz bo‘yida uyga ega bo‘lishni orzu qiladi.
Ko‘p talabalar birinchi yilda uy sog‘inchini his qilishadi.
Bu shahar mening ikkinchi uyimga aylandi.

words.definition: A part of a building with its own walls, floor, and ceiling, used for a specific purpose.
words.definitionUz: Xona — binoning devorlari, pol va shiftga ega, ma’lum bir maqsadda foydalaniladigan qismi.
words.example1: Her room is painted in soft blue colors.
words.example1Translation: Uning xonasi ochiq ko‘k ranglarga bo‘yalgan.
words.example2: There are three rooms in this apartment.
words.example3: He cleaned his room before guests arrived.
words.example3Translation: U mehmonlar kelishidan oldin xonasini tozaladi.
extraExamples: The meeting room is on the second floor.
She decorated her room with posters.
The hotel room had a beautiful view.
They converted the spare room into a study.
Keep your room tidy and organized.
The waiting room was full of people.
This room gets a lot of natural light.
extraExampleTranslations: Ular bo‘sh xonani o‘quv xonasiga aylantirishdi.
Kutish xonasi odamlar bilan to‘la edi.
Bu xonaga tabiiy yorug‘lik ko‘p tushadi.

words.definition: A room where food is prepared and cooked.
words.definitionUz: Oshxona — ovqat tayyorlanadigan va pishiriladigan xona.
words.example1: She is cooking dinner in the kitchen.
words.example2: The kitchen has modern appliances.
words.example3: They eat breakfast at the kitchen table.
extraExamples: The kitchen was filled with the smell of fresh bread.
He helped his mother clean the kitchen.
A big kitchen is great for family gatherings.
She bought new curtains for the kitchen.
The restaurant kitchen is always busy.
Keep the kitchen clean and hygienic.
They renovated their old kitchen last month.
extraExampleTranslations: Oshxona yangi non hidiga to‘la edi.
U onasiga oshxonani tozalashda yordam berdi.
Katta oshxona oilaviy yig‘inlar uchun ajoyib.
U oshxona uchun yangi pardalar sotib oldi.
Ular o‘tgan oy eski oshxonasini ta’mirlatishdi.

words.definition: A room where a bed is kept for sleeping.
words.definitionUz: Yotoqxona — uxlash uchun karavot joylashtirilgan xona.
words.example1: Her bedroom has a big window with nice curtains.
words.example1Translation: Uning yotoqxonasida chiroyli pardali katta deraza bor.
words.example2: He tidied his bedroom before going to school.
words.example2Translation: U maktabga ketishdan oldin yotoqxonasini tartibga keltirdi.
words.example3: The master bedroom is on the upper floor.
extraExamples: The children share one bedroom.
She painted her bedroom walls purple.
A comfortable bedroom helps you sleep better.
He installed new lights in his bedroom.
The hotel bedroom was spacious and clean.
Keep your bedroom quiet for good rest.
They moved the furniture around in the bedroom.
extraExampleTranslations: U yotoqxona devorlarini binafsha rangga bo‘yadi.
Qulay yotoqxona yaxshi uxlashga yordam beradi.
Mehmonxona yotoqxonasi keng va toza edi.
Yaxshi dam olish uchun yotoqxonangizni tinch tuting.

words.definition: A room containing a bath or shower, sink, and toilet.
words.definitionUz: Hammom — vanna yoki dush, lavabo va hojatxona joylashgan xona.
words.example1: She is brushing her teeth in the bathroom.
words.example2: The bathroom needs a new mirror.
words.example3: There are two bathrooms in this house.
extraExamples: He took a long shower in the bathroom.
The hotel bathroom was very luxurious.
Clean the bathroom regularly.
She decorated the bathroom with plants.
The bathroom door was locked.
Modern bathrooms often have big mirrors.
They renovated the old bathroom last year.
extraExampleTranslations: U hammomda uzoq dush qabul qildi.
Zamonaviy hammomlarda ko‘pincha katta ko‘zgular bo‘ladi.
Ular o‘tgan yili eski hammomni ta’mirlatishdi.

words.definition: A room in a house for relaxing, watching TV, and spending time with family.
words.definitionUz: Mehmonxona — uyda dam olish, televizor ko‘rish va oila bilan vaqt o‘tkazish uchun xona.
words.example1: The family gathers in the living room every evening.
words.example2: There is a big sofa in the living room.
words.example3: She decorated the living room with flowers.
extraExamples: We watched a movie in the living room.
The living room has large windows.
He fell asleep on the living room sofa.
A comfortable living room makes a house feel welcoming.
They bought a new carpet for the living room.
The living room is the heart of the home.
Kids play games in the living room.
extraExampleTranslations: Ular mehmonxona uchun yangi gilam sotib olishdi.

words.definition: The flat surface we walk on inside a building.
words.definitionUz: Pol — binoning ichida yuradigan tekis yuza.
words.example1: The floor is made of wooden planks.
words.example2: She swept the floor every morning.
words.example2Translation: U har kuni ertalab polni supurardi.
words.example3: Be careful, the floor is wet and slippery.
words.example3Translation: Ehtiyot bo‘ling, pol ho‘l va silliq.
extraExamples: The children sat on the floor to play.
Marble floors look elegant in big houses.
He dropped his phone on the hard floor.
They installed new tiles on the kitchen floor.
Keep the floor clean and free of dust.
The living room floor is covered with a soft carpet.
The second floor has three bedrooms.
extraExampleTranslations: Marmar pollar katta uylarda nafis ko‘rinadi.
U telefonini qattiq polga tashlab yubordi.
Ular oshxona poliga yangi plitkalar yotqizishdi.
Mehmonxona poli yumshoq gilam bilan qoplangan.

words.definition: A vertical structure that forms the side of a room or building.
words.definitionUz: Devor — xona yoki binoning yon tomonini tashkil etuvchi vertikal inshoot.
words.example1: There is a beautiful painting on the wall.
words.example2: He painted the walls of his room white.
words.example2Translation: U xonasi devorlarini oq rangga bo‘yadi.
words.example3: The ball hit the wall and bounced back.
extraExamples: She hung family photos on the living room wall.
Thick walls keep the house warm in winter.
There is a clock on the classroom wall.
He leaned against the wall while waiting.
The wall is covered with colorful wallpaper.
They built a new wall around the garden.
Cracks appeared on the old wall.
extraExampleTranslations: U mehmonxona devoriga oilaviy fotosuratlarni osdi.
Qalin devorlar qishda uyni issiq saqlaydi.
Devor rang-barang devor qog‘ozi bilan qoplangan.
Ular bog‘ atrofida yangi devor qurishdi.

words.definition: A movable barrier that opens and closes the entrance to a room or building.
words.definitionUz: Eshik — xona yoki binoga kirish-chiqishni ochib-yopadigan harakatlanuvchi to‘siq.
words.example1: Please close the door behind you.
words.example2: He knocked on the door before entering.
words.example3: The front door is painted red.
extraExamples: The door was locked, so we couldn’t enter.
She opened the door and welcomed the guests.
Automatic doors are common in supermarkets.
He fixed the squeaky door.
The glass door lets in a lot of light.
Keep the door shut to keep the room warm.
There is a sign on the door saying "Push".
extraExampleTranslations: Eshik qulflangan edi, shuning uchun kira olmadik.
U eshikni ochib mehmonlarni kutib oldi.
Shisha eshik ko‘p yorug‘lik tushishiga imkon beradi.
Xonani issiq saqlash uchun eshikni yopiq tuting.

words.definition: An opening in a wall that lets in light and air, usually covered with glass.
words.definitionUz: Deraza — devordagi yorug‘lik va havo kiradigan, odatda shisha bilan qoplangan ochiq joy.
words.example1: She opened the window to let fresh air in.
words.example1Translation: U toza havo kirishi uchun derazani ochdi.
words.example2: The window has beautiful curtains.
words.example3: He looked out of the window at the garden.
extraExamples: The classroom windows are very large.
Close the window, it’s getting cold.
Sunlight came through the window.
They cleaned all the windows yesterday.
The broken window needs to be repaired.
She sat by the window reading a book.
Double-glazed windows help save energy.
extraExampleTranslations: U deraza yonida kitob o‘qib o‘tirardi.
Ikki qavatli shisha derazalar energiyani tejashga yordam beradi.

words.definition: A set of steps for going up and down between floors.
words.definitionUz: Zinapoya — qavatlar orasida yuqoriga va pastga chiqish uchun bosqichlar.
words.example1: He ran up the stairs to his room.
words.example2: Be careful on the stairs, they are steep.
words.example3: The elevator is broken, so we have to use the stairs.
words.example3Translation: Lift buzilgan, shuning uchun zinapoyadan foydalanishimiz kerak.
extraExamples: She carried the boxes down the stairs.
The stairs lead to the second floor.
There is a handrail along the stairs.
Climbing stairs is good exercise.
The wooden stairs creaked loudly.
They installed new carpet on the stairs.
He slipped on the stairs but didn’t fall.
extraExampleTranslations: U qutilarni zinapoyadan pastga ko‘tarib tushdi.

words.definition: A piece of furniture with a flat top and legs, used for eating, working, or placing things.
words.definitionUz: Stol — tekis usti va oyoqlari bor, ovqatlanish, ishlash yoki narsalarni qo‘yish uchun mebel.
words.example1: We ate dinner at the kitchen table.
words.example1Translation: Biz oshxona stolida kechki ovqatni yedik.
words.example2: She placed the vase on the table.
words.example3: The conference table was very long.
extraExamples: The table was covered with books.
He set the table for breakfast.
A round table saves space in small rooms.
She bought a new wooden table.
Coffee tables are usually low.
They played cards on the table.
Clean the table after eating.
extraExampleTranslations: Stol usti kitoblar bilan to‘la edi.
Dumaloq stol kichik xonalarda joy tejaydi.
U yangi yog‘och stol sotib oldi.

words.definition: A piece of furniture for one person to sit on, with a back and four legs.
words.definitionUz: Stul — bir kishi o‘tirishi uchun orqa suyanchiqli va to‘rt oyoqli mebel.
words.example1: Please sit on the chair.
words.example2: The chair is comfortable for long meetings.
words.example2Translation: Bu stul uzoq yig‘ilishlar uchun qulay.
words.example3: He pulled out a chair for the guest.
words.example3Translation: U mehmon uchun stulni tortib oldi.
extraExamples: She bought an office chair for her desk.
The wooden chair needs repair.
Kids were sitting on small chairs.
He rocked back and forth on his chair.
There are six chairs around the dining table.
The chair has soft cushions.
She stood on the chair to reach the shelf.
extraExampleTranslations: U ish stoli uchun ofis stulini sotib oldi.
Ovqatlanish stoli atrofida oltita stul bor.
U javonga yetish uchun stul ustiga chiqdi.

words.definition: A long, soft seat with a back and arms for two or more people.
words.definitionUz: Divan — ikki yoki undan ortiq odam o‘tirishi mumkin bo‘lgan, orqa va yon suyanchiqqa ega yumshoq uzun o‘rindiq.
words.example1: The family sat on the sofa watching TV.
words.example2: She bought a new leather sofa.
words.example2Translation: U yangi charm divan sotib oldi.
words.example3: He fell asleep on the sofa.
extraExamples: The sofa is very comfortable for relaxing.
They moved the sofa to the other side of the room.
A corner sofa saves space.
She cleaned the sofa with a special cleaner.
The cat loves sleeping on the sofa.
Modern sofas have stylish designs.
They replaced the old sofa with a new one.
extraExampleTranslations: Divan dam olish uchun juda qulay.
Ular divanni xonaning boshqa tomoniga ko‘chirishdi.
U divanni maxsus tozalagich bilan tozaladi.

words.definition: A piece of furniture for sleeping on, usually with a mattress and pillows.
words.definitionUz: Karavot — uxalash uchun mo‘ljallangan, odatda matras va yostiqlar bilan jihozlangan mebel.
words.example1: She made her bed in the morning.
words.example2: The bed is very soft and comfortable.
words.example3: He read a book in bed before sleeping.
words.example3Translation: U uxashdan oldin karavotda kitob o‘qidi.
extraExamples: The children jumped on the bed.
They bought a king-size bed.
A good bed is important for healthy sleep.
She changed the sheets on the bed.
The bed has a wooden headboard.
He lay on the bed resting after work.
Hospital beds can be adjusted.
extraExampleTranslations: Ular katta o‘lchamdagi karavot sotib olishdi.
Yaxshi karavot sog‘lom uyqu uchun muhim.
U ishdan keyin karavotda dam olib yotardi.

words.definition: A table used for working, studying, or writing, often with drawers.
words.definitionUz: Ish stoli — ishlash, o‘qish yoki yozish uchun ishlatiladigan, ko‘pincha tortmalariga ega stol.
words.example1: He works at his desk every day.
words.example1Translation: U har kuni ish stolida ishlaydi.
words.example2: Her desk is always neat and organized.
words.example2Translation: Uning ish stoli doim tartibli va ozoda.
words.example3: There is a computer on the desk.
extraExamples: She put the lamp on her desk.
The teacher’s desk is at the front of the classroom.
He bought a new desk for his home office.
Papers were scattered all over the desk.
A standing desk is good for health.
Kids keep their schoolbooks in their desks.
The desk has many drawers for storage.
extraExampleTranslations: U uy ofisi uchun yangi ish stolini sotib oldi.
Tik turgan ish stoli salomatlik uchun foydali.
Stolda saqlash uchun ko‘p tortmalar bor.

words.definition: A piece of glass that reflects images.
words.definitionUz: Ko‘zgu — tasvirlarni aks ettiruvchi shisha buyum.
words.example1: She looked at herself in the mirror.
words.example2: There is a big mirror in the bathroom.
words.example3: He adjusted his tie in front of the mirror.
extraExamples: The mirror hung on the wall.
She bought a new makeup mirror.
The car has side mirrors.
He broke the mirror by accident.
A full-length mirror helps when trying on clothes.
The room looks bigger with mirrors.
She cleaned the dusty mirror.
extraExampleTranslations: U yangi pardoz ko‘zgusini sotib oldi.
To‘liq bo‘yli ko‘zgu kiyim kiyib ko‘rishda yordam beradi.

words.definition: A device that produces light, often placed on a table or hung from the ceiling.
words.definitionUz: Chiroq — yorug‘lik chiqaradigan qurilma, odatda stol ustiga qo‘yiladi yoki shiftga osiladi.
words.example1: She turned on the lamp to read.
words.example2: The desk lamp is very bright.
words.example3: He bought a new floor lamp for the living room.
words.example3Translation: U mehmonxona uchun yangi pol chirog‘ini sotib oldi.
extraExamples: The lamp has a beautiful shade.
Don’t forget to turn off the lamp.
A small lamp is useful on the bedside table.
The street lamp was broken.
She replaced the old light bulb in the lamp.
Modern lamps use LED technology.
The lamp illuminated the whole room.

words.definition: A device that sprays water for washing the body.
words.definitionUz: Dush — tanani yuvish uchun suv purkaydigan qurilma.
words.example1: He takes a shower every morning.
words.example1Translation: U har kuni ertalab dush qabul qiladi.
words.example2: The shower is hot and refreshing.
words.example3: She bought a new shower curtain.
words.example3Translation: U yangi dush pardasini sotib oldi.
extraExamples: The hotel has a powerful shower.
Cold showers can wake you up quickly.
He fixed the leaking shower.
She sings in the shower.
A long shower uses a lot of water.
The shower head needs cleaning.
They installed a rain shower in the bathroom.
extraExampleTranslations: U dush qabul qilayotganda qo‘shiq aytadi.

words.definition: A bathroom fixture used for getting rid of body waste.
words.definitionUz: Hojatxona — tanadagi chiqindilarni chiqarish uchun mo‘ljallangan jihoz.
words.example1: Where is the toilet, please?
words.example2: He cleaned the toilet thoroughly.
words.example3: The toilet is out of order.
extraExamples: Public toilets are available in the station.
She bought new toilet paper.
Flush the toilet after use.
The toilet seat was cold.
They renovated the toilet last month.
Keep the toilet clean and fresh.
The bathroom has both a toilet and a shower.
extraExampleTranslations: U yangi hojatxona qog‘ozini sotib oldi.

words.definition: An electrical appliance used to keep food and drinks cold.
words.definitionUz: Muzlatgich — ovqat va ichimliklarni sovuq saqlash uchun elektr jihoz.
words.example1: She put the milk back in the fridge.
words.example2: The fridge is full of fresh vegetables.
words.example3: Don’t leave the fridge door open.
extraExamples: He bought a new energy-efficient fridge.
There is leftover food in the fridge.
The fridge makes a humming noise.
Clean the fridge once a month.
She organized the fridge shelves.
The fridge keeps drinks cool.
We need to defrost the freezer part of the fridge.
extraExampleTranslations: U energiya tejaydigan yangi muzlatgich sotib oldi.
Biz muzlatgichning muz qismi muzini eritishimiz kerak.

words.definition: A device that shows the time.
words.definitionUz: Soat — vaqtni ko‘rsatuvchi qurilma.
words.example1: The clock on the wall shows 9 o’clock.
words.example2: She checked the clock before leaving.
words.example3: The alarm clock woke him up early.
extraExamples: The clock is five minutes fast.
He looked at his watch clock.
A big clock stands in the town square.
The clock stopped working.
She bought a decorative clock.
Digital clocks are easy to read.
The clock chimes every hour.

words.definition: A small metal object used to open or lock doors, cars, etc.
words.definitionUz: Kalit — eshik, mashina va shunga o‘xshashlarni ochish yoki qulflash uchun ishlatiladigan kichik metall buyum.
words.example1: I can’t find my house key.
words.example2: She turned the key in the lock.
words.example3: He gave me a spare key.
extraExamples: The car key is on the table.
She lost her office key.
This key opens the main door.
Keep your keys in a safe place.
He attached the key to his keychain.
The key got stuck in the lock.
They changed the locks and keys.
extraExampleTranslations: U kalitni kalit zanjiriga ilib qo‘ydi.

words.definition: A tool used for writing with ink.
words.definitionUz: Ruchka — siyoh bilan yozish uchun ishlatiladigan vosita.
words.example1: Can I borrow your pen?
words.example2: She signed the document with a blue pen.
words.example2Translation: U hujjatni ko‘k ruchka bilan imzoladi.
words.example3: The pen ran out of ink.
extraExamples: He always carries a pen in his pocket.
This pen writes very smoothly.
She bought a set of colorful pens.
The teacher uses a red pen to correct papers.
Don’t forget to put the cap back on the pen.
Gel pens are popular among students.
The pen is mightier than the sword.
extraExampleTranslations: U har doim cho‘ntagida ruchka olib yuradi.
U rang-barang ruchkalar to‘plamini sotib oldi.
O‘qituvchi qog‘ozlarni tuzatish uchun qizil ruchkadan foydalanadi.

words.definition: A writing tool made of wood with a graphite core.
words.definitionUz: Qalam — yog‘ochdan yasalgan, ichida grafit bo‘lgan yozuv vositasi.
words.example1: She sharpened her pencil before the test.
words.example2: He drew a beautiful picture with colored pencils.
words.example2Translation: U rangli qalamlar bilan chiroyli rasm chizdi.
words.example3: The pencil broke while he was writing.
extraExamples: Students need pencils and notebooks.
She prefers pencils over pens for drafting.
The pencil has an eraser on the end.
He bought a box of HB pencils.
Pencils are useful for making sketches.
Don’t bite your pencil.
The teacher collected all the pencils.
extraExampleTranslations: U chizmalar uchun ruchkadan ko‘ra qalamni afzallik beradi.
U HB qalamlar qutisini sotib oldi.

words.definition: A thin material used for writing, printing, or wrapping things.
words.definitionUz: Qog‘oz — yozish, chop etish yoki narsalarni o‘rash uchun ishlatiladigan yupqa material.
words.example1: He wrote a letter on a piece of paper.
words.example1Translation: U bir varaq qog‘ozga xat yozdi.
words.example2: Please recycle used paper.
words.example3: The teacher handed out test papers.
extraExamples: She wrapped the gift in colorful paper.
There is a stack of paper on the desk.
Newspapers are made from paper.
He folded the paper into an airplane.
Office paper is usually white.
Save paper by printing on both sides.
The important document is on paper.
extraExampleTranslations: Har ikki tomoniga chop etib qog‘ozni tejang.

words.definition: A small book with blank pages for writing notes.
words.definitionUz: Daftar — yozuvlar uchun bo‘sh varaqlari bor kichik kitobcha.
words.example1: She writes her daily tasks in her notebook.
words.example2: He bought a new notebook for school.
words.example2Translation: U maktab uchun yangi daftar sotib oldi.
words.example3: The notebook has a nice cover.
extraExamples: Students take notes in their notebooks.
She lost her important notebook.
This notebook has lined pages.
He uses a notebook for drawing.
Keep your notebook neat and organized.
The teacher checked everyone’s notebook.
Spiral notebooks are easy to use.
extraExampleTranslations: U daftardan rasm chizish uchun foydalanadi.

words.definition: A set of printed pages bound together, containing stories, information, or pictures.
words.definitionUz: Kitob — hikoyalar, ma’lumotlar yoki rasmlar bilan bosilgan varaqlarning biriktirilgan to‘plami.
words.example1: She is reading an interesting book.
words.example2: He borrowed a book from the library.
words.example3: This book has beautiful illustrations.
extraExamples: Books are a great source of knowledge.
She placed the book back on the shelf.
Children’s books have large pictures.
He wrote his name inside the book.
The book fell off the table.
Reading books improves vocabulary.
Many people collect old books.
extraExampleTranslations: U kitob ichiga o‘z ismini yozdi.

words.definition: A container with four sides, a bottom, and usually a lid, used for storing things.
words.definitionUz: Quti — to‘rt tomoni, pastki qismi va odatda qopqog‘i bor, narsalarni saqlash uchun idish.
words.example1: He put his toys in the box.
words.example2: The box was full of old clothes.
words.example2Translation: Quti eski kiyimlar bilan to‘la edi.
words.example3: She received a gift in a beautiful box.
extraExamples: The delivery came in a cardboard box.
Keep the box in a dry place.
He opened the box carefully.
There are three boxes on the shelf.
She packed her books into boxes.
The box is heavy, be careful.
They used a box for moving house.

words.definition: A container with a narrow neck, used for storing liquids.
words.definitionUz: Shisha — tor bo‘yinli, suyuqliklarni saqlash uchun ishlatiladigan idish.
words.example1: She drank water from the bottle.
words.example2: The bottle of milk is in the fridge.
words.example3: He recycled all the plastic bottles.
words.example3Translation: U barcha plastik shishalarni qayta ishladi.
extraExamples: The bottle is empty now.
She bought a bottle of juice.
Don’t throw bottles on the ground.
The medicine bottle has clear instructions.
He filled the bottle with fresh water.
Glass bottles can be reused.
There is a message inside the bottle.
extraExampleTranslations: U bir shisha sharbat sotib oldi.
U shishani toza suv bilan to‘ldirdi.

words.definition: A small container with a handle, usually used for drinking hot beverages like tea or coffee.
words.definitionUz: Chashka - choy yoki qahva ichish uchun ishlatiladigan tutqichli kichik idish.
words.example1: She drank her morning coffee from a large blue cup.
words.example1Translation: U ertalabki qahvasini katta ko‘k chashkadan ichdi.
words.example2: Can you pass me a cup for my tea, please?
words.example2Translation: Iltimos, choyim uchun bir chashka uzatib bersangiz.
words.example3: The cup slipped from his hand and broke on the floor.
words.example3Translation: Chashka uning qo‘lidan tushib, polga sinib ketdi.
extraExamples: I bought a set of beautiful ceramic cups for my new kitchen.
He measured the flour using a standard measuring cup.
Every guest received a cup of hot chocolate at the party.
The trophy cup was shining under the bright lights.
She collects antique cups from different countries.
There is still some tea left in your cup.
Don't forget to wash the cups after breakfast.
extraExampleTranslations: Men yangi oshxonam uchun chiroyli sopol chashkalar to‘plamini sotib oldim.
U unni standart o‘lchov chashkasi yordamida o‘lchadi.
Har bir mehmon ziyofatda bir chashka issiq shokolad oldi.
G‘oliblik kubogi yorqin chiroqlar ostida yaltirab turardi.
U turli mamlakatlardan antiqa chashkalar yig‘adi.
Sizning chashkangizda hali ham choy qolgan.

words.definition: A container made of glass, usually used for drinking cold beverages.
words.definitionUz: Stakan - sovuq ichimliklar ichish uchun ishlatiladigan shishadan yasalgan idish.
words.example1: He poured some cold water into a clean glass.
words.example1Translation: U toza stakanga bir oz sovuq suv quydi.
words.example2: The waiter brought us two glasses of fresh juice.
words.example2Translation: Ofitsiant bizga ikki stakan yangi sharbat olib keldi.
words.example3: Be careful with that glass, it might break easily.
words.example3Translation: Bu stakanga ehtiyot bo‘ling, osongina sinishi mumkin.
extraExamples: She raised her glass to make a toast at the wedding.
I prefer drinking wine from a thin glass.
There was a beautiful stained glass window in the old church.
He accidentally dropped the glass and it shattered.
The shop sells different types of drinking glasses.
Fill the glass halfway with milk.
They clinked their glasses together in celebration.
extraExampleTranslations: U to‘yda tilak aytish uchun stakanini ko‘tardi.
Men sharobni ingichka stakandan ichishni afzal ko‘raman.
Eski cherkovda chiroyli rangli shisha deraza bor edi.
U tasodifan stakanni tushirdi va u sinib ketdi.
Do‘konda turli xil ichimlik stakanlari sotiladi.

words.definition: A flat dish on which food is served or eaten.
words.definitionUz: Tovoq - ovqat beriladigan yoki yeyiladigan tekis idish.
words.example1: She put the hot food on a large white plate.
words.example1Translation: U issiq ovqatni katta oq tovoqqa soldi.
words.example2: Please wash the plates after dinner.
words.example2Translation: Iltimos, kechki ovqatdan keyin tovoqlarni yuvib qo‘ying.
words.example3: The restaurant served the meal on elegant plates.
extraExamples: He ate everything on his plate in just a few minutes.
There are matching cups and plates in the cupboard.
The plate was decorated with beautiful patterns.
Don't put too much food on one plate.
She bought a new set of dinner plates.
The waiter cleared the empty plates from the table.
This plate is perfect for serving appetizers.
extraExampleTranslations: U bir necha daqiqada tovoqdagi hamma narsani yeb tugatdi.
Shkafda bir xil chashka va tovoqlar bor.
Tovoq chiroyli naqshlar bilan bezatilgan edi.
Bitta tovoqqa juda ko‘p ovqat solmang.
U yangi kechki ovqat tovoqlari to‘plamini sotib oldi.
Ofitsiant stol ustidagi bo‘sh tovoqlarni yig‘ishtirdi.
Bu tovoq gazaklar berish uchun juda mos.

words.definition: A tool with prongs used for picking up and eating food.
words.definitionUz: Sanchqi - ovqatni olish va yeyish uchun tishlari bo‘lgan asbob.
words.example1: He used a fork to eat his salad.
words.example2: Can you pass me a knife and fork, please?
words.example2Translation: Iltimos, menga pichoq va sanchqi uzatib bersangiz.
words.example3: The fork fell under the table during dinner.
words.example3Translation: Kechki ovqat paytida sanchqi stol ostiga tushib ketdi.
extraExamples: She prefers using a fork instead of chopsticks.
The silver forks were polished for the party.
Be careful not to bend the fork.
He stabbed the piece of meat with his fork.
There are different sizes of forks for different foods.
The child was learning how to hold a fork properly.
We need more forks for all the guests.
extraExampleTranslations: U tayoqchalar o‘rniga sanchqi ishlatishni afzal ko‘radi.
Kumush sanchqilar ziyofat uchun sayqallangan edi.
U go‘sht bo‘lagini sanchqisi bilan sanchdi.
Turli ovqatlar uchun turli o‘lchamdagi sanchqilar bor.
Bola sanchqini to‘g‘ri ushlashni o‘rganayotgan edi.
Barcha mehmonlar uchun ko‘proq sanchqi kerak.

words.definition: A tool with a sharp blade used for cutting food.
words.definitionUz: Pichoq - ovqatni kesish uchun o‘tkir tig‘li asbob.
words.example1: She used a sharp knife to cut the vegetables.
words.example1Translation: U sabzavotlarni o‘tkir pichoq bilan kesdi.
words.example2: Be careful with that knife, it's very sharp.
words.example2Translation: Bu pichoq bilan ehtiyot bo‘ling, u juda o‘tkir.
words.example3: He placed the knife and fork beside the plate.
words.example3Translation: U pichoq va sanchqini tovoq yoniga qo‘ydi.
extraExamples: The kitchen knife needs to be sharpened.
Never run with a knife in your hand.
She bought a new set of steak knives.
The chef skillfully used his knife to prepare the meal.
This knife is perfect for slicing bread.
He accidentally cut his finger with the knife.
All the knives were washed and put away.
extraExampleTranslations: U yangi biftek pichoqlari to‘plamini sotib oldi.
Oshpaz ovqatni tayyorlashda pichog‘ini mohirona ishlatdi.
Bu pichoq nonni bo‘laklash uchun juda mos.
U tasodifan barmog‘ini pichoq bilan kesib oldi.

words.definition: A tool with a shallow bowl at the end used for eating or stirring liquids.
words.definitionUz: Qoshiq - suyuqlik ichish yoki aralashtirish uchun oxirida chuqurchasi bor asbob.
words.example1: He stirred his soup with a spoon.
words.example2: She needs a spoon for her yogurt.
words.example3: The baby was learning to eat with a spoon.
words.example3Translation: Chaqaloq qoshiq bilan ovqat yeyishni o‘rganayotgan edi.
extraExamples: There are teaspoons and tablespoons in the drawer.
He took a big spoon of sugar for his tea.
The silver spoon was part of an old family set.
Don't forget to bring a spoon for the dessert.
She washed all the spoons after cooking.
This spoon is too small for eating soup.
The children played with plastic spoons.
extraExampleTranslations: Tortmada choy qoshiqlari va osh qoshiqlari bor.
U choyiga katta qoshiq shakar oldi.
Kumush qoshiq eski oilaviy to‘plamning bir qismi edi.
Desert uchun qoshiq olib kelishni unutmang.
U pishirgandan keyin barcha qoshiqlarni yuvdi.
Bu qoshiq sho‘rva ichish uchun juda kichik.

words.definition: A small flat piece of metal used as money.
words.definitionUz: Tanga - pul sifatida ishlatiladigan kichik tekis metall bo‘lagi.
words.example1: He found an old coin on the street.
words.example2: She collected coins from different countries.
words.example3: You need a coin to use the shopping cart.
extraExamples: The machine only accepts coins, not bills.
He flipped a coin to decide who would go first.
Ancient coins are displayed in the museum.
She saved some coins in a small jar.
The new coin design features a famous building.
Don't lose that lucky coin.
He paid with exact coins for the bus fare.
extraExampleTranslations: Mashina faqat tangalarni qabul qiladi, qog‘oz pullarni emas.
U kim birinchi bo‘lishini hal qilish uchun tanga otib ko‘rdi.
U bir oz tangalarni kichik bankaga saqladi.
Yangi tanga dizaynida mashhur bino tasvirlangan.
U avtobus chiptasi uchun aniq tangalar bilan to‘ladi.

words.definition: A small flat case used for carrying money, cards, and other personal items.
words.definitionUz: Hamyon - pul, kartalar va boshqa shaxsiy narsalarni saqlash uchun kichik tekis g‘ilof.
words.example1: He kept his money and ID in his wallet.
words.example1Translation: U puli va guvohnomasini hamyonida saqlardi.
words.example2: She lost her wallet at the shopping mall.
words.example2Translation: U savdo markazida hamyonini yo‘qotib qo‘ydi.
words.example3: His wallet was full of credit cards.
words.example3Translation: Uning hamyoni kredit kartalari bilan to‘la edi.
extraExamples: I need a new leather wallet for my birthday.
Don't forget your wallet when you go out.
She found a black wallet on the bench.
He took some cash out of his wallet.
The wallet has many compartments for cards.
Her wallet was stolen on the bus.
This wallet is very slim and practical.
extraExampleTranslations: Tug‘ilgan kunimga yangi charm hamyon kerak.
U hamyonidan bir oz naqd pul oldi.
Hamyonda kartalar uchun ko‘p bo‘limlar bor.
Bu hamyon juda yupqa va qulay.

words.definition: A device used for making calls and sending messages.
words.definitionUz: Telefon - qo‘ng‘iroq qilish va xabar yuborish uchun ishlatiladigan qurilma.
words.example1: She talked on the phone for over an hour.
words.example1Translation: U telefonda bir soatdan ortiq gaplashdi.
words.example2: My phone battery is almost dead.
words.example3: He checked his phone for new messages.
words.example3Translation: U yangi xabarlarni tekshirish uchun telefonini ko‘rib chiqdi.
extraExamples: I left my phone at home this morning.
Can I use your phone to make a call?
The phone rang several times before she answered.
She bought a new smartphone last week.
His phone takes amazing photos.
Don't use your phone while driving.
The office phone was busy all day.
extraExampleTranslations: Qo‘ng‘iroq qilish uchun telefoningizdan foydalansam bo‘ladimi?
Telefon bir necha marta jiringladi, keyin u javob berdi.
U o‘tgan hafta yangi smartfon sotib oldi.
Ofis telefoni kun bo‘yi band edi.

words.definition: A substance used with water for washing and cleaning.
words.definitionUz: Sovun - yuvish va tozalash uchun suv bilan ishlatiladigan modda.
words.example1: She washed her hands with soap and water.
words.example1Translation: U qo‘llarini sovun va suv bilan yuvdi.
words.example2: We need to buy more liquid soap for the kitchen.
words.example2Translation: Oshxona uchun yana suyuq sovun sotib olishimiz kerak.
words.example3: The soap has a nice lavender smell.
extraExamples: He used scented soap in the shower.
The bar of soap was almost finished.
Don't forget the soap when you go camping.
This soap is good for sensitive skin.
She dropped the soap on the wet floor.
They make handmade natural soap at home.
Wash the dishes with dish soap.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu sovun sezgir teri uchun yaxshi.
U sovunni nam polga tashlab yubordi.
Ular uyda qo‘lda tayyorlangan tabiiy sovun yasaydilar.
Idishlarni idish yuvish sovuni bilan yuving.

words.definition: A piece of cloth used for drying things, especially the body after washing.
words.definitionUz: Sochiq - narsalarni, ayniqsa yuvinishdan keyin tanani quritish uchun mato bo‘lagi.
words.example1: He dried his hands with a clean towel.
words.example1Translation: U qo‘llarini toza sochiq bilan quritdi.
words.example2: Don't forget to bring a beach towel for the trip.
words.example2Translation: Sayohat uchun plyaj sochiqni olib kelishni unutmang.
words.example3: The hotel provides fresh towels every day.
words.example3Translation: Mehmonxona har kuni yangi sochiqlar beradi.
extraExamples: She wrapped the towel around her hair.
The kitchen towel is hanging on the hook.
We need more bath towels for the guests.
He used a paper towel to clean the spill.
The towel was soft and fluffy after washing.
Hang the wet towel to dry.
She bought colorful towels for the bathroom.
extraExampleTranslations: Mehmonlar uchun ko‘proq cho‘milish sochiqlari kerak.
U to‘kilgan narsani qog‘oz sochiq bilan tozaladi.
Yuvilgandan keyin sochiq yumshoq va momiq edi.
Ho‘l sochiqni quritish uchun osib qo‘ying.
U hammom uchun rang-barang sochiqlar sotib oldi.

words.definition: Any substance that people or animals eat or drink to stay alive and get energy.
words.definitionUz: Ovqat - odamlar yoki hayvonlar tirik qolish va kuch olish uchun yeydigan yoki ichadigan har qanday modda.
words.example1: We need to buy some food for the week.
words.example1Translation: Biz bir haftaga ovqat sotib olishimiz kerak.
words.example2: Healthy food is important for a strong body.
words.example2Translation: Sog‘lom ovqat kuchli tana uchun muhim.
words.example3: The restaurant serves delicious local food.
extraExamples: She loves cooking food for her family.
There is plenty of food left from the party.
Fast food is convenient but not always healthy.
They donated food to people in need.
The cat is waiting for its food.
He packed some food for the picnic.
Good food makes people happy.
extraExampleTranslations: U oilasi uchun ovqat pishirishni yaxshi ko‘radi.
Tez ovqat qulay, lekin har doim ham sog‘lom emas.
Ular muhtoj odamlarga ovqat ehson qildilar.
U piknik uchun bir oz ovqat qadoqladi.

words.definition: A clear liquid that is essential for all forms of life.
words.definitionUz: Suv - barcha hayot shakllari uchun zarur bo‘lgan tiniq suyuqlik.
words.example1: Drink plenty of water every day.
words.example2: She poured water into the glass.
words.example3: The plants need water to grow.
extraExamples: The water in the lake was very cold.
He filled the bottle with fresh water.
Clean drinking water is very important.
They went swimming in the clear water.
Add some water to the soup if it's too thick.
The flowers were watered in the morning.
She prefers sparkling water with lemon.
extraExampleTranslations: U shishani toza suv bilan to‘ldirdi.
Agar sho‘rva juda qalin bo‘lsa, unga bir oz suv qo‘shing.
U limonli gazlangan suvni afzal ko‘radi.

words.definition: A food made from flour, water, and yeast that is baked.
words.definitionUz: Non - un, suv va xamirturushdan tayyorlanib, pishiriladigan ovqat.
words.example1: She bought fresh bread from the bakery.
words.example1Translation: U novvoyxonadan yangi non sotib oldi.
words.example2: We eat bread with every meal.
words.example2Translation: Biz har ovqat bilan non yeymiz.
words.example3: The smell of baking bread filled the kitchen.
extraExamples: He sliced the bread for sandwiches.
This bread is still warm from the oven.
Traditional Uzbek bread is called non.
Don't throw away old bread, make toast.
The children love bread with butter.
She baked two loaves of bread yesterday.
Bread is a staple food in many cultures.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu non hali pechdan chiqqan issiq.
Bolalar nonni sariyog‘ bilan yeyishni yaxshi ko‘radilar.
Non ko‘p madaniyatlarda asosiy ovqat hisoblanadi.

words.definition: Small white or brown grains cooked and eaten as food.
words.definitionUz: Guruch - pishirib yeyiladigan kichik oq yoki jigarrang donalar.
words.example1: We had rice with chicken for dinner.
words.example1Translation: Kechki ovqatga tovuq bilan guruch yedik.
words.example2: She cooked a big pot of rice.
words.example3: Rice is a main food in many Asian countries.
words.example3Translation: Guruch ko‘p Osiyo mamlakatlarida asosiy ovqat.
extraExamples: The rice was fluffy and delicious.
He added some vegetables to the rice.
Uzbek plov is made with special rice.
Wash the rice before cooking it.
There is leftover rice in the fridge.
She served the curry with steamed rice.
Rice grows in wet fields.
extraExampleTranslations: U guruchga bir oz sabzavot qo‘shdi.
O‘zbek palovi maxsus guruch bilan tayyorlanadi.
U karri bilan bug‘langan guruch berdi.

words.definition: Italian food made from flour and water, shaped in various forms and usually boiled.
words.definitionUz: Makaron - un va suvdan tayyorlanadigan, turli shakllarda bo‘lgan va odatda qaynatiladigan italyan ovqati.
words.example1: We ate pasta with tomato sauce for lunch.
words.example1Translation: Tushlikka pomidor sousi bilan makaron yedik.
words.example2: She cooked pasta for the whole family.
words.example2Translation: U butun oila uchun makaron pishirdi.
words.example3: Pasta is one of my favorite Italian dishes.
words.example3Translation: Makaron mening sevimli italyan taomlarimdan biri.
extraExamples: Add some cheese on top of the pasta.
The pasta was perfectly cooked.
He likes spaghetti, a type of long pasta.
She bought dried pasta from the store.
Pasta salad is great for summer picnics.
Boil the pasta in salted water.
This pasta has a nice texture.
extraExampleTranslations: Makaron ustiga bir oz pishloq qo‘shing.
U uzun makaron bo‘lgan spagettini yaxshi ko‘radi.
U do‘kondan quritilgan makaron sotib oldi.
Makaron salati yozgi pikniklar uchun ajoyib.

words.definition: The flesh of animals used as food.
words.definitionUz: Go‘sht - ovqat sifatida ishlatiladigan hayvonlarning go‘shti.
words.example1: He eats meat almost every day.
words.example1Translation: U deyarli har kuni go‘sht yeydi.
words.example2: The meat was grilled to perfection.
words.example3: We need to buy fresh meat from the market.
words.example3Translation: Bozordan yangi go‘sht sotib olishimiz kerak.
extraExamples: Red meat should be eaten in moderation.
She cooked the meat with onions and spices.
This restaurant serves the best meat dishes.
He doesn't eat meat on certain days.
The meat was tender and juicy.
Buy some meat for the barbecue.
Chicken is a type of white meat.
extraExampleTranslations: Qizil go‘shtni mo‘tadil miqdorda yeyish kerak.
U go‘shtni piyoz va ziravorlar bilan pishirdi.
Bu restoranda eng yaxshi go‘shtli taomlar beriladi.
Barbekyu uchun bir oz go‘sht sotib oling.

words.definition: Meat from a chicken, commonly eaten as food.
words.definitionUz: Tovuq - ovqat sifatida keng yeyiladigan tovuq go‘shti.
words.example1: We had grilled chicken for dinner.
words.example2: She bought chicken from the supermarket.
words.example3: Chicken soup is good when you are sick.
extraExamples: Fried chicken is very popular.
The chicken was seasoned with herbs.
He prefers boneless chicken.
Roast chicken with vegetables is delicious.
She made chicken sandwiches for lunch.
Buy some chicken breasts for the recipe.
The children love chicken nuggets.
extraExampleTranslations: U tushlik uchun tovuq sendvichlari tayyorladi.
Retsept uchun tovuq ko‘kragini sotib oling.

words.definition: Meat from a fish eaten as food.
words.definitionUz: Baliq - ovqat sifatida yeyiladigan baliq go‘shti.
words.example1: We ate fresh fish by the sea.
words.example1Translation: Biz dengiz bo‘yida yangi baliq yedik.
words.example2: She cooked fish with lemon and herbs.
words.example2Translation: U baliqni limon va o‘simliklar bilan pishirdi.
words.example3: Fish is rich in healthy oils.
extraExamples: Grilled fish is my favorite.
He caught a big fish yesterday.
The market has fresh fish every morning.
She doesn't like the smell of fish.
Fried fish and chips is a classic dish.
We need more fish for the family.
Sushi is made with raw fish.
extraExampleTranslations: Bozorda har kuni ertalab yangi baliq bor.
Qovurilgan baliq va chips klassik taom.

words.definition: A round object laid by birds, especially chickens, often eaten as food.
words.definitionUz: Tuxum - qushlar, ayniqsa tovuqlar tomonidan qo‘yiladigan dumaloq narsa, ko‘pincha ovqat sifatida yeyiladi.
words.example1: She had two boiled eggs for breakfast.
words.example1Translation: U nonushtaga ikkita qaynatilgan tuxum yedi.
words.example2: Break the egg into the bowl.
words.example3: Eggs are a good source of protein.
extraExamples: He likes his eggs scrambled.
We need a dozen eggs for the cake.
The egg was fried on both sides.
Fresh eggs taste much better.
She added an egg to the mixture.
Birds build nests for their eggs.
Omelette is made with eggs.
extraExampleTranslations: Tort uchun o‘n ikkita tuxum kerak.

words.definition: A white liquid produced by cows and other animals, used as food and drink.
words.definitionUz: Sut - sigir va boshqa hayvonlar tomonidan ishlab chiqariladigan oq suyuqlik, ovqat va ichimlik sifatida ishlatiladi.
words.example1: Children should drink milk for strong bones.
words.example1Translation: Bolalar kuchli suyaklar uchun sut ichishlari kerak.
words.example2: She poured milk into her coffee.
words.example3: We buy fresh milk from the farm.
words.example3Translation: Biz fermadan yangi sut sotib olamiz.
extraExamples: He drinks a glass of milk every evening.
The recipe calls for two cups of milk.
Milk goes bad if not kept in the fridge.
She prefers almond milk.
Warm milk helps you sleep better.
They sell milk in bottles and cartons.
Add some milk to make the sauce creamier.
extraExampleTranslations: U har oqshom bir stakan sut ichadi.
Retsept ikki chashka sutni talab qiladi.
Ular sutni shisha va kartonlarda sotadilar.
Sosni kremroq qilish uchun bir oz sut qo‘shing.

words.definition: A soft yellow food made from cream, used on bread or in cooking.
words.definitionUz: Sariyog‘ - qaymoqdan tayyorlanadigan yumshoq sariq ovqat, non ustiga yoki pishirishda ishlatiladi.
words.example1: She spread butter on her toast.
words.example2: The recipe needs butter and sugar.
words.example2Translation: Retsept sariyog‘ va shakarni talab qiladi.
words.example3: Butter melts quickly in a hot pan.
extraExamples: Peanut butter is very popular.
He bought unsalted butter.
Add a little butter to the vegetables.
The butter was stored in the fridge.
She makes cookies with butter.
Bread and butter is a simple snack.
This cake is made with real butter.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu tort haqiqiy sariyog‘ bilan tayyorlangan.

words.definition: A food made from milk, often yellow or white, that can be soft or hard.
words.definitionUz: Pishloq - sutdan tayyorlanadigan, ko‘pincha sariq yoki oq, yumshoq yoki qattiq bo‘lishi mumkin bo‘lgan ovqat.
words.example1: He put cheese on his sandwich.
words.example2: She likes to eat cheese with grapes.
words.example2Translation: U pishloqni uzum bilan yeyishni yaxshi ko‘radi.
words.example3: This cheese has a strong flavor.
extraExamples: Pizza is usually topped with cheese.
They sell different types of cheese.
Grate some cheese over the pasta.
The cheese melted nicely on the bread.
She bought Swiss cheese.
Cheese is rich in calcium.
Avoid old cheese if it smells bad.
extraExampleTranslations: Makaron ustiga bir oz pishloq maydalang.
Agar hidi yomon bo‘lsa, eski pishloqdan saqlaning.

words.definition: A white substance added to food to make it taste better.
words.definitionUz: Tuz - ovqatning ta'mini yaxshilash uchun qo‘shiladigan oq modda.
words.example1: Add a pinch of salt to the soup.
words.example2: The food needs more salt.
words.example3: Salt is essential in cooking.
extraExamples: She sprinkled salt on the vegetables.
Don't eat too much salt.
Sea salt has a better taste.
The recipe calls for salt and pepper.
He forgot to add salt to the pasta water.
Salt helps preserve food.
This dish has the perfect amount of salt.
extraExampleTranslations: Retsept tuz va qalampirni talab qiladi.
U makaron suviga tuz qo‘shishni unutdi.
Bu taomda tuz miqdori juda mos.

words.definition: A sweet substance used in food and drinks.
words.definitionUz: Shakar - ovqat va ichimliklarga shirinlik qo‘shish uchun ishlatiladigan modda.
words.example1: She added sugar to her tea.
words.example2: Too much sugar is not good for health.
words.example2Translation: Juda ko‘p shakar salomatlik uchun yaxshi emas.
words.example3: The cake has a lot of sugar in it.
extraExamples: He prefers his coffee without sugar.
Brown sugar is used in baking.
Dissolve the sugar in warm water.
The recipe needs two spoons of sugar.
Children like sweet foods with sugar.
She bought a bag of white sugar.
Reduce sugar to make it healthier.
extraExampleTranslations: U qahvasini shakarsiz ichishni afzal ko‘radi.
Retsept ikki qoshiq shakarni talab qiladi.
Bolalar shakarli shirin ovqatlarni yaxshi ko‘radilar.
U bir qop oq shakar sotib oldi.

words.definition: A spicy powder made from dried peppers, used to add flavor to food.
words.definitionUz: Qalampir - quritilgan qalampirlardan tayyorlanadigan achchiq kukun, ovqatga ta'm qo‘shish uchun ishlatiladi.
words.example1: Add some black pepper to the soup.
words.example1Translation: Sho‘rvaga bir oz qora qalampir qo‘shing.
words.example2: She likes food with a lot of pepper.
words.example3: Pepper and salt are on the table.
extraExamples: Freshly ground pepper tastes better.
The recipe calls for red pepper.
He sprinkled pepper on his steak.
This pepper is quite spicy.
Mix salt and pepper together.
She bought a pepper grinder.
Avoid too much pepper if you have stomach problems.
extraExampleTranslations: Agar oshqozon muammosi bo‘lsa, juda ko‘p qalampirdan saqlaning.

words.definition: A liquid fat used for cooking or as food.
words.definitionUz: Yog‘ - pishirish yoki ovqat sifatida ishlatiladigan suyuq yog‘.
words.example1: Heat some oil in the pan.
words.example2: She uses olive oil for salads.
words.example2Translation: U salatlar uchun zaytun yog‘idan foydalanadi.
words.example3: The recipe needs two tablespoons of oil.
words.example3Translation: Retsept ikki osh qoshiq yog‘ni talab qiladi.
extraExamples: Vegetable oil is good for frying.
The car needs more engine oil.
She drizzled oil over the vegetables.
This oil has a nice flavor.
Don't use too much oil when cooking.
Sunflower oil is common in kitchens.
The machine runs on special oil.

words.definition: The sweet part of a plant that contains seeds and can be eaten.
words.definitionUz: Meva - o‘simlikning urug‘li va yeyiladigan shirin qismi.
words.example1: Eat more fruit for better health.
words.example2: She bought fresh fruit at the market.
words.example2Translation: U bozordan yangi meva sotib oldi.
words.example3: Fruit salad is perfect for summer.
words.example3Translation: Meva salati yoz uchun juda mos.
extraExamples: Apples and bananas are popular fruits.
He likes fruit juice in the morning.
The tree produces sweet fruit.
Wash the fruit before eating.
She made a smoothie with mixed fruit.
Fruit is rich in vitamins.
They grow organic fruit on the farm.
extraExampleTranslations: U ertalab meva sharbati ichishni yaxshi ko‘radi.

words.definition: A round fruit with red, green, or yellow skin and white flesh.
words.definitionUz: Olma - qizil, yashil yoki sariq po‘stlog‘i va oq go‘shti bo‘lgan dumaloq meva.
words.example1: She ate a fresh apple after lunch.
words.example1Translation: U tushlikdan keyin yangi olma yedi.
words.example2: An apple a day keeps the doctor away.
words.example3: The apple pie smelled delicious.
words.example3Translation: Olma pirogi juda mazali hid chiqardi.
extraExamples: He bought red apples from the market.
The apple was sweet and juicy.
She made apple juice at home.
Green apples are more sour.
The children picked apples from the tree.
This apple is perfect for baking.
Don't forget to wash the apple.
extraExampleTranslations: U bozordan qizil olmalar sotib oldi.
Bu olma pishirish uchun juda mos.

words.definition: A long curved yellow fruit.
words.definitionUz: Banan - uzun egri sariq meva.
words.example1: He ate a banana for a quick snack.
words.example1Translation: U tez gazak uchun banan yedi.
words.example2: Bananas are rich in potassium.
words.example3: She put banana in her morning smoothie.
extraExamples: The banana was perfectly ripe.
Buy some bananas for the children.
Banana bread is my favorite.
She slipped on a banana peel.
Bananas turn brown when ripe.
He added banana to his cereal.
This banana is still a bit green.

words.definition: A round juicy fruit with orange skin and sweet taste.
words.definitionUz: Apelsin - to‘q sariq po‘stlog‘i va shirin ta'mli dumaloq suvli meva.
words.example1: She drank fresh orange juice.
words.example2: Oranges are full of vitamin C.
words.example3: He peeled an orange for his daughter.
extraExamples: The orange was sweet and juicy.
Buy a bag of oranges for the family.
Orange trees grow in warm places.
She likes orange marmalade.
The color orange is named after the fruit.
Add orange slices to the water.
This orange is easy to peel.
extraExampleTranslations: Oilaga bir qop apelsin sotib oling.

words.definition: A plant or part of a plant used as food, usually not sweet.
words.definitionUz: Sabzavot - odatda shirin bo‘lmagan, ovqat sifatida ishlatiladigan o‘simlik yoki uning qismi.
words.example1: Eat plenty of vegetables every day.
words.example2: She cooked mixed vegetables.
words.example3: Fresh vegetables are good for health.
extraExamples: Green vegetables are very nutritious.
He grows vegetables in his garden.
The soup contains many vegetables.
Buy vegetables from the local market.
Children should eat more vegetables.
She made a vegetable salad.
Frozen vegetables are convenient.

words.definition: A long orange root vegetable.
words.definitionUz: Sabzi - uzun to‘q sariq ildiz sabzavot.
words.example1: She added carrots to the soup.
words.example2: Carrots are good for your eyes.
words.example3: The rabbit ate a fresh carrot.
extraExamples: Grate some carrots for the salad.
He likes raw carrots as a snack.
Carrot cake is very popular.
The carrots were sweet and crunchy.
Buy some carrots at the market.
She cooked carrots with butter.
Carrots grow underground.
extraExampleTranslations: Salat uchun bir oz sabzi maydalang.
U xom sabzini gazak sifatida yaxshi ko‘radi.
Bozordan bir oz sabzi sotib oling.

words.definition: A round root vegetable with brown skin, eaten cooked.
words.definitionUz: Kartoshka - jigarrang po‘stlog‘i bo‘lgan dumaloq ildiz sabzavot, pishirib yeyiladi.
words.example1: We had mashed potatoes with dinner.
words.example2: She baked potatoes in the oven.
words.example3: Potatoes are a popular side dish.
extraExamples: Fried potatoes are delicious.
The potato soup was very tasty.
He planted potatoes in the garden.
Peel the potatoes before cooking.
Sweet potatoes are also healthy.
Buy a bag of potatoes.
This potato is quite big.

words.definition: A round red fruit used as a vegetable in cooking.
words.definitionUz: Pomidor - pishirishda sabzavot sifatida ishlatiladigan dumaloq qizil meva.
words.example1: She made a salad with tomatoes.
words.example2: Tomatoes are used in many sauces.
words.example3: The tomato was ripe and juicy.
extraExamples: Add sliced tomatoes to the sandwich.
Fresh tomatoes taste the best.
She grows tomatoes in her garden.
Tomato soup is comforting.
Buy some ripe tomatoes.
The sauce is made from tomatoes.
Cherry tomatoes are small and sweet.
extraExampleTranslations: Bir oz pishgan pomidor sotib oling.

words.definition: A round vegetable with layers and a strong smell and taste.
words.definitionUz: Piyoz - qatlamli, kuchli hid va ta'mga ega dumaloq sabzavot.
words.example1: She chopped onions for the soup.
words.example2: Onions make your eyes water.
words.example3: Add fried onions on top.
extraExamples: Red onions are sweeter.
The recipe needs one large onion.
He planted onions in the garden.
Onions are used in many dishes.
Slice the onion thinly.
This onion is very strong.
Cook the onions until golden.
extraExampleTranslations: Retsept bitta katta piyozni talab qiladi.

words.definition: A liquid food made by boiling meat, vegetables, or other ingredients.
words.definitionUz: Sho‘rva - go‘sht, sabzavot yoki boshqa ingredientlarni qaynatib tayyorlanadigan suyuq ovqat.
words.example1: She made chicken soup for dinner.
words.example1Translation: U kechki ovqatga tovuq sho‘rvasi pishirdi.
words.example2: Hot soup is perfect on cold days.
words.example2Translation: Sovuq kunlarda issiq sho‘rva juda yaxshi.
words.example3: The soup was delicious and filling.
extraExamples: Vegetable soup is healthy.
He ate a bowl of soup.
This soup needs more salt.
Mushroom soup is my favorite.
She stirred the soup slowly.
The restaurant serves excellent soup.
Homemade soup tastes the best.
extraExampleTranslations: Uyda tayyorlangan sho‘rva ta'mi eng yaxshi.

words.definition: Two slices of bread with food between them.
words.definitionUz: Sendvich - ikkita non bo‘lagi orasiga ovqat solingan taom.
words.example1: He made a cheese sandwich for lunch.
words.example2: She packed sandwiches for the picnic.
words.example3: This is my favorite sandwich.
extraExamples: The club sandwich has many layers.
Eat your sandwich before it gets cold.
She added tomato to the sandwich.
Ham sandwiches are popular.
He bought a sandwich from the cafe.
Make a quick sandwich for breakfast.
The sandwich was fresh and tasty.

words.definition: A sweet baked food made from flour, sugar, eggs, and butter.
words.definitionUz: Tort - un, shakar, tuxum va sariyog‘dan tayyorlanadigan shirin pishiriq.
words.example1: She baked a chocolate cake for the party.
words.example1Translation: U ziyofat uchun shokolad tortini pishirdi.
words.example2: We cut the birthday cake together.
words.example2Translation: Biz tug‘ilgan kun tortini birga kesdik.
words.example3: The cake was soft and delicious.
extraExamples: He likes fruit cake.
The wedding cake had three layers.
She decorated the cake with cream.
This cake is too sweet for me.
Buy a small cake for dessert.
They sang while cutting the cake.
Homemade cake is the best.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu tort men uchun juda shirin.
Desert uchun kichik tort sotib oling.

words.definition: A sweet food made from cocoa, sugar, and milk.
words.definitionUz: Shokolad - kakao, shakar va sutdan tayyorlanadigan shirin ovqat.
words.example1: She gave him a box of chocolate.
words.example1Translation: U unga bir quti shokolad sovg‘a qildi.
words.example2: Children love eating chocolate.
words.example3: Dark chocolate is healthier than milk chocolate.
words.example3Translation: Qora shokolad sutli shokoladga qaraganda foydaliroq.
extraExamples: He bought chocolate ice cream.
The cake is covered with chocolate.
She melted the chocolate for the recipe.
This chocolate has nuts inside.
Avoid eating too much chocolate.
White chocolate is also popular.
They gave chocolate as gifts.

words.definition: A hot drink made by infusing dried leaves of the tea plant in boiling water.
words.definitionUz: Choy — bu choy o'simligining quritilgan barglarini qaynoq suvda damlab tayyorlanadigan issiq ichimlik.
words.example1: She starts every morning with a cup of green tea.
words.example1Translation: U har kuni ertalab bir piyola ko'k choy ichishdan boshlaydi.
words.example2: Would you like some milk in your tea?
words.example3: Tea is an important part of social gatherings in many cultures.
words.example3Translation: Choy ko'p madaniyatlarda ijtimoiy yig'inlarning muhim qismidir.
extraExamples: The British are famous for drinking afternoon tea with cakes.
Herbal tea helps me relax before going to bed.
They served traditional mint tea in small glasses.
Tea production is a major industry in several Asian countries.
I prefer black tea without sugar.
Drinking too much strong tea can stain your teeth.
Let’s meet for tea and discuss the project.
extraExampleTranslations: Britaniyaliklar tushlikdan keyin choy va keklar bilan mashhur.
O'simlik choyi uxlaganimdan oldin bo'shashimga yordam beradi.
Ular an'anaviy yalpiz choyini kichik stakanlarda berishdi.
Choy ishlab chiqarish bir necha Osiyo mamlakatlarida muhim sanoatdir.
Men shakarsiz qora choyni afzal ko'raman.
Juda kuchli choy ichish tishlaringizni bo'yashi mumkin.

words.definition: A drink made from roasted coffee beans, usually served hot.
words.definitionUz: Qahva — bu qovurilgan qahva donalaridan tayyorlanadigan, odatda issiq ichiladigan ichimlik.
words.example1: I need a strong coffee to wake up in the morning.
words.example1Translation: Ertalab uyg'onish uchun menga kuchli qahva kerak.
words.example2: They met at the coffee shop to discuss business.
words.example2Translation: Ular biznesni muhokama qilish uchun qahvaxonada uchrashdilar.
words.example3: Coffee is one of the most popular beverages in the world.
words.example3Translation: Qahva dunyodagi eng mashhur ichimliklardan biridir.
extraExamples: She drinks her coffee black with no sugar.
The smell of fresh coffee filled the kitchen.
Espresso is a type of strong Italian coffee.
Many people cannot start their day without coffee.
Coffee plantations are common in tropical regions.
Decaffeinated coffee is a good option for evening.
He spilled coffee on his important documents.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko'p odamlar kunni qahvasiz boshlay olmaydi.
Qahva plantatsiyalari tropik hududlarda keng tarqalgan.
Kofeinsiz qahva kechqurun uchun yaxshi variant.
U qahvani muhim hujjatlariga to'kib yubordi.

words.definition: The liquid that comes from fruit or vegetables.
words.definitionUz: Sharbat — meva yoki sabzavotlardan chiqadigan suyuqlik.
words.example1: She drinks fresh orange juice every morning.
words.example1Translation: U har kuni ertalab yangi apelsin sharbatini ichadi.
words.example2: The shop sells a variety of fruit juices.
words.example3: Children love apple juice with their meals.
words.example3Translation: Bolalar ovqat bilan olma sharbatini yaxshi ko'radilar.
extraExamples: Carrot juice is rich in vitamin A.
He ordered a glass of mango juice.
Fresh juice is healthier than packaged juice.
Mixing different juices creates delicious combinations.
She makes homemade juice from garden fruits.
Too much sweet juice can harm your teeth.
The recipe calls for lemon juice.
extraExampleTranslations: U bir stakan mango sharbatini buyurdi.
Turli sharbatlarni aralashtirish mazali kombinatsiyalar hosil qiladi.
U bog'dagi mevalardan uy sharoitida sharbat tayyorlaydi.
Juda shirin sharbat tishlarga zarar yetkazishi mumkin.

words.definition: A large and important town with many buildings, people, and services.
words.definitionUz: Shahar — ko'p binolar, odamlar va xizmatlar mavjud bo'lgan katta va muhim shaharcha.
words.example1: New York is one of the biggest cities in the world.
words.example1Translation: Nyu-York dunyodagi eng katta shaharlardan biridir.
words.example2: Life in the city is faster and more exciting than in the countryside.
words.example2Translation: Shahar hayoti qishloqdagi hayotdan tezroq va qiziqarliroq.
words.example3: She moved to the city to find a better job.
words.example3Translation: U yaxshiroq ish topish uchun shaharga ko'chib o'tdi.
extraExamples: Traffic is always heavy in big cities.
The city center is full of shops and restaurants.
Many cities face problems with pollution.
He grew up in a small city near the coast.
The government is investing in smart city technology.
Cities offer more cultural opportunities than towns.
She loves the energy of city life.
extraExampleTranslations: Katta shaharlarda har doim tirbandlik kuchli.
Shahar markazi do'konlar va restoranlarga to'la.
Ko'p shaharlar ifloslanish muammolariga duch keladi.
U dengiz bo'yidagi kichik shaharda o'sgan.
Hukumat aqlli shahar texnologiyasiga sarmoya kiritmoqda.
Shaharlarda shaharchalarga qaraganda ko'proq madaniy imkoniyatlar bor.
U shahar hayotining energiyasini yaxshi ko'radi.

words.definition: A place with houses, shops, and other buildings where people live and work, smaller than a city.
words.definitionUz: Shaharcha — odamlar yashaydigan va ishlaydigan uy, do'kon va boshqa binolar mavjud bo'lgan, shahardan kichikroq joy.
words.example1: They live in a quiet town near the mountains.
words.example1Translation: Ular tog'lar yaqinidagi tinch shaharchada yashaydilar.
words.example2: The town square is busy on market days.
words.example2Translation: Bo'zor kunlarida shaharcha maydoni gavjum bo'ladi.
words.example3: This town has a beautiful old church.
words.example3Translation: Bu shaharchada chiroyli eski cherkov bor.
extraExamples: Small towns often have a strong sense of community.
The town grew rapidly after the new factory opened.
We drove through several towns on our way to the capital.
She works in the next town.
Local festivals bring the whole town together.
The town hall is the center of local government.
Life in a town is calmer than in a big city.
extraExampleTranslations: Kichik shaharchalarda jamoa tuyg'usi kuchli bo'ladi.
Yangi zavod ochilgandan keyin shaharcha tez o'sdi.
Biz poytaxtga ketayotib bir necha shaharchalardan o'tdik.
Shaharchadagi hayot katta shaharga qaraganda tinchroq.

words.definition: A small community in a rural area, usually with houses, a church, and some shops.
words.definitionUz: Qishloq — qishloq hududidagi kichik jamoa, odatda uylar, cherkov va bir necha do'konlar mavjud.
words.example1: The village is surrounded by beautiful green fields.
words.example1Translation: Qishloq go'zal yashil dalalar bilan o'ralgan.
words.example2: Life in the village is peaceful and slow.
words.example2Translation: Qishloq hayoti tinch va sekin kechadi.
words.example3: Many young people leave the village to find work in cities.
words.example3Translation: Ko'p yoshlar ish topish uchun qishloqdan shaharlarga ketadilar.
extraExamples: The village has only one small school.
We spent our summer holiday in a fishing village.
Traditional festivals are still celebrated in the village.
The village is famous for its handmade cheese.
Electricity reached the remote village last year.
Everyone knows each other in a small village.
The old man has lived in the same village all his life.
extraExampleTranslations: Qishloqda faqat bitta kichik maktab bor.
Biz yozgi ta'tilni baliqchilar qishlog'ida o'tkazdik.
An'anaviy festivallar qishloqda hali ham nishonlanadi.
Qishloq o'zining qo'l mehnati bilan tayyorlangan pishloqlari bilan mashhur.
O'tgan yili elektr energiyasi chekka qishloqqa yetib bordi.
Chol butun umrini bir qishloqda o'tkazgan.

words.definition: A nation with its own government and borders.
words.definitionUz: Mamlakat — o'z hukumati va chegaralari bo'lgan davlat.
words.example1: Japan is a beautiful country with rich traditions.
words.example1Translation: Yaponiya boy an'analarga ega go'zal mamlakat.
words.example2: Which country are you from?
words.example3: Many people travel to different countries every year.
words.example3Translation: Ko'p odamlar har yili turli mamlakatlarga sayohat qiladilar.
extraExamples: The country has a strong economy.
She loves learning about different countries and cultures.
Developing countries face many challenges.
The whole country celebrated the national holiday.
This country is known for its beautiful beaches.
He moved to another country for work.
The country is famous for its football team.
extraExampleTranslations: U turli mamlakatlar va madaniyatlar haqida bilishni yaxshi ko'radi.
Rivojlanayotgan mamlakatlar ko'p qiyinchiliklarga duch keladi.
Bu mamlakat o'zining go'zal plyajlari bilan mashhur.
U ish uchun boshqa mamlakatga ko'chib o'tdi.

words.definition: A public road in a city or town with buildings on both sides.
words.definitionUz: Ko'cha — shahar yoki shaharchada ikki tomonda binolar joylashgan jamoat yo'li.
words.example1: The children are playing in the street.
words.example2: There are many shops on this street.
words.example3: We live on a quiet residential street.
extraExamples: Main Street is always crowded on weekends.
The street lights turn on automatically at night.
She walked down the street looking for the address.
Street musicians were performing near the square.
The city is cleaning the streets after the festival.
He lives just across the street from me.
Bicycles are popular on narrow city streets.
extraExampleTranslations: Asosiy ko'cha dam olish kunlarida doim gavjum.
Ko'cha chiroqlari tunda avtomatik ravishda yonadi.
U manzilni qidirib ko'cha bo'ylab yurdi.
Ko'cha musiqachilari maydon yaqinida chiqish qilishdi.
U mendan ko'chaning narigi tomonida yashaydi.

words.definition: A long way between places that cars and other vehicles can drive on.
words.definitionUz: Yo'l — mashinalar va boshqa transport vositalari yuradigan joylar orasidagi uzun yo'l.
words.example1: The road to the mountains is very steep.
words.example1Translation: Tog'larga olib boradigan yo'l juda tik.
words.example2: We drove along the coastal road.
words.example2Translation: Biz dengiz bo'yidagi yo'l bo'ylab haydadik.
words.example3: Construction work is blocking the main road.
words.example3Translation: Qurilish ishlari asosiy yo'lni to'sib qo'ygan.
extraExamples: The road was wet after the rain.
Follow this road for about five kilometers.
Many accidents happen on this busy road.
The new road will connect two major cities.
They live down a country road.
Road signs help drivers find their way.
Repairing roads is expensive for the government.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu yo'l bo'ylab taxminan besh kilometr yuring.
Bu gavjum yo'lda ko'p baxtsiz hodisalar sodir bo'ladi.
Yangi yo'l ikkita yirik shaharni bog'laydi.
Yo'l belgilari haydovchilarga yo'l topishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: A large public garden or area of land for people to walk, play, and relax.
words.definitionUz: Park — odamlar yurish, o'ynash va dam olish uchun mo'ljallangan katta jamoat bog'i yoki yer maydoni.
words.example1: We had a picnic in the park on Sunday.
words.example2: The city park is full of flowers in spring.
words.example3: Children love playing in the park after school.
words.example3Translation: Bolalar maktabdan keyin parkda o'ynashni yaxshi ko'radilar.
extraExamples: There is a beautiful lake in the middle of the park.
People jog every morning in the park.
The park closes at 10 p.m.
They are building a new playground in the park.
The park offers free concerts in summer.
Dogs must be kept on a lead in the park.
She sat on a bench reading in the park.
extraExampleTranslations: Odamlar har kuni ertalab parkda yugurishadi.
Park yozda bepul kontsertlar taklif qiladi.

words.definition: A place where children go to learn.
words.definitionUz: Maktab — bolalar o'qish uchun boradigan joy.
words.example1: My brother goes to a big school in the city.
words.example1Translation: Mening ukam shahardagi katta maktabda o'qiydi.
words.example2: School starts at 8 o’clock every morning.
words.example2Translation: Maktab har kuni ertalab soat 8 da boshlanadi.
words.example3: She is a teacher at the local primary school.
extraExamples: The school has a large sports field.
Many students take the bus to school.
School holidays begin next week.
He studied hard to get into a good school.
The school organizes trips to museums.
Parents attended the school meeting.
Our school won the regional competition.
extraExampleTranslations: U yaxshi maktabga kirish uchun qattiq o'qidi.
Bizning maktab mintaqaviy musobaqada g'olib bo'ldi.

words.definition: A place where sick or injured people receive medical treatment.
words.definitionUz: Shifoxona — kasal yoki jarohatlangan odamlar tibbiy yordam oladigan joy.
words.example1: He was taken to the hospital after the accident.
words.example1Translation: Baxtsiz hodisadan keyin uni shifoxonaga olib borishdi.
words.example2: The hospital is open 24 hours a day.
words.example3: She works as a nurse in the children’s hospital.
words.example3Translation: U bolalar shifoxonasida hamshira bo'lib ishlaydi.
extraExamples: The new hospital has modern equipment.
Visiting hours at the hospital are from 2 to 6 p.m.
Many doctors work long hours in the hospital.
The hospital treated hundreds of patients during the outbreak.
She was born in the local hospital.
The hospital is located near the train station.
He visited his friend in the hospital.
extraExampleTranslations: Shifoxonada tashrif buyurish vaqti soat 14:00 dan 18:00 gacha.
Ko'p shifokorlar shifoxonada uzoq vaqt ishlaydilar.
Shifoxona epidemiya paytida yuzlab bemorlarni davoladi.
Shifoxona temir yo'l vokzali yaqinida joylashgan.

words.definition: A financial institution where people keep their money and borrow money.
words.definitionUz: Bank — odamlar pullarini saqlaydigan va qarz oladigan moliya muassasasi.
words.example1: I need to go to the bank to withdraw some money.
words.example1Translation: Bir oz pul yechib olish uchun bankka borishim kerak.
words.example2: The bank offers good interest rates on savings.
words.example2Translation: Bank jamg'armalar uchun yaxshi foiz stavkalarini taklif qiladi.
words.example3: She works at the international bank in the city center.
words.example3Translation: U shahar markazidagi xalqaro bankda ishlaydi.
extraExamples: The bank is closed on public holidays.
He got a loan from the bank to buy a car.
Many people use online banking services.
The bank manager helped us open a new account.
There is a bank branch near my house.
Banks play an important role in the economy.
She deposited her salary into the bank.
extraExampleTranslations: U mashina sotib olish uchun bankdan kredit oldi.
Ko'p odamlar onlayn bank xizmatlaridan foydalanadilar.
Bank rahbari yangi hisob ochishga yordam berdi.

words.definition: A place where goods are sold to customers.
words.definitionUz: Do'kon — mijozlarga tovarlar sotiladigan joy.
words.example1: There is a small shop at the corner of the street.
words.example2: She went to the shop to buy some bread.
words.example2Translation: U non sotib olish uchun do'konga bordi.
words.example3: The shop sells fresh vegetables and fruits.
words.example3Translation: Do'konda yangi sabzavot va mevalar sotiladi.
extraExamples: The shop is open from 9 a.m. to 8 p.m.
Many shops offer discounts during sales.
He works in a clothing shop.
The shop window displays beautiful clothes.
Local shops are important for the community.
She loves exploring antique shops.
The shop assistant was very helpful.
extraExampleTranslations: Do'kon ertalab soat 9 dan kechqurun 8 gacha ochiq.
Ko'p do'konlar chegirmalar paytida chegirmalar taklif qiladi.
Do'kon vitrinasida chiroyli kiyimlar namoyish etilgan.
U antiqa buyumlar do'konlarini kezishni yaxshi ko'radi.

words.definition: A large shop that sells food, drinks, and other household goods.
words.definitionUz: Supermarket — oziq-ovqat, ichimlik va uy-ro'zg'or buyumlarini sotadigan katta do'kon.
words.example1: I do my weekly shopping at the supermarket.
words.example2: The supermarket has a wide variety of products.
words.example3: She works as a cashier in the local supermarket.
words.example3Translation: U mahalliy supermarketda kassir bo'lib ishlaydi.
extraExamples: Supermarkets are usually open late in the evening.
We bought everything we needed in one supermarket.
The supermarket offers home delivery service.
Fresh bread is baked daily at the supermarket.
Many supermarkets sell organic products now.
He pushed the shopping trolley around the supermarket.
Prices at the supermarket are quite reasonable.
extraExampleTranslations: Supermarketlar odatda kechqurun kechgacha ochiq bo'ladi.
Biz hamma kerakli narsalarni bitta supermarketdan oldik.
Supermarket uyga yetkazib berish xizmatini taklif qiladi.
Supermarketda yangi non har kuni pishiriladi.
Ko'p supermarketlarda endi organik mahsulotlar sotiladi.
U supermarket bo'ylab xarid aravasini itarib yurdi.

words.definition: A place where people go to eat meals that are cooked and served to them.
words.definitionUz: Restoran — odamlar pishirilgan va ularga xizmat ko'rsatiladigan ovqatlarni yeyish uchun boradigan joy.
words.example1: We had dinner at an Italian restaurant last night.
words.example1Translation: Kecha biz italyan restoranida kechki ovqatlandik.
words.example2: The restaurant is famous for its seafood dishes.
words.example2Translation: Restoran dengiz mahsulotlari taomlari bilan mashhur.
words.example3: Booking a table is recommended at popular restaurants.
words.example3Translation: Mashhur restoranlarda stol band qilish tavsiya etiladi.
extraExamples: The restaurant offers both indoor and outdoor seating.
She works as a waitress in a busy restaurant.
Many restaurants deliver food to your home.
The new restaurant has excellent reviews.
They celebrated their anniversary at a fancy restaurant.
Vegetarian options are available in most restaurants.
The restaurant closes at midnight.
extraExampleTranslations: Restoran ichki va tashqi o'tirish joylarini taklif qiladi.
U gavjum restoranda ofitsiant bo'lib ishlaydi.
Ko'p restoranlar ovqatni uyga yetkazib beradi.

words.definition: A small restaurant where drinks and simple meals are served.
words.definitionUz: Qahvaxona — ichimliklar va oddiy taomlar beriladigan kichik restoran.
words.example1: They met at a cafe near the university.
words.example2: I like to read books while drinking coffee at the cafe.
words.example2Translation: Qahvaxonada qahva ichib kitob o'qishni yaxshi ko'raman.
words.example3: The cafe serves delicious cakes and pastries.
words.example3Translation: Qahvaxona mazali keklar va pishiriqlarni taklif qiladi.
