extraExamples: The cafe has free Wi-Fi for customers.
She works part-time at a small cafe.
Outdoor seating at the cafe is popular in summer.
Many cafes open early in the morning.
The cafe is known for its specialty coffee.
We stopped at a roadside cafe during our trip.
The cafe atmosphere is very relaxing.
extraExampleTranslations: Qahvaxonada mijozlar uchun bepul Wi-Fi bor.
U kichik qahvaxonada yarim kunlik ishlaydi.
Qahvaxonaning ochiq havodagi o'rindiqlari yozda mashhur.
Sayohat paytida yo'l bo'yidagi qahvaxonada to'xtadik.

words.definition: A building where people pay to stay for a short time, usually while travelling.
words.definitionUz: Mehmonxona — odamlar sayohat paytida qisqa muddatga pullik qoladigan bino.
words.example1: We stayed at a luxury hotel during our vacation.
words.example2: The hotel offers a swimming pool and gym.
words.example2Translation: Mehmonxona suzish havzasi va sport zalini taklif qiladi.
words.example3: He booked a room at the airport hotel.
words.example3Translation: U aeroport mehmonxonasida xona band qildi.
extraExamples: The hotel staff were very friendly and helpful.
Breakfast is included in the hotel price.
Many hotels have conference rooms.
She works as a receptionist in a five-star hotel.
The hotel is located in the city center.
We checked out of the hotel at noon.
The hotel has a beautiful view of the sea.
extraExampleTranslations: Mehmonxona xodimlari juda do'stona va yordamchi edi.
U besh yulduzli mehmonxonada resepsiyonist bo'lib ishlaydi.

words.definition: A place where planes take off and land, with buildings for passengers.
words.definitionUz: Aeroport — samolyotlar uchib chiqadigan va qo'nadigan, yo'lovchilar uchun binolari bor joy.
words.example1: We arrived at the airport two hours before the flight.
words.example1Translation: Biz parvozdan ikki soat oldin aeroportga yetib keldik.
words.example2: The airport is very busy during the holiday season.
words.example3: A new international airport is being built near the city.
words.example3Translation: Shahar yaqinida yangi xalqaro aeroport qurilmoqda.
extraExamples: Security checks at the airport take time.
She works at the airport information desk.
The flight was delayed at the airport.
Many shops and restaurants are inside the airport.
He met his family at the airport arrival gate.
The airport offers free parking for short stays.
Passengers must show their tickets at the airport.
extraExampleTranslations: Aeroport ichida ko'p do'kon va restoranlar bor.
U oilasini aeroportning kelish darvozasida kutib oldi.
Aeroport qisqa muddatli to'xtash uchun bepul to'xtash joyini taklif qiladi.

words.definition: A room or building where people work, usually at desks.
words.definitionUz: Ofis — odamlar odatda stol ustida ishlaydigan xona yoki bino.
words.example1: He works in a large office in the city center.
words.example1Translation: U shahar markazidagi katta ofisda ishlaydi.
words.example2: The company moved to a new modern office.
words.example3: She has her own private office.
extraExamples: The office opens at 9 a.m.
Many people now work from home instead of going to the office.
There is a meeting room in the office.
Office workers often have lunch together.
The office is closed for the holidays.
She decorated her office with plants.
The boss called an emergency meeting at the office.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko'p odamlar endi ofisga borish o'rniga uydan ishlaydilar.
Ofis xodimlari ko'pincha birga tushlik qiladilar.

words.definition: An area of land used for growing crops and raising animals.
words.definitionUz: Ferma — ekin ekish va hayvonlar boqish uchun ishlatiladigan yer maydoni.
words.example1: They grow vegetables on their family farm.
words.example2: The farm has cows, chickens, and sheep.
words.example2Translation: Fermada sigirlar, tovuqlar va qo'ylar bor.
words.example3: We visited an organic farm last weekend.
words.example3Translation: O'tgan dam olish kunida organik fermaga bordik.
extraExamples: Life on a farm starts very early in the morning.
The farm produces fresh milk and eggs.
Modern farms use advanced technology.
She spent her childhood on a farm.
The government supports small farms.
Tourists can stay at the farm and help with work.
The farm is located in a beautiful rural area.
extraExampleTranslations: Ferma hayoti ertalab juda erta boshlanadi.
Ferma yangi sut va tuxum ishlab chiqaradi.
Sayyohlar fermada qolib, ishga yordam berishlari mumkin.

words.definition: The place where someone lives, especially with their family.
words.definitionUz: Uy — odam oilasi bilan yashaydigan joy.
words.example1: After a long trip, it feels good to be home.
words.example1Translation: Uzoq sayohatdan keyin uyga qaytish juda yoqimli.
words.example2: She invited us to her new home for dinner.
words.example2Translation: U bizni yangi uyiga kechki ovqatga taklif qildi.
words.example3: Many people work from home these days.
words.example3Translation: Bugungi kunda ko'p odamlar uydan ishlaydilar.
extraExamples: Home is where the heart is.
They bought a beautiful house and made it their home.
The children are playing at home.
She decorated her home with modern furniture.
Going home for the holidays is always special.
The company helps employees create a good work-life balance at home.
He feels most comfortable at home.
extraExampleTranslations: Ular chiroyli uy sotib olib, uni o'z uylariga aylantirdilar.
U uyini zamonaviy mebellar bilan bezadi.
Bayramlarda uyga qaytish har doim alohida.
Kompaniya xodimlariga uyda ish va hayot muvozanatini yaratishga yordam beradi.
U uyida o'zini eng qulay his qiladi.

words.definition: A particular position, point, or area.
words.definitionUz: Joy — muayyan pozitsiya, nuqta yoki hudud.
words.example1: This is a nice place to relax.
words.example1Translation: Bu dam olish uchun yaxshi joy.
words.example2: She found a perfect place for the meeting.
words.example2Translation: U yig'ilish uchun mukammal joy topdi.
words.example3: There is no place like home.
extraExamples: The park is a popular place for families.
He visited many interesting places during his trip.
This place has a special meaning to me.
Please put the book back in its place.
The restaurant is a great place to celebrate.
She changed her place of work last month.
What is your favorite place in the city?
extraExampleTranslations: U sayohati davomida ko'p qiziqarli joylarga bordi.
Bu joy men uchun alohida ma'noga ega.
Restoran bayram o'tkazish uchun ajoyib joy.
U o'tgan oy ish joyini o'zgartirdi.

words.definition: A road vehicle with an engine and usually four wheels.
words.definitionUz: Mashina — dvigatelli va odatda to'rt g'ildirakli yo'l transport vositasi.
words.example1: He drives to work in his new car.
words.example2: The car broke down on the highway.
words.example3: Many families own at least one car.
words.example3Translation: Ko'p oilalarda kamida bitta mashina bor.
extraExamples: Electric cars are becoming more popular.
She parked the car in front of the house.
The car needs a service.
We rented a car for our holiday.
Traffic jams make driving a car stressful.
He washed his car on the weekend.
The company provides cars for its sales team.
extraExampleTranslations: Biz ta'til uchun mashina ijaraga oldik.
U dam olish kunlari mashinasini yuvdi.
Kompaniya savdo bo'limi uchun mashinalar taqdim etadi.

words.definition: A large road vehicle that carries many passengers.
words.definitionUz: Avtobus — ko'p yo'lovchilarni tashuvchi katta yo'l transport vositasi.
words.example1: I take the bus to school every day.
words.example1Translation: Men har kuni maktabga avtobusda boraman.
words.example2: The bus was crowded during rush hour.
words.example2Translation: Avtobus soatlab tirbandlik paytida gavjum edi.
words.example3: The bus stop is just around the corner.
extraExamples: The city bus service is very reliable.
She missed the last bus home.
Buses run every 15 minutes.
We traveled across the country by bus.
The school bus picks up children in the morning.
He prefers taking the bus over driving.
The bus ticket costs two dollars.
extraExampleTranslations: U uyga qaytadigan oxirgi avtobusni o'tkazib yubordi.
Biz butun mamlakat bo'ylab avtobusda sayohat qildik.
Maktab avtobusi ertalab bolalarni olib ketadi.
U haydashdan ko'ra avtobusda borishni afzal ko'radi.

words.definition: A long vehicle that runs on rails and carries passengers or goods.
words.definitionUz: Poyezd — relslar ustida yuradigan va yo'lovchilar yoki yuklarni tashuvchi uzun transport vositasi.
words.example1: We traveled by train to the capital.
words.example2: The train arrives at platform 3.
words.example3: High-speed trains are very comfortable.
extraExamples: The train was delayed by 20 minutes.
She loves watching the scenery from the train window.
Train tickets are cheaper if you buy them in advance.
The underground train is the fastest way to travel in the city.
Freight trains carry goods across the country.
We waited at the train station for an hour.
The new train line connects two major cities.
extraExampleTranslations: U poyezd oynasidan manzarani kuzatishni yaxshi ko'radi.
Poyezd chiptalari oldindan sotib olinsa arzonroq.
Metro poyezdi shaharda eng tez transport vositasi.
Yuk poyezdlari mamlakat bo'ylab yuk tashidi.
Biz poyezd vokzalida bir soat kutdik.
Yangi poyezd liniyasi ikkita yirik shaharni bog'laydi.

words.definition: A flying vehicle with wings and an engine.
words.definitionUz: Samolyot — qanotlari va dvigatelli uchar transport vositasi.
words.example1: We flew by plane to another country.
words.example2: The plane took off on time.
words.example3: Traveling by plane is the fastest way to go long distances.
words.example3Translation: Samolyotda sayohat uzoq masofalarga eng tez usuldir.
extraExamples: The plane landed safely despite bad weather.
She is afraid of flying on planes.
The airport was full of planes.
Business class on the plane is more comfortable.
The plane will depart in 30 minutes.
Many people listen to music during the plane journey.
Cargo planes transport goods internationally.
extraExampleTranslations: Samolyot yomon ob-havoga qaramay xavfsiz qo'ndi.
Ko'p odamlar samolyot sayohati paytida musiqa tinglaydilar.

words.definition: A small vehicle for traveling on water.
words.definitionUz: Qayiq — suvda sayohat qilish uchun kichik transport vositasi.
words.example1: We went fishing in a small boat.
words.example1Translation: Biz kichik qayiqda baliq tutgani bordik.
words.example2: The boat sailed across the lake.
words.example3: Tourist boats operate on the river every day.
words.example3Translation: Turistik qayiqlar daryoda har kuni ishlaydi.
extraExamples: The boat trip was very relaxing.
He owns a sailing boat.
Life jackets are required on the boat.
The boat left the harbor at sunrise.
Many people use boats for transportation in the islands.
The boat rocked gently on the waves.
We rented a boat for the afternoon.
extraExampleTranslations: Qayiq quyosh chiqishi bilan portdan jo'nadi.
Orolarda ko'p odamlar transport uchun qayiqlardan foydalanadilar.
Biz tushdan keyin qayiq ijaraga oldik.

words.definition: A car with a driver that you pay to take you somewhere.
words.definitionUz: Taksi — sizni biror joyga olib borish uchun pul to'laydigan haydovchili mashina.
words.example1: We took a taxi to the airport.
words.example2: The taxi driver knew the city very well.
words.example2Translation: Taksi haydovchisi shaharni juda yaxshi bilardi.
words.example3: Taxis are expensive but convenient.
extraExamples: You can order a taxi using a mobile app.
She waited for a taxi in the rain.
The taxi fare was higher than expected.
Many taxis wait outside the train station.
He works as a taxi driver at night.
Shared taxis are popular in some countries.
The taxi dropped us off at the hotel entrance.
extraExampleTranslations: Mobil ilova orqali taksi chaqirish mumkin.
Ko'p taksilar temir yo'l vokzali oldida kutishadi.
U kechalari taksi haydovchisi bo'lib ishlaydi.
Taksi bizni mehmonxona eshigi oldida tushirdi.

words.definition: A vehicle with two wheels that you ride by pushing pedals with your feet.
words.definitionUz: Velosiped — oyoqlaringiz bilan pedal bosib minadigan ikki g'ildirakli transport vositasi.
words.example1: He rides his bicycle to work every day.
words.example1Translation: U har kuni ishga velosipedda boradi.
words.example2: The bicycle has a flat tire.
words.example3: Cycling is good exercise and helps the environment.
words.example3Translation: Velosiped haydash yaxshi mashq va atrof-muhitga foydali.
extraExamples: She bought a new mountain bicycle.
Bicycles are common in the city center.
He learned to ride a bicycle when he was five.
The bicycle lane is separated from cars.
Many students use bicycles on campus.
We went for a bicycle ride in the park.
Bicycle repair shops are easy to find.
extraExampleTranslations: U yangi tog' velosipedini sotib oldi.
U besh yoshida velosiped minishni o'rgangan.

words.definition: A large road vehicle used for carrying heavy goods.
words.definitionUz: Yuk mashinasi — og'ir yuklarni tashish uchun ishlatiladigan katta yo'l transport vositasi.
words.example1: The truck delivered furniture to our house.
words.example1Translation: Yuk mashinasi uyimizga mebel yetkazib berdi.
words.example2: Large trucks travel on the highway all night.
words.example2Translation: Katta yuk mashinalari magistralda tun bo'yi yuradilar.
words.example3: He works as a truck driver.
words.example3Translation: U yuk mashinasi haydovchisi bo'lib ishlaydi.
extraExamples: The truck is carrying fresh vegetables.
Heavy trucks can cause traffic delays.
The company owns a fleet of trucks.
Truck drivers often spend many days on the road.
A big truck blocked the narrow street.
Electric trucks are being developed for the future.
We saw many trucks at the port.
extraExampleTranslations: Og'ir yuk mashinalari tirbandlikka sabab bo'lishi mumkin.
Kompaniya bir necha yuk mashinalariga ega.
Yuk mashinasi haydovchilari ko'pincha yo'lda ko'p kun o'tkazadilar.
Katta yuk mashinasi tor ko'chani to'sib qo'ydi.
Kelajak uchun elektr yuk mashinalari ishlab chiqilmoqda.
Biz portda ko'p yuk mashinalarini ko'rdik.

words.definition: An act of traveling from one place to another, usually a long distance.
words.definitionUz: Sayohat — bir joydan ikkinchisiga, odatda uzoq masofaga qiladigan sayohat.
words.example1: The journey from the village to the city took six hours.
words.example1Translation: Qishloqdan shaharga sayohat olti soat davom etdi.
words.example2: She enjoyed every moment of her journey.
words.example2Translation: U sayohatining har bir lahzasidan zavq oldi.
words.example3: Safe journey! See you when you return.
extraExamples: The train journey was very comfortable.
Long journeys can be tiring.
They planned their journey carefully.
The journey across the desert was challenging.
She wrote a book about her journey around the world.
The journey home was faster than expected.
Many stories begin with an unexpected journey.
extraExampleTranslations: U dunyo bo'ylab sayohati haqida kitob yozdi.
Uyga qaytish sayohati kutilganidan tezroq bo'ldi.
Ko'p hikoyalar kutilmagan sayohat bilan boshlanadi.

words.definition: A piece of paper or card that shows you have paid to travel or enter somewhere.
words.definitionUz: Chipta — sayohat qilish yoki biror joyga kirish uchun pul to'laganingizni ko'rsatuvchi qog'oz yoki karta.
words.example1: I bought a ticket for the concert.
words.example2: Please show your train ticket.
words.example3: The ticket price includes entrance to the museum.
words.example3Translation: Chipta narxi muzeyga kirishni o'z ichiga oladi.
extraExamples: He got a speeding ticket from the police.
Tickets sell out quickly for popular events.
She reserved tickets online.
The bus driver checked all passengers’ tickets.
A round-trip ticket is cheaper than two one-way tickets.
Lost tickets cannot be replaced easily.
The ticket office is next to the main entrance.
extraExampleTranslations: U politsiyadan tezlik oshirgani uchun jarima chiptasi oldi.
Mashhur tadbirlar uchun chiptalar tez sotiladi.
Avtobus haydovchisi barcha yo'lovchilarning chiptalarini tekshirdi.
Ikki tomonlama chipta ikkita bir tomonlama chiptadan arzonroq.
Chipta kassasi asosiy kirish eshigi yonida.

words.definition: A place where you can sit.
words.definitionUz: O'rindiq — o'tirish mumkin bo'lgan joy.
words.example1: Please take your seat before the movie starts.
words.example1Translation: Iltimos, film boshlanishidan oldin o'rindiqingizga o'ting.
words.example2: The train has comfortable seats.
words.example3: All seats are reserved for the event.
words.example3Translation: Barcha o'rindiqlar tadbir uchun band qilingan.
extraExamples: She saved a seat for her friend.
Window seats are more popular on planes.
The stadium has thousands of seats.
He offered his seat to an elderly woman.
The back seat of the car is quite spacious.
Please fasten your seat belt.
There are no empty seats left on the bus.
extraExampleTranslations: U do'sti uchun o'rindiq saqlab qo'ydi.
U keksa ayolga o'z o'rindigini taklif qildi.

words.definition: A person who drives a vehicle.
words.definitionUz: Haydovchi — transport vositasini boshqaradigan odam.
words.example1: The bus driver was very polite.
words.example2: She is a careful and experienced driver.
words.example3: Taxi drivers know the city well.
extraExamples: The truck driver delivered the goods on time.
A good driver always follows traffic rules.
He works as a delivery driver.
The driver stopped at the red light.
Many women are professional drivers now.
The driver helped us with our luggage.
New drivers need more practice.
extraExampleTranslations: Yuk mashinasi haydovchisi yukni vaqtida yetkazib berdi.
Yaxshi haydovchi har doim yo'l qoidalariga rioya qiladi.
U yetkazib berish haydovchisi bo'lib ishlaydi.

words.definition: A person who is traveling in a vehicle but is not driving it.
words.definitionUz: Yo'lovchi — transport vositasida sayohat qilayotgan, lekin uni boshqarmayotgan odam.
words.example1: All passengers must wear seat belts.
words.example1Translation: Barcha yo'lovchilar xavfsizlik kamarini taqishlari kerak.
words.example2: The plane has 200 passengers on board.
words.example3: Passengers waited patiently for the delayed train.
words.example3Translation: Yo'lovchilar kechikkan poyezdni sabr bilan kutishdi.
extraExamples: The bus was full of passengers.
She helped an elderly passenger with her bag.
Passengers can buy food on the train.
The taxi driver picked up two passengers.
All passengers should keep their tickets until the end of the journey.
The ship carried hundreds of passengers.
Announcements are made for passengers at the airport.
extraExampleTranslations: U keksa yo'lovchiga sumkasini ko'tarishga yordam berdi.
Yo'lovchilar poyezdda ovqat sotib olishlari mumkin.
Barcha yo'lovchilar sayohat oxirigacha chiptalarini saqlashlari kerak.

words.definition: A journey on foot, usually for pleasure or exercise.
words.definitionUz: Yurish — odatda zavq yoki mashq uchun piyoda qilinadigan sayohat.
words.example1: We went for a long walk in the park.
words.example2: A morning walk helps me feel energetic.
words.example3: It’s a short walk from the station to the hotel.
extraExamples: Evening walks are very relaxing.
She takes her dog for a walk every day.
The walk up the hill was tiring but beautiful.
Let’s go for a walk after dinner.
The mountain walk offered amazing views.
He enjoys nature walks on weekends.
A daily walk is good for your health.
extraExampleTranslations: U har kuni itini yuritishga olib chiqadi.
Tepalikka yurish charchatdi, lekin go'zal edi.
Tog' yurishi ajoyib manzaralarni taqdim etdi.
U dam olish kunlarida tabiat yurishlaridan zavq oladi.
Har kuni yurish salomatlik uchun foydali.

words.definition: The star at the center of our solar system that provides light and heat.
words.definitionUz: Quyosh — bizning quyosh tizimimiz markazidagi yulduz bo'lib, yorug'lik va issiqlik beradi.
words.example1: The sun rises in the east.
words.example2: It’s important to wear sunscreen on sunny days.
words.example2Translation: Quyoshli kunlarda quyoshdan himoya kremini surtish muhim.
words.example3: The sun was shining brightly in the sky.
extraExamples: Plants need sunlight to grow.
We sat in the sun to get warm.
The sun sets in the west.
Too much sun can damage your skin.
Solar energy comes from the sun.
The sun appeared after the rain.
She loves watching the sunrise.
extraExampleTranslations: O'simliklar o'sishi uchun quyosh nuri kerak.
Biz issiq olish uchun quyoshda o'tirdik.
Quyoshning haddan tashqari ta'siri teriga zarar yetkazishi mumkin.
U tong otishini kuzatishni yaxshi ko'radi.

words.definition: The natural satellite of the Earth that shines at night by reflecting sunlight.
words.definitionUz: Oy — Quyosh nurini aks ettirib tunda yorug'lik beradigan Yerni sun'iy yo'ldoshi.
words.example1: The full moon was beautiful last night.
words.example1Translation: Kecha to'lin oy juda chiroyli edi.
words.example2: Astronauts landed on the moon in 1969.
words.example3: We could see the moon clearly in the dark sky.
words.example3Translation: Qorong'u osmonda oyni aniq ko'rish mumkin edi.
extraExamples: The moon affects the ocean tides.
She loves taking photos of the moon.
There will be a lunar eclipse tonight.
The moon looks bigger near the horizon.
Many cultures have stories about the moon.
A crescent moon appeared in the evening.
Scientists continue to study the moon.
extraExampleTranslations: U oyni suratga olishni yaxshi ko'radi.
Ko'p madaniyatlarda Oy haqida hikoyalar bor.
Olimlar hali ham Oyni o'rganishda davom etmoqdalar.

words.definition: A large ball of burning gas in space that produces light and heat.
words.definitionUz: Yulduz — fazoda yorug'lik va issiqlik chiqaradigan katta yonayotgan gaz shari.
words.example1: We saw thousands of stars in the clear night sky.
words.example1Translation: Biz tiniq tungi osmonda minglab yulduzlarni ko'rdik.
words.example2: The North Star helps sailors find direction.
words.example2Translation: Shimoliy yulduz dengizchilarga yo'nalish topishga yordam beradi.
words.example3: She wishes upon a shooting star.
extraExamples: Our sun is also a star.
The sky was full of bright stars.
Astronomers study distant stars.
A star fell from the sky.
Many Hollywood stars attended the event.
The hotel has a five-star rating.
He drew a star on the paper.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko'p Gollivud yulduzlari tadbirda ishtirok etdi.

words.definition: Yer ustidagi havo qatlami, ko'k rangdagi fazo
words.definitionUz: Osmon — bu Yer sayyorasini o'rab turgan havo qatlami bo'lib, kunduzi ko'k, kechasi qora ko'rinadi.
words.example1: The sky is blue today.
words.example2: Birds fly in the sky.
words.example3: There are many stars in the sky at night.
extraExamples: Dark clouds covered the entire sky before the storm.
The sky turned orange during the beautiful sunset.
extraExampleTranslations: Bo'ron oldidan qora bulutlar butun osmonni qoplagan edi.
Chiroyli quyosh botishida osmon to'q sariq rangga kirdi.

words.definition: Osmonda suv bug'laridan hosil bo'lgan oq yoki kulrang shakl
words.definitionUz: Bulut — suv bug'larining havoda to'planishidan hosil bo'ladigan ko'rinadigan massa.
words.example1: There is a big cloud in the sky.
words.example2: The cloud looks like a sheep.
words.example3: Rain comes from the clouds.
extraExamples: White clouds moved slowly across the blue sky.
The dark cloud warned us about the coming rain.
extraExampleTranslations: Oq bulutlar ko'k osmon bo'ylab sekin harakatlanardi.
Qora bulut yaqinlashayotgan yomg'ir haqida ogohlantirdi.

words.definition: Osmondan yog'adigan suv tomchilari
words.definitionUz: Yomg'ir — bulutlardan tushadigan suv tomchilari.
words.example1: It is raining outside.
words.example2: The rain stopped in the afternoon.
words.example3: We need rain for the plants.
extraExamples: Heavy rain flooded the streets of the city.
Light rain is perfect for a morning walk.
extraExampleTranslations: Kuchli yomg'ir shahar ko'chalarini suv bosdi.
Yengil yomg'ir ertalabki sayr uchun juda mos.

words.definition: Sovuq havoda osmondon tushadigan oq kristallar
words.definitionUz: Qor — sovuq ob-havoda bulutlardan tushadigan oq suv kristallari.
words.example1: It snowed all night.
words.example2: The mountain is covered with snow.
words.example3: Children play in the snow.
extraExamples: Fresh snow makes the landscape look beautiful.
Driving in heavy snow can be dangerous.
extraExampleTranslations: Yangi yog'gan qor manzarani chiroyli qiladi.
Kuchli qorda mashina haydash xavfli bo'lishi mumkin.

words.definition: Havoning harakati
words.definitionUz: Shamol — havoning tez harakati.
words.example1: The wind is strong today.
words.example2: Leaves move in the wind.
words.example3: A cold wind is blowing from the north.
extraExamples: The wind carried the kite high into the sky.
Strong winds can damage trees and houses.
extraExampleTranslations: Kuchli shamollar daraxtlar va uylarga zarar yetkazishi mumkin.

words.definition: Kuchli shamol, yomg'ir va momaqaldiroq bilan birga keladigan ob-havo
words.definitionUz: Bo'ron — kuchli shamol, yomg'ir va chaqmoq bilan kechadigan xavfli ob-havo hodisasi.
words.example1: A big storm is coming.
words.example2: We stayed inside during the storm.
words.example3: The storm destroyed many trees.
extraExamples: Thunder and lightning made the storm very scary.
After the storm, the sky became clear again.
extraExampleTranslations: Momaqaldiroq va chaqmoq bo'ronni juda qo'rqinchli qildi.
Bo'rondan keyin osmon yana tiniq bo'lib qoldi.

words.definition: Sovuq suvning qattiq holati
words.definitionUz: Muz — suvning past haroratda qattiq holatga o'tgan shakli.
words.example1: There is ice on the lake.
words.example2: I put ice in my drink.
words.example3: Be careful, the road is icy.
extraExamples: The ice melted quickly in the warm sun.
We skated on the frozen ice of the river.
extraExampleTranslations: Muz issiq quyoshda tez erib ketdi.
Biz daryoning muzlagan muzida konkida uchdik.

words.definition: Yonayotgan narsadan chiqadigan issiqlik va yorug'lik
words.definitionUz: Olov — yonuvchan moddalarning yonishi natijasida hosil bo'ladigan issiqlik va yorug'lik.
words.example1: They made a fire to keep warm.
words.example2: Fire can be dangerous.
words.example3: The fire burned brightly.
extraExamples: The firefighters quickly put out the fire.
We roasted marshmallows over the campfire.

words.definition: Biz yashaydigan sayyora yoki tuproq
words.definitionUz: Yer — insoniyat yashaydigan sayyora yoki o'simliklar o'sadigan tuproq.
words.example1: The earth revolves around the sun.
words.example2: Plants grow in the earth.
words.example3: We must protect the earth.
extraExamples: The astronauts looked at the beautiful blue earth from space.
Rich earth is important for good farming.
extraExampleTranslations: Astronavtlar fazodan chiroyli ko'k Yerni ko'rishdi.
Boy tuproq yaxshi dehqonchilik uchun muhimdir.

words.definition: Yer yuzasida o'sadigan yashil o'simlik
words.definitionUz: O't — yerda o'sadigan yumshoq yashil o'simliklar.
words.example1: The grass is green.
words.example2: Cows eat grass.
words.example3: We sat on the grass.
extraExamples: The lawn needs cutting because the grass is too long.
Dew drops shine on the morning grass.
extraExampleTranslations: Maysazor o't juda uzun bo'lgani uchun uni kesish kerak.

words.definition: Balando'simlik bo'lib, poyasi va shoxlari bor
words.definitionUz: Daraxt — baland bo'yli o'simlik bo'lib, kuchli poyasi va shoxlari mavjud.
words.example1: The tree has many leaves.
words.example2: Birds live in the tree.
words.example3: They planted a new tree.
extraExamples: Old trees provide shade in the hot summer.
The apple tree is full of ripe fruits.

words.definition: O'simlikning chiroyli rangli qismi
words.definitionUz: Gul — o'simlikning rang-barang va chiroyli qismi bo'lib, ko'pincha hidli bo'ladi.
words.example1: The flower is red.
words.example2: She gave me a beautiful flower.
words.example3: Flowers bloom in spring.
extraExamples: Many flowers attract bees and butterflies.
She picked wild flowers in the meadow.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko'pgina gullar asalarilar va kapalaklarni o'ziga tortadi.

words.definition: Yerda o'sadigan tirik jonzot
words.definitionUz: O'simlik — yerda o'sadigan, fotosintez orqali oziqlanadigan tirik mavjudot.
words.example1: This plant needs water.
words.example2: We grow plants in the garden.
words.example3: The plant has green leaves.
extraExamples: Indoor plants make the room feel fresh.
Farmers plant seeds in the spring season.
extraExampleTranslations: Xonadagi o'simliklar xonani yangi his qiladi.

words.definition: Odamlarning do'sti bo'lgan uy hayvoni
words.definitionUz: It — odamlar bilan yashaydigan, sodiq va aqlli uy hayvoni.
words.example1: The dog is barking.
words.example2: I have a pet dog.
words.example3: Dogs like to play with balls.
words.example3Translation: Itlar to'p bilan o'ynashni yaxshi ko'radi.
extraExamples: The guide dog helped the blind man cross the street.
Our dog wagged its tail happily when we came home.
extraExampleTranslations: Yo'l-yo'riqchi it ko'zi ojiz odamga ko'chadan o'tishga yordam berdi.
Bizning itimiz uyga kelganimizda quvonch bilan dumini silkitdi.

words.definition: Mustaqil va chiroyli uy hayvoni
words.definitionUz: Mushuk — mustaqil, toza va ovchi tabiatga ega uy hayvoni.
words.example1: The cat is sleeping.
words.example2: Cats catch mice.
words.example3: My cat likes milk.
extraExamples: The kitten played with a ball of yarn.
Cats can see well in the dark.

words.definition: Uchadigan qanotli jonivor
words.definitionUz: Qush — qanotlari bor, tuxum qo'yadigan va ko'pincha uchadigan hayvon.
words.example1: The bird is flying.
words.example2: Birds sing in the morning.
words.example3: I saw a colorful bird.
extraExamples: The eagle is a powerful bird of prey.
Many birds migrate south in winter.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko'plab qushlar qishda janubga ko'chib ketishadi.

words.definition: Suvda yashaydigan gillari bor jonivor
words.definitionUz: Baliq — suvda yashaydigan, suzuvchi va ko'pincha gillari bor hayvon.
words.example1: I caught a big fish.
words.example2: Fish swim in the river.
words.example3: We eat fish for dinner.
extraExamples: The colorful tropical fish looked beautiful in the aquarium.
Fishermen go out early in the morning.
extraExampleTranslations: Akvariyda rang-barang tropik baliqlar juda chiroyli ko'rinardi.

words.definition: Tez yuguradigan va odamlar minadigan hayvon
words.definitionUz: Ot — kuchli, tez yuguruvchi va odamlar minadigan katta uy hayvoni.
words.example1: The horse runs fast.
words.example2: She rides a horse.
words.example3: Horses live on the farm.
extraExamples: The wild horse galloped across the plain.
Horses were important for transportation in the past.
extraExampleTranslations: Yovvoyi ot tekislik bo'ylab chopib o'tdi.
Otlari o'tmishda transport vositasi sifatida muhim edi.

words.definition: Sut beradigan katta ferm hayvoni
words.definitionUz: Sigir — sut beradigan, o't yeydigan katta qishloq xo'jalik hayvoni.
words.example1: The cow gives milk.
words.example2: Cows eat grass in the field.
words.example3: There are many cows on the farm.
extraExamples: The farmer milked the cows every morning.
Cows are gentle animals.
extraExampleTranslations: Dehqon har kuni ertalab sigirlarni sog'di.

words.definition: Jun beradigan ferm hayvoni
words.definitionUz: Qo'y — jun beradigan, o'tloqlarda o'tlaydigan qishloq xo'jalik hayvoni.
words.example1: The sheep has white wool.
words.example2: Sheep live in flocks.
words.example3: Farmers raise sheep.
extraExamples: The little lamb followed its mother sheep.
Sheep provide wool for making warm clothes.
extraExampleTranslations: Kichkina qo'zichoq onasi qo'yni kuzatib bordi.
Qo'ylar issiq kiyimlar tikish uchun jun beradi.

words.definition: Go'sht beradigan ferm hayvoni
words.definitionUz: Cho'chqa — go'sht va boshqa mahsulotlar beradigan fermada boqiladigan hayvon.
words.example1: The pig is eating.
words.example2: Pigs like mud.
words.example3: The farm has several pigs.
extraExamples: The pig rolled happily in the fresh mud.
Pigs are very intelligent animals.
extraExampleTranslations: Cho'chqa yangi loyda baxtli tarzda dumaladi.

words.definition: Tuxum va go'sht beradigan qush
words.definitionUz: Tovuq — tuxum qo'yadigan va go'shti uchun boqiladigan qishloq xo'jalik qushi.
words.example1: The chicken lays eggs.
words.example2: Chickens live in the yard.
words.example3: We have fried chicken for lunch.
extraExamples: The mother hen protected her baby chickens.
Free-range chickens are healthier.
extraExampleTranslations: Tovuq ona o'z jo'jalarini himoya qildi.

words.definition: Suvda suzadigan va tuxum qo'yadigan qush
words.definitionUz: O'rdak — suvda yaxshi suzadigan, qirg'oqda yashaydigan qush.
words.example1: The duck swims in the pond.
words.example2: Ducks have webbed feet.
words.example3: We saw wild ducks.
extraExamples: Little ducklings followed their mother in a line.
Ducks quack loudly in the morning.
extraExampleTranslations: Kichkina o'rdakchalar onalarini ketma-ket kuzatib borishdi.

words.definition: Uzun quloqli va tez yuguradigan kichik hayvon
words.definitionUz: Quyon — uzun quloqli, tez sakraydigan va sabzi yaxshi ko'radigan kichik hayvon.
words.example1: The rabbit is eating carrots.
words.example2: Rabbits have soft fur.
words.example3: The rabbit jumped quickly.
extraExamples: The wild rabbit hid in the bushes.
Pet rabbits need a big cage.

words.definition: Kichik, uzun dumli kemiruvchi
words.definitionUz: Sichqon — kichik, uzun dumli va tez harakatlanadigan kemiruvchi hayvon.
words.example1: The mouse ran away.
words.example2: Cats catch mice.
words.example3: I saw a little mouse.
extraExamples: The computer mouse helps us control the cursor.
Mice live in holes in the wall.
extraExampleTranslations: Kompyuter sichqoni kursorni boshqarishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: Eng katta quruqlikdagi hayvon
words.definitionUz: Fil — dunyodagi eng katta quruqlik hayvonlaridan biri, uzun xartumga ega.
words.example1: The elephant is very big.
words.example2: Elephants have long trunks.
words.example3: Elephants live in Africa and Asia.
extraExamples: The elephant sprayed water with its trunk.
Elephants have excellent memory.

words.definition: O'rmonlar shohi, kuchli yirtqich
words.definitionUz: Sher — kuchli, yirtqich hayvon bo'lib, Afrika savannalarida yashaydi.
words.example1: The lion is the king of the jungle.
words.example2: Lions roar loudly.
words.example3: The lion hunts at night.
extraExamples: A pride of lions lives together in the savanna.
The male lion has a beautiful mane.

words.definition: Chiziqli terili kuchli yirtqich mushuk
words.definitionUz: Yo'lbars — sariq-qora chiziqli, juda kuchli va yolg'iz yirtqich hayvon.
words.example1: The tiger has stripes.
words.example2: Tigers are good hunters.
words.example3: We saw a tiger at the zoo.
extraExamples: The Bengal tiger is an endangered species.
Tigers can swim very well.
extraExampleTranslations: Bengal yo'lbarsi yo'qolib borayotgan tur hisoblanadi.

words.definition: Katta, kuchli va mo'ynali yirtqich hayvon
words.definitionUz: Ayiq — katta, kuchli va qalin mo'ynali, o'rmonlarda yashaydigan hayvon.
words.example1: The bear eats honey.
words.example2: Bears sleep in winter.
words.example3: Be careful of the wild bear.
extraExamples: The polar bear lives in the cold Arctic.
Mother bear protects her cubs.
extraExampleTranslations: Ona ayiq o'z bolalarini himoya qiladi.

words.definition: Maktabda bir guruh o'quvchilar
words.definitionUz: Sinf — maktabda bir xil yoshdagi o'quvchilarning o'quv guruhi.
words.example1: Our class is big.
words.example2: We study in class.
words.example3: The class starts at 8 o'clock.
extraExamples: The whole class went on a field trip to the museum.
She is the best student in our class.
extraExampleTranslations: U bizning sinfimizdagi eng yaxshi o'quvchi.

words.definition: O'qituvchi tomonidan o'tiladigan mavzu
words.definitionUz: Dars — o'quv jarayonida o'tiladigan ma'lum bir mavzu yoki mashg'ulot.
words.example1: Today's lesson is interesting.
words.example2: We have a math lesson.
words.example3: I learned a new lesson.
extraExamples: The English lesson focused on new vocabulary.
Life teaches us many important lessons.
extraExampleTranslations: Ingliz tili darsi yangi so'zlarga qaratilgan edi.
Hayot bizga ko'plab muhim saboqlar beradi.

words.definition: O'quvchilarga bilim beradigan shaxs
words.definitionUz: O'qituvchi — maktabda o'quvchilarga fanlarni o'rgatadigan mutaxassis.
words.example1: My teacher is kind.
words.example2: The teacher explains the lesson.
words.example3: Teachers work hard.
extraExamples: Our history teacher knows many interesting facts.
The teacher praised the students for their good work.
extraExampleTranslations: Bizning tarix o'qituvchimiz ko'plab qiziqarli faktlarni biladi.
O'qituvchi o'quvchilarni yaxshi ishi uchun maqtadi.

words.definition: Maktab yoki universitetda o'qiydigan shaxs
words.definitionUz: O'quvchi — maktabda yoki oliy o'quv yurtida tahsil olayotgan shaxs.
words.example1: The student studies hard.
words.example2: Students go to school.
words.example3: She is a good student.
extraExamples: University students have more freedom in their studies.
The students asked many questions during the lesson.
extraExampleTranslations: Universitet talabalari o'qishda ko'proq erkinlikka ega.
O'quvchilar dars davomida ko'p savollar berishdi.

words.definition: Maktabdan beriladigan uyga bajariladigan ish
words.definitionUz: Uy vazifasi — darsdan keyin uyda bajarilishi kerak bo'lgan topshiriqlar.
words.example1: I finished my homework.
words.example2: Do your homework every day.
words.example3: The homework is difficult.
extraExamples: He forgot to bring his homework to school.
Doing homework helps students review the lesson.
extraExampleTranslations: U uy vazifasini maktabga olib kelishni unutdi.
Uy vazifasini bajarish o'quvchilarga darsni takrorlashga yordam beradi.

words.definition: O'quvchilarning bilimini tekshirish usuli
words.definitionUz: Test — o'quvchilarning bilim darajasini tekshirish uchun savollar to'plami.
words.example1: We have a test tomorrow.
words.example2: She passed the test.
words.example3: The test was easy.
extraExamples: The teacher prepared a difficult math test.
Regular tests help students study better.
extraExampleTranslations: Muntazam testlar o'quvchilarga yaxshiroq o'qishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: Muhim bilimni baholash jarayoni
words.definitionUz: Imtihon — o'quvchilarning o'zlashtirgan bilimlarini baholashning rasmiy usuli.
words.example1: The final exam is next week.
words.example2: He studied for the exam.
words.example3: She did well on the exam.
extraExamples: Final exams are stressful for many students.
You need good preparation before an important exam.
extraExampleTranslations: Yakuniy imtihonlar ko'plab o'quvchilar uchun stressli.
Muhim imtihon oldidan yaxshi tayyorgarlik kerak.

words.definition: Javob talab qiladigan so'rov
words.definitionUz: Savol — ma'lumot olish yoki tushunish uchun beriladigan so'rov.
words.example1: Ask me a question.
words.example2: I have a question.
words.example3: The question is difficult.
extraExamples: The teacher answered all the students' questions.
Good questions help us learn more.
extraExampleTranslations: O'qituvchi o'quvchilarning barcha savollariga javob berdi.
Yaxshi savollar bizga ko'proq o'rganishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: Savolga beriladigan tushuntirish
words.definitionUz: Javob — savolga beriladigan to'g'ri yoki tushuntiruvchi ma'lumot.
words.example1: What is the answer?
words.example2: Give the correct answer.
words.example3: I know the answer.
extraExamples: She wrote clear answers on the test paper.
There is more than one possible answer.
extraExampleTranslations: U test varaqasida aniq javoblarni yozdi.
Bir nechta mumkin bo'lgan javoblar mavjud.

words.definition: O'quvchining ishi uchun qo'yiladigan baho
words.definitionUz: Baho — o'quvchining bilim va topshiriqlarini baholash natijasi.
words.example1: I got a good grade.
words.example2: Her grade is A.
words.example3: The teacher gives grades.
extraExamples: Students work hard to improve their grades.
The average grade in the class was high.
extraExampleTranslations: O'quvchilar baholarini yaxshilash uchun qattiq mehnat qilishadi.

words.definition: O'qiladigan muayyan fan yoki mavzu
words.definitionUz: Fan — maktab dasturida o'qitiladigan muayyan bilim sohasi (matematika, ingliz tili va h.k.).
words.example1: My favorite subject is English.
words.example2: We study many subjects.
words.example3: What is your best subject?
extraExamples: Science is an interesting subject for many students.
History is one of the main subjects in school.
extraExampleTranslations: Tabiiy fanlar ko'plab o'quvchilar uchun qiziqarli fandr.

words.definition: The language spoken in many countries including the UK, USA, Canada, and Australia.
words.definitionUz: Ingliz tili — Buyuk Britaniya, AQSh, Kanada va Avstraliya kabi ko‘plab mamlakatlarda gaplashiladigan til.
words.example1: She is learning English to study abroad.
words.example1Translation: U chet elda o‘qish uchun ingliz tilini o‘rganmoqda.
words.example2: English is considered an international language in business.
words.example2Translation: Ingliz tili biznesda xalqaro til sifatida qaraladi.
words.example3: Many songs and movies are in English.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘p qo‘shiq va filmlar ingliz tilida.
extraExamples: His English improved a lot after living in London.
English has many words borrowed from other languages.
Learning English opens up more career opportunities.
The meeting was conducted entirely in English.
She speaks English fluently with a slight accent.
English grammar can be challenging for beginners.
Books in English are widely available online.
extraExampleTranslations: Londonda yashagandan keyin uning ingliz tili juda yaxshilandi.
Ingliz tilida boshqa tillardan olingan ko‘p so‘zlar bor.
Ingliz tilini o‘rganish ko‘proq kasbiy imkoniyatlarni ochadi.
U ingliz tilida biroz aksent bilan ravon gapiradi.
Ingliz tili grammatikasi boshlang‘ichlar uchun qiyin bo‘lishi mumkin.
Ingliz tilidagi kitoblar internetda keng tarqalgan.

words.definition: The study of numbers, quantities, shapes, and patterns.
words.definitionUz: Matematika — sonlar, miqdorlar, shakllar va naqshlarni o‘rganadigan fan.
words.example1: I enjoy solving maths problems in my free time.
words.example1Translation: Bo‘sh vaqtimda matematika masalalarini yechishni yoqtiraman.
words.example2: She got top marks in maths this semester.
words.example2Translation: U bu semestrda matematikadan eng yuqori ball oldi.
words.example3: Maths is an important subject for engineering careers.
words.example3Translation: Matematika muhandislik kasblari uchun muhim fan.
extraExamples: Basic maths skills are essential in daily life.
The teacher made maths fun with games.
He struggles with advanced maths topics.
Maths helps develop logical thinking.
Many students find maths challenging.
She tutors kids in maths after school.
Calculators are useful tools in maths.
extraExampleTranslations: Oddiy matematika ko‘nikmalari kundalik hayotda zarur.
O‘qituvchi matematikani o‘yinlar bilan qiziqarli qildi.
Matematika mantiqiy fikrlashni rivojlantirishga yordam beradi.
Ko‘p o‘quvchilar matematikani qiyin deb biladi.
U maktabdan keyin bolalarga matematikadan dars beradi.

words.definition: The systematic study of the natural world through observation and experiment.
words.definitionUz: Fan — tabiat olamini kuzatish va tajriba orqali tizimli o‘rganish.
words.example1: Science helps us understand how the universe works.
words.example1Translation: Fan bizga olam qanday ishlashini tushunishga yordam beradi.
words.example2: She wants to study science at university.
words.example2Translation: U universitetda fan yo‘nalishida o‘qishni xohlaydi.
words.example3: Recent science discoveries have improved medicine.
extraExamples: Biology is one branch of science.
Science experiments are exciting for students.
Climate change is a big topic in science today.
He reads science magazines every month.
Science and technology go hand in hand.
The school lab is used for science classes.
Science teaches us to ask questions.
extraExampleTranslations: Iqlim o‘zgarishi bugungi kunda faning muhim mavzusi.
U har oy fan jurnallarini o‘qiydi.
Maktab laboratoriyasi fan darslari uchun ishlatiladi.

words.definition: The study of past events, particularly in human affairs.
words.definitionUz: Tarix — o‘tmishdagi voqealar, ayniqsa insoniyat hayoti bilan bog‘liq voqealarni o‘rganish.
words.example1: I love learning about world history.
words.example1Translation: Men jahon tarixini o‘rganishni yaxshi ko‘raman.
words.example2: History helps us learn from past mistakes.
words.example2Translation: Tarix o‘tmishdagi xatolardan saboq olishga yordam beradi.
words.example3: She is a history teacher at the local school.
extraExamples: Ancient history is full of interesting stories.
The museum has a great history section.
He failed his history exam last week.
History books can be very detailed.
Modern history focuses on the last 100 years.
Family history is important to many people.
They studied the history of their country.
extraExampleTranslations: U o‘tgan hafta tarix imtihonidan o‘ta olmadi.
Tarix kitoblari juda batafsil bo‘lishi mumkin.
Oilaviy tarix ko‘p odamlar uchun muhim.

words.definition: To spend time learning about a subject by reading, researching, or attending classes.
words.definitionUz: O‘qish — biror mavzuni kitob o‘qish, tadqiqot qilish yoki darslarda qatnashish orqali vaqt sarflab o‘rganish.
words.example1: I need to study for my exams next week.
words.example1Translation: Keyingi haftadagi imtihonlarim uchun o‘qishim kerak.
words.example2: She studies medicine at a top university.
words.example3: They study together every evening.
extraExamples: Good study habits lead to better results.
He is studying hard to become a lawyer.
Online courses make it easier to study from home.
Students should study regularly, not just before exams.
She loves to study foreign languages.
The scientist continues to study climate patterns.
Parents encourage their children to study well.
extraExampleTranslations: Yaxshi o‘qish odatlari yaxshi natijalarga olib keladi.
U advokat bo‘lish uchun qattiq o‘qimoqda.
O‘quvchilar faqat imtihon oldidan emas, muntazam o‘qishlari kerak.
U chet tillarini o‘rganishni yaxshi ko‘radi.
Olim iqlim naqshlarini o‘rganishda davom etmoqda.

words.definition: To gain knowledge or skill by studying, practicing, or experiencing something.
words.definitionUz: O‘rganmoq — o‘qish, mashq qilish yoki tajriba orqali bilim yoki ko‘nikma egallash.
words.example1: Children learn quickly when they are young.
words.example2: I want to learn how to play the guitar.
words.example3: We learn from our mistakes.
extraExamples: She learned Spanish during her trip to Spain.
Online videos make it easy to learn new skills.
Students learn best when they are interested.
He is learning to drive next month.
Learning never stops throughout life.
The team learned a lot from the workshop.
Parents help their kids learn good values.
extraExampleTranslations: U Ispaniyaga sayohati davomida ispancha o‘rgandi.
Onlayn videolar yangi ko‘nikmalarni o‘rganishni oson qiladi.
U keyingi oy mashina haydashni o‘rganmoqda.

words.definition: To look at and understand the meaning of written words.
words.definitionUz: O‘qimoq — yozilgan so‘zlarni ko‘rib, ularning ma’nosini tushunish.
words.example1: I read a book every night before sleeping.
words.example1Translation: Men har kecha uxash oldidan kitob o‘qiyman.
words.example2: She reads the newspaper every morning.
words.example2Translation: U har kuni ertalab gazeta o‘qiydi.
words.example3: Reading helps improve your vocabulary.
words.example3Translation: O‘qish so‘z boyligingizni oshirishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: Children should read at least 20 minutes a day.
He reads online articles about technology.
She loves to read fiction in her free time.
Reading aloud improves pronunciation.
Many students read textbooks for exams.
I read the instructions carefully.
Reading is a great way to relax.
extraExampleTranslations: Bolalar kuniga kamida 20 daqiqa o‘qishlari kerak.
U texnologiya haqidagi onlayn maqolalarni o‘qiydi.
U bo‘sh vaqtida badiiy adabiyotni o‘qishni yaxshi ko‘radi.
Ko‘p o‘quvchilar imtihonlar uchun darsliklarni o‘qiydi.

words.definition: To put words or symbols on paper or a screen to express ideas.
words.definitionUz: Yozmoq — qog‘ozga yoki ekranga so‘zlar yozib, fikrlarni ifodalash.
words.example1: Students must write an essay for homework.
words.example1Translation: O‘quvchilar uy vazifasi uchun insho yozishlari kerak.
words.example2: She writes emails to her friends every week.
words.example2Translation: U har hafta do‘stlariga elektron xat yozadi.
words.example3: He wants to write a book one day.
extraExamples: Writing helps organize your thoughts.
The journalist writes for a popular magazine.
Please write your name on the form.
She writes poetry in her free time.
Writing skills are important for many jobs.
They write reports at the end of each project.
Practice writing every day to improve.
extraExampleTranslations: Yozish fikrlarni tartibga solishga yordam beradi.
Yozish ko‘nikmalari ko‘p ishlar uchun muhim.
Ular har bir loyiha oxirida hisobot yozadilar.
Har kuni yozishni mashq qiling, yaxshilanadi.

words.definition: To do an activity repeatedly to improve a skill.
words.definitionUz: Mashq qilmoq — biror ko‘nikmani yaxshilash uchun uni qayta-qayta bajarish.
words.example1: You need to practice speaking English every day.
words.example1Translation: Ingliz tilida gapirishni har kuni mashq qilishingiz kerak.
words.example2: The team practices football after school.
words.example2Translation: Jamoa maktabdan keyin futbol mashq qiladi.
words.example3: Practice makes perfect.
extraExamples: She practices the piano for two hours daily.
Regular practice is key to success.
Doctors need years of practice to become skilled.
The band practices in the garage.
Practice your handwriting to make it neat.
Students practice math problems before tests.
He practices meditation to reduce stress.
extraExampleTranslations: U har kuni ikki soat pianino mashq qiladi.
Shifokorlar mohir bo‘lish uchun yillar davomida mashq qilishlari kerak.
Qo‘lyozmangizni chiroyli qilish uchun mashq qiling.
O‘quvchilar test oldidan matematika masalalarini mashq qiladi.
U stressni kamaytirish uchun meditatsiya mashq qiladi.

words.definition: To successfully complete a test or exam.
words.definitionUz: O‘tmoq — imtihon yoki testdan muvaffaqiyatli o‘tish.
words.example1: I hope I pass my driving test tomorrow.
words.example1Translation: Umid qilamanki, ertaga haydovchilik imtihonidan o‘taman.
words.example2: She passed all her exams with high scores.
words.example2Translation: U barcha imtihonlaridan yuqori ball bilan o‘tdi.
words.example3: Many students didn’t pass the difficult maths exam.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘p o‘quvchilar qiyin matematika imtihonidan o‘ta olmadi.
extraExamples: He barely passed the final exam.
Passing the test was a big relief.
You must pass the entrance exam to join the university.
She passed her English proficiency test.
The whole class passed this time.
Failing is okay, but try to pass next time.
Passing requires hard work and preparation.
extraExampleTranslations: Universitetga kirish uchun kirish imtihonidan o‘tishingiz kerak.
U ingliz tili darajasini tasdiqlovchi testdan o‘tdi.
Yiqilish normal, lekin keyingi safar o‘tishga harakat qiling.
O‘tish qattiq mehnat va tayyorgarlik talab qiladi.

words.definition: To not pass a test or exam.
words.definitionUz: Yiqilmoq — imtihon yoki testdan o‘ta olmaslik.
words.example1: He failed the history exam but will retake it.
words.example1Translation: U tarix imtihonidan yiqildi, lekin qayta topshiradi.
words.example2: Don’t be afraid to fail; it’s part of learning.
words.example2Translation: Yiqilishdan qo‘rqmang, bu o‘rganishning bir qismi.
words.example3: Many students fail because they don’t study enough.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘p o‘quvchilar yetarlicha o‘qimaganlari uchun yiqiladi.
extraExamples: She failed her driving test twice.
Failing once doesn’t mean you’re not smart.
The company will fail if it doesn’t adapt.
He felt sad after failing the important test.
Teachers help students who fail.
It’s better to fail and learn than not to try.
The project failed due to poor planning.
extraExampleTranslations: U haydovchilik imtihonidan ikki marta yiqildi.
Bir marta yiqilish aqlli emasligingizni anglatmaydi.
Muhim imtihondan yiqilgandan keyin u xafa bo‘ldi.
Harakat qilmasdan yiqilgandan ko‘ra, yiqilib o‘rganish yaxshiroq.
Loyiha yomon rejalashtirilgani uchun muvaffaqiyatsiz tugadi.

words.definition: Activity involving mental or physical effort done to achieve a purpose or earn money.
words.definitionUz: Ish — maqsadga erishish yoki pul topish uchun aqliy yoki jismoniy kuch sarflaydigan faoliyat.
words.example1: I go to work every morning at 8 o’clock.
words.example1Translation: Men har kuni ertalab soat 8 da ishga boraman.
words.example2: Hard work leads to success.
words.example3: She finds her work very rewarding.
words.example3Translation: U o‘z ishini juda foydali deb biladi.
extraExamples: Work can be stressful sometimes.
Many people work from home now.
He is looking for work in marketing.
Teamwork is important in most jobs.
She balances work and family life.
The work environment is friendly.
Remote work has become popular.
extraExampleTranslations: U ish va oilaviy hayotni muvozanatlashtiradi.

words.definition: A paid position of regular employment.
words.definitionUz: Ish — muntazam haq to‘lanadigan lavozim yoki ish o‘rni.
words.example1: She got a new job at a big company.
words.example1Translation: U katta kompaniyada yangi ish topdi.
words.example2: Finding a good job is not easy these days.
words.example2Translation: Yaxshi ish topish hozirgi kunda oson emas.
words.example3: He loves his job as a teacher.
words.example3Translation: U o‘qituvchi sifatidagi ishini yaxshi ko‘radi.
extraExamples: What kind of job are you looking for?
Many young people change jobs often.
The job requires good communication skills.
She quit her job to start her own business.
Part-time jobs help students earn money.
He applied for the job online.
Job satisfaction is very important.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu ish yaxshi muloqot ko‘nikmalarini talab qiladi.
U o‘z biznesini boshlash uchun ishini tashladi.
Yarim kunlik ishlar talabalarga pul topishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: A business organization that makes or sells goods or provides services.
words.definitionUz: Kompaniya — tovar ishlab chiqaradigan, sotadigan yoki xizmat ko‘rsatadigan biznes tashkiloti.
words.example1: She works for a big technology company.
words.example2: The company is expanding to new markets.
words.example3: Many people want to start their own company.
extraExamples: The company provides good benefits to employees.
He joined the company last year.
The company announced record profits.
Small companies often struggle in tough times.
She loves the company culture.
The company is hiring new workers.
International companies operate in many countries.
extraExampleTranslations: Kompaniya rekord daromad haqida e‘lon qildi.
Xalqaro kompaniyalar ko‘p mamlakatlarda faoliyat yuritadi.

words.definition: A room or building where people work, usually for administrative or professional tasks.
words.definitionUz: Ofis — odamlar, odatda ma’muriy yoki professional vazifalarni bajaradigan xona yoki bino.
words.example1: I work in an office in the city center.
words.example2: The office is closed on weekends.
words.example3: She decorated her office with plants.
extraExamples: Open-plan offices are popular now.
He has a meeting at the head office.
The office has a great view of the park.
Many companies allow working from home instead of the office.
She forgot her keys at the office.
The office staff are very friendly.
New offices are being built in the business district.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘p kompaniyalar ofis o‘rniga uydan ishlashga ruxsat beradi.

words.definition: A person who is in charge of a worker or organization.
words.definitionUz: Rahbar — ishchi yoki tashkilotni boshqaradigan shaxs.
words.example1: My boss gave me a promotion last month.
words.example1Translation: Rahbarim o‘tgan oy menga lavozimni oshirdi.
words.example2: She has a good relationship with her boss.
words.example3: The boss called an emergency meeting.
extraExamples: A good boss supports their team.
He is afraid to ask his boss for a day off.
The new boss has many innovative ideas.
My boss is very understanding.
She reports directly to the boss.
Working under a strict boss can be stressful.
The boss praised the team for their hard work.
extraExampleTranslations: U rahbaridan bir kun dam olishni so‘rashdan qo‘rqadi.
Yangi rahbar ko‘p yangicha g‘oyalarga ega.
Qattiq rahbar ostida ishlash stressli bo‘lishi mumkin.
Rahbar jamoani qattiq mehnati uchun maqtadi.

words.definition: A person who does a particular job, especially manual or physical work.
words.definitionUz: Ishchi — ma’lum bir ishni, ayniqsa jismoniy mehnat bilan bajaradigan shaxs.
words.example1: The factory workers start early in the morning.
words.example1Translation: Zavod ishchilari erta tongda ish boshlaydi.
words.example2: She is a dedicated healthcare worker.
words.example3: Construction workers wear safety helmets.
extraExamples: Skilled workers are in high demand.
The company treats its workers well.
Migrant workers often face challenges.
Office workers usually work 9 to 5.
Farm workers harvest crops in autumn.
Social workers help people in need.
The workers went on strike for better pay.
extraExampleTranslations: Migratsiya ishchilari ko‘pincha qiyinchiliklarga duch keladi.
Ofis ishchilari odatda soat 9 dan 5 gacha ishlaydi.
Ijtimoiy ishchilar muhtoj odamlarga yordam beradi.
Ishchilar yaxshiroq maosh uchun ish tashlashdi.

words.definition: A group of people who work together to achieve a common goal.
words.definitionUz: Jamoa — umumiy maqsadga erishish uchun birga ishlaydigan odamlar guruhi.
words.example1: Our team won the project competition.
words.example1Translation: Bizning jamoa loyiha tanlovida g‘olib bo‘ldi.
words.example2: Good teamwork is essential for success.
words.example2Translation: Yaxshi jamoaviy ish muvaffaqiyat uchun zarur.
words.example3: She is the leader of the marketing team.
extraExamples: The football team practiced every day.
We work as a team to solve problems.
A strong team can overcome challenges.
Team building activities improve relationships.
He feels proud to be part of the team.
The sales team exceeded their targets.
Teams communicate regularly to stay aligned.
extraExampleTranslations: Futbol jamoasi har kuni mashq qildi.
Biz muammolarni hal qilish uchun jamoa bo‘lib ishlaymiz.
U jamoa a‘zosi bo‘lgani uchun faxrlanadi.
Sotuv jamoasi rejalarni ortig‘i bilan bajardi.
Jamoalar bir xil maqsadda bo‘lish uchun muntazam muloqot qiladi.

words.definition: An occasion when people come together to discuss something.
words.definitionUz: Uchrashuv — odamlar biror narsani muhokama qilish uchun yig‘iladigan vaqt.
words.example1: We have a team meeting every Monday.
words.example1Translation: Bizda har dushanba jamoaviy yig‘ilish bo‘ladi.
words.example2: The meeting lasted for two hours.
words.example3: She is preparing for an important client meeting.
words.example3Translation: U muhim mijoz bilan uchrashuvga tayyorlanmoqda.
extraExamples: The boss called an urgent meeting.
Meetings help everyone stay informed.
He arrived late to the meeting.
Virtual meetings are common now.
The meeting agenda was sent yesterday.
They had a productive meeting.
Cancel the meeting if necessary.
extraExampleTranslations: Yig‘ilishlar hamma xabardor bo‘lishiga yordam beradi.
Uchrashuv kun tartibi kecha yuborilgan edi.

words.definition: A person qualified to diagnose and treat illnesses and injuries.
words.definitionUz: Shifokor — kasallik va jarohatlarni tashxis qo‘yib, davolaydigan mutaxassis.
words.example1: You should see a doctor if you feel sick.
words.example2: The doctor prescribed some medicine.
words.example3: She wants to become a doctor in the future.
extraExamples: The doctor examined the patient carefully.
Many doctors work long hours.
He thanked the doctor for saving his life.
The family doctor knows all their medical history.
Doctors and nurses work together.
She is studying to be a children’s doctor.
The doctor advised rest and fluids.
extraExampleTranslations: Shifokor bemorni diqqat bilan ko‘rikdan o‘tkazdi.
U hayotini saqlab qolgani uchun shifokorga rahmat aytdi.
Oilaviy shifokor ularning tibbiy tarixini yaxshi biladi.
U bolalar shifokori bo‘lish uchun o‘qimoqda.
Shifokor dam olish va suyuqlik ichishni maslahat berdi.

words.definition: A person trained to care for sick or injured people, usually in a hospital.
words.definitionUz: Hamshira — kasal yoki jarohatlangan odamlarga, odatda shifoxonada g‘amxo‘rlik qilishga o‘qitilgan shaxs.
words.example1: The nurse checked my blood pressure.
words.example2: Nurses play a vital role in healthcare.
words.example2Translation: Hamshiralar sog‘liqni saqlashda muhim rol o‘ynaydi.
words.example3: She works as a nurse in the children’s ward.
words.example3Translation: U bolalar bo‘limida hamshira bo‘lib ishlaydi.
extraExamples: The nurse gave the patient an injection.
Many nurses work night shifts.
He thanked the nurse for her kindness.
Nurses need good communication skills.
She is training to become a registered nurse.
The nurse helped the doctor during surgery.
Community nurses visit patients at home.
extraExampleTranslations: U hamshiraga mehribonligi uchun rahmat aytdi.
Hamshiralarda yaxshi muloqot ko‘nikmalari bo‘lishi kerak.
U ro‘yxatdan o‘tgan hamshira bo‘lish uchun o‘qimoqda.
Hamshira jarrohlik vaqtida shifokorga yordam berdi.

words.definition: A person who teaches students in a school or other educational setting.
words.definitionUz: O‘qituvchi — maktab yoki boshqa ta’lim muassasasida o‘quvchilarga dars beradigan shaxs.
words.example1: My teacher explained the lesson clearly.
words.example2: She is a popular English teacher.
words.example3: Teachers work hard to help students succeed.
words.example3Translation: O‘qituvchilar o‘quvchilar muvaffaqiyatli bo‘lishi uchun ko‘p mehnat qiladi.
extraExamples: The teacher gave us homework.
Good teachers inspire their students.
He became a teacher after university.
The math teacher is very patient.
Teachers attend training courses regularly.
She respects all her teachers.
The school needs more science teachers.
extraExampleTranslations: O‘qituvchilar muntazam malaka oshirish kurslariga qatnaydi.

words.definition: The official organization responsible for maintaining public order and enforcing the law.
words.definitionUz: Politsiya — jamoat tartibini saqlash va qonunni bajarish uchun mas’ul rasmiy tashkiloti.
words.example1: The police arrived quickly after the accident.
words.example1Translation: Politsiya voqea sodir bo‘lgandan keyin tez yetib keldi.
words.example2: He wants to join the police force.
words.example3: The police officer helped the lost child.
words.example3Translation: Politsiya xodimi adashgan bolaga yordam berdi.
extraExamples: Police are investigating the crime.
Call the police in an emergency.
Traffic police control the roads.
The police station is near the market.
Community police work closely with residents.
She reported the theft to the police.
Police training is very rigorous.
extraExampleTranslations: Jamiyat politsiyasi aholi bilan yaqin hamkorlik qiladi.
U o‘g‘irlik haqida politsiyaga xabar berdi.

words.definition: A person who grows crops or raises animals for food.
words.definitionUz: Dehqon — oziq-ovqat uchun ekin ekadigan yoki hayvon boqadigan shaxs.
words.example1: Farmers work hard from early morning.
words.example1Translation: Dehqonlar erta tongdan kechgacha mehnat qiladi.
words.example2: The farmer grows wheat and vegetables.
words.example3: Many farmers use modern technology now.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘p fermerlar hozir zamonaviy texnologiyalardan foydalanadi.
extraExamples: The farmer harvested the rice last week.
Dairy farmers produce milk and cheese.
Farmers’ markets are popular in cities.
He comes from a family of farmers.
Climate change affects farmers greatly.
The farmer takes care of his animals well.
Organic farmers avoid chemicals.
extraExampleTranslations: Dehqon o‘tgan hafta guruchni yig‘ib oldi.
Sut fermerlari sut va pishloq ishlab chiqaradi.
Iqlim o‘zgarishi dehqonlarga katta ta’sir qiladi.

words.definition: A person who prepares food for eating.
words.definitionUz: Oshpaz — ovqat tayyorlaydigan shaxs.
words.example1: The cook prepared a delicious meal.
words.example2: She works as a cook in a restaurant.
words.example3: My mother is a great cook.
extraExamples: The head cook manages the kitchen.
He learned to be a cook at culinary school.
Cooks work long hours in busy restaurants.
She is a vegetarian cook.
The cook added fresh herbs to the dish.
Many cooks specialize in certain cuisines.
The hotel hired a new cook.
extraExampleTranslations: Band restoranda oshpazlar uzoq soatlar ishlaydi.

words.definition: A person who serves customers in a restaurant.
words.definitionUz: Ofitsiant — restoranda mijozlarga xizmat ko‘rsatadigan shaxs.
words.example1: The waiter brought our food quickly.
words.example2: He works as a waiter during the weekends.
words.example2Translation: U dam olish kunlarida ofitsiant bo‘lib ishlaydi.
words.example3: The waiter recommended the special dish.
extraExamples: Waiters must be polite and fast.
She is a part-time waiter at a cafe.
The waiter took our order.
Good waiters remember regular customers.
The waiter cleared the table.
Many students work as waiters.
The head waiter supervises the staff.
extraExampleTranslations: Ofitsiantlar muloyim va tez bo‘lishi kerak.
Yaxshi ofitsiantlar doimiy mijozlarni eslab qoladi.

words.definition: A person who sings, especially professionally.
words.definitionUz: Qo‘shiqchi — qo‘shiq aytadigan, ayniqsa professional tarzda shug‘ullanadigan shaxs.
words.example1: She is a famous pop singer.
words.example2: The singer performed at the concert last night.
words.example3: He dreams of becoming a professional singer.
words.example3Translation: U professional qo‘shiqchi bo‘lishni orzu qiladi.
extraExamples: The singer has a beautiful voice.
Many singers release new songs online.
She is both a singer and a songwriter.
The opera singer practiced every day.
Street singers perform for money.
The band has a lead singer.
Young singers participate in talent shows.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘p qo‘shiqchilar yangi qo‘shiqlarni onlayn chiqaradi.
U ham qo‘shiqchi, ham qo‘shiq muallifi.
Opera qo‘shiqchisi har kuni mashq qiladi.
Ko‘cha qo‘shiqchilari pul topish uchun ijro etadi.

words.definition: The coins and banknotes used as a medium of exchange.
words.definitionUz: Pul — ayirboshlash vositasi sifatida ishlatiladigan tanga va qog‘oz pullar.
words.example1: She is saving money to buy a car.
words.example1Translation: U mashina sotib olish uchun pul yig‘moqda.
words.example2: Money can’t buy happiness.
words.example3: He earns good money in his job.
extraExamples: They donated money to charity.
Managing money wisely is important.
The company made a lot of money last year.
He borrowed money from his friend.
Money was transferred to her account.
Many people work hard for money.
Electronic money is becoming popular.
extraExampleTranslations: Kompaniya o‘tgan yili ko‘p pul ishladi.
Ko‘p odamlar pul uchun qattiq ishlaydi.

words.definition: Money in the form of coins and banknotes rather than checks or credit.
words.definitionUz: Naqd pul — chek yoki kredit emas, balki tanga va qog‘oz pullar shaklidagi pul.
words.example1: I prefer to pay in cash.
words.example1Translation: Men naqd pul bilan to‘lashni afzal ko‘raman.
words.example2: He withdrew cash from the ATM.
words.example3: The shop doesn’t accept cash anymore.
words.example3Translation: Do‘kon endi naqd pulni qabul qilmaydi.
extraExamples: Cash is still used in many small shops.
She carries some cash for emergencies.
The thief stole all the cash.
Paying with cash helps avoid debt.
The bank gave him cash in small bills.
Cash payments are faster sometimes.
They counted the cash at the end of the day.
extraExampleTranslations: Naqd pul hali ham ko‘p kichik do‘konlarda ishlatiladi.
U favqulodda holatlar uchun naqd pul olib yuradi.
Naqd to‘lash qarzlardan qochishga yordam beradi.
Bank unga mayda pullarda naqd berdi.
Ular kun oxirida naqd pulni sanab chiqdilar.

words.definition: The amount of money expected or given in exchange for a good or service.
words.definitionUz: Narx — tovar yoki xizmat evaziga beriladigan yoki kutib olinadigan pul miqdori.
words.example1: The price of petrol has increased again.
words.example2: What is the price of this phone?
words.example3: The prices are reasonable in this shop.
extraExamples: Prices are higher in tourist areas.
The company lowered the price of its products.
She checked the price before buying.
High prices make life difficult.
The price includes delivery.
Price comparison websites are useful.
They negotiated a better price.
extraExampleTranslations: U sotib olishdan oldin narxni tekshirdi.
Narx yetkazib berishni o‘z ichiga oladi.
Ular yaxshiroq narx bo‘yicha kelishib oldilar.

words.definition: The amount of money needed to buy, make, or do something.
words.definitionUz: Xarajat — biror narsani sotib olish, yasash yoki bajarish uchun kerakli pul miqdori.
words.example1: The cost of living is very high in big cities.
words.example1Translation: Katta shaharlarda yashash xarajati juda yuqori.
words.example2: What is the total cost of the repair?
words.example3: Education costs have risen recently.
extraExamples: The cost includes taxes.
They reduced production costs.
Healthcare costs are increasing.
The cost of the ticket is 50 dollars.
Low cost airlines are popular.
He calculated the cost carefully.
The project cost more than expected.

words.definition: To give money in exchange for goods or services.
words.definitionUz: To‘lamoq — tovar yoki xizmat uchun pul berish.
words.example1: I pay my bills online every month.
words.example1Translation: Men har oy hisoblarimni onlayn to‘layman.
words.example2: The company pays its workers on time.
words.example3: She paid for the meal with her credit card.
words.example3Translation: U ovqat haqini kredit kartasi bilan to‘ladi.
extraExamples: You can pay in cash or by card.
He pays attention in class.
The government pays for public services.
She pays rent every month.
They paid a lot for the tickets.
Paying by phone is convenient.
Employees get paid twice a month.
extraExampleTranslations: Naqd yoki kartochka bilan to‘lashingiz mumkin.
U har oy ijara haqini to‘laydi.
Ular chiptalar uchun ko‘p pul to‘ladilar.
Xodimlar oyiga ikki marta maosh oladi.

words.definition: To obtain something by paying money for it.
words.definitionUz: Sotib olmoq — pul to‘lab biror narsani olish.
words.example1: I want to buy a new laptop.
words.example2: She buys fresh vegetables from the market.
words.example2Translation: U bozordan yangi sabzavot sotib oladi.
words.example3: Many people buy clothes online.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘p odamlar kiyimlarni onlayn sotib oladi.
extraExamples: He bought a house last year.
Buy now and pay later options are popular.
She always buys the cheapest option.
They buy gifts for each other.
Buying in bulk saves money.
Don’t buy things you don’t need.
The company buys supplies in large quantities.
extraExampleTranslations: U o‘tgan yili uy sotib oldi.
Hozir sotib oling, keyin to‘lang variantlari ommalashgan.
U har doim eng arzon variantni sotib oladi.
Katta miqdorda sotib olish pulni tejaydi.
Kompaniya materiallarni katta miqdorda sotib oladi.

words.definition: To give something to someone in exchange for money.
words.definitionUz: Sotmoq — biror narsani pul evaziga boshqaga berish.
words.example1: They sell fresh fruits at the market.
words.example2: The shop sells clothes and accessories.
words.example3: He wants to sell his old car.
extraExamples: The company sells products worldwide.
She sells handmade jewelry online.
Farmers sell their crops directly.
Selling requires good marketing.
They sold the house quickly.
Many stores sell similar items.
He sells insurance for a living.
extraExampleTranslations: U qo‘lda yasalgan taqinchoqlarni onlayn sotadi.
U sug‘urta sotish bilan kun ko‘radi.

words.definition: To use money to buy or pay for something.
words.definitionUz: Sarflamoq — pulni biror narsani sotib olish yoki to‘lash uchun ishlatish.
words.example1: Don’t spend too much money on unnecessary things.
words.example2: She spends a lot of time reading books.
words.example2Translation: U kitob o‘qishga ko‘p vaqt sarflaydi.
words.example3: They spent the weekend at the beach.
words.example3Translation: Ular dam olish kunlarini dengiz bo‘yida o‘tkazdilar.
extraExamples: He spends most of his salary on rent.
Companies spend money on advertising.
Spending time with family is important.
She spent all her savings on education.
We need to spend wisely.
The government spends billions on healthcare.
He spends hours practicing sports.
extraExampleTranslations: U maoshining ko‘p qismini ijara haqiga sarflaydi.
Hukumat sog‘liqni saqlashga milliardlab pul sarflaydi.
U sport mashqlariga soatlab vaqt sarflaydi.

words.definition: To keep money for future use instead of spending it immediately.
words.definitionUz: Tejamoq — pulni hozir sarflash o‘rniga kelajak uchun saqlab qo‘yish.
words.example1: I try to save some money every month.
words.example1Translation: Men har oy biroz pul tejashga harakat qilaman.
words.example2: She saved enough to travel abroad.
words.example2Translation: U xorijga sayohat qilish uchun yetarli pul tejadi.
words.example3: Saving energy helps the environment.
extraExamples: He saves money for his children’s education.
Banks help people save safely.
Save your work before closing the file.
The doctor saved the patient’s life.
We saved time by taking a shortcut.
Many people save for retirement.
She saved the document on her computer.
extraExampleTranslations: U bolalarining ta’limi uchun pul tejaydi.
Banklar odamlarga xavfsiz tejashga yordam beradi.

words.definition: Low in price and good value for the money.
words.definitionUz: Arzon — narxi past va pulga nisbatan yaxshi qiymatga ega.
words.example1: This shirt is cheap but good quality.
words.example1Translation: Bu ko‘ylak arzon, lekin sifati yaxshi.
words.example2: They stayed in a cheap hotel.
words.example3: Cheap flights are available if you book early.
words.example3Translation: Erta bron qilsangiz, arzon aviachiptalar mavjud.
extraExamples: The food is cheap and delicious here.
Cheap products sometimes break easily.
She bought a cheap phone that works well.
Prices are cheaper during sales.
He prefers cheap public transport.
Living in small towns is cheaper.
Don’t always choose the cheapest option.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu yerda ovqat arzon va mazali.
U arzon, lekin yaxshi ishlaydigan telefon sotib oldi.
U arzon jamoat transportini afzal ko‘radi.
Har doim eng arzon variantni tanlamang.

words.definition: Costing a lot of money.
words.definitionUz: Qimmat — ko‘p pul sarflaydigan.
words.example1: This restaurant is expensive but the food is excellent.
words.example1Translation: Bu restoran qimmat, lekin ovqati ajoyib.
words.example2: Buying a house in the city is very expensive.
words.example2Translation: Shaharda uy sotib olish juda qimmat.
words.example3: She bought an expensive watch as a gift.
words.example3Translation: U sovg‘a uchun qimmat soat sotib oldi.
extraExamples: Expensive cars require more maintenance.
Healthcare can be expensive without insurance.
The hotel was too expensive for us.
Luxury brands are usually expensive.
Education in private universities is expensive.
It’s expensive to travel during holidays.
He avoids buying expensive clothes.
extraExampleTranslations: Qimmat mashinalar ko‘proq texnik xizmat talab qiladi.
Sug‘urtasiz tibbiy yordam qimmat bo‘lishi mumkin.
Mehmonxona biz uchun juda qimmat edi.
U qimmat kiyimlarni sotib olishdan qochadi.

words.definition: Not costing any money.
words.definitionUz: Bepul — hech qanday pul talab qilmaydigan.
words.example1: The museum offers free entry on Sundays.
words.example1Translation: Muzey yakshanba kunlari bepul kirish imkonini beradi.
words.example2: You can download the app for free.
words.example3: The company gave away free samples.
extraExamples: Education is free in public schools.
The concert is free for students.
She got a free ticket to the event.
Free Wi-Fi is available in the cafe.
Many websites offer free content.
The doctor gave free medical advice.
Children under 5 enter for free.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘p veb-saytlar bepul kontent taklif qiladi.

words.definition: A container made of flexible material used for carrying things.
words.definitionUz: Sumka — narsalarni ko‘tarish uchun moslashuvchan materialdan yasalgan idish.
words.example1: She carries a big bag to work every day.
words.example1Translation: U har kuni ishga katta sumka olib boradi.
words.example2: Don’t forget your shopping bag.
words.example3: He packed his clothes in a travel bag.
extraExamples: Plastic bags are bad for the environment.
She bought a new leather bag.
The school bag is very heavy.
Put the vegetables in the bag.
Many people use reusable bags.
He lost his bag at the airport.
The bag contains important documents.
extraExampleTranslations: U yangi charm sumka sotib oldi.
Ko‘p odamlar qayta ishlatiladigan sumkalardan foydalanadi.

words.definition: Tovarlar sotib olinadigan yoki sotiladigan joy
words.definitionUz: Do'kon — bu odamlar kerakli narsalarni sotib oladigan savdo joyi.
words.example1: I go to the shop every day.
words.example2: The shop is closed now.
words.example3: She works in a clothing shop.
extraExamples: We bought fresh bread from the local shop.
The shop sells many different kinds of toys.
extraExampleTranslations: Biz mahalliy do'kondan yangi non sotib oldik.

words.definition: Jismoniy faollik va musobaqa bilan bog'liq mashg'ulot
words.definitionUz: Sport — bu sog'liq va quvnoqlik uchun qilinadigan jismoniy mashqlar.
words.example1: I like playing sport.
words.example1Translation: Men sport bilan shug'ullanishni yaxshi ko'raman.
words.example2: Football is a popular sport.
words.example3: She does sport every morning.
words.example3Translation: U har kuni ertalab sport bilan shug'ullanadi.
extraExamples: Team sports help people learn to work together.
Swimming is both a sport and a great exercise.
extraExampleTranslations: Jamoaviy sportlar odamlarga birga ishlashni o'rgatadi.
Suzish ham sport, ham ajoyib mashqdir.

words.definition: Oyoq bilan o'ynaladigan jamoaviy o'yin
words.definitionUz: Futbol — dunyodagi eng mashhur jamoaviy sport o'yinlaridan biri.
words.example1: They play football after school.
words.example2: I watch football on TV.
words.example3: Football is his favorite sport.
extraExamples: The football match was very exciting.
Many children dream of becoming football players.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko'p bolalar futbolchi bo'lishni orzu qiladi.

words.definition: Qo'l bilan to'pni savatga tashlash o'yini
words.definitionUz: Basketbol — balandlik va tezlik talab qiladigan jamoaviy sport.
words.example1: He plays basketball well.
words.example2: Basketball is popular in many countries.
words.example3: We have a basketball team at school.
extraExamples: Basketball requires good teamwork.
